# WeChat integration with Digeino tool (2026-03-12 05:53Z)

_**User**_

帮我查看digeino的工具，现在有可以通过企业微信发送给个人微信的工具，是否也可以实现一个工具来接收个人微信发送给相同企业微信机器人应用消息的工具，接收到消息后的业务处理先todo，给我一个方案，先不要动代码。digeino是插件，可以支持其他系统调用它。

---

_**Agent (model composer-1, mode Agent)**_



---


查看 digeino 的工具实现，重点了解企业微信发送工具的实现方式，以便制定接收消息的方案。


---

            "text": "\thttpReq, err := http.NewRequestWithContext(ctx, \"POST\", url, bytes.NewBuffer(jsonData))",

          },
          {

          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 93
          },
          {
            "text": "\thttpReq.Header.Set(\"Content-Type\", \"application/json\")",
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95
          },
          {
            "text": "\tclient := &amp;http.Client{Timeout: 30 * time.Second}",
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 97
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 98
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"call WeCom API: %w\", err)",
            "lineNumber": 99
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "text": "\tdefer resp.Body.Close()",
            "lineNumber": 101
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102
          },
          {
            "text": "\trespBody, err := io.ReadAll(resp.Body)",
            "lineNumber": 103
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 104
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"read response: %w\", err)",
            "lineNumber": 105
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 106
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "text": "\tvar apiResp WeComMessageAPIResponse",
            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err := json.Unmarshal(respBody, &amp;apiResp); err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 109
          },
          {

          },

          },

            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 114
          },
          {

          },

            "lineNumber": 116
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117
          },
          {
            "text": "// getWeComCustomerApp 获取具备「管理所有客服会话」权限的企业微信应用（用于发送客服消息给个人微信）",
            "lineNumber": 118

          {
            "text": "func getWeComCustomerApp() (*workwx.WorkwxApp, error) {",

          },
          {

          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/updates/2026-02-10_wecom_push_tool.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 45
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "# 更新：企业微信推送工具",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "**日期**: 2026-02-10",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "**类别**: 功能 / 工具",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": "## 概述",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "新增企业微信（WeCom）推送工具，使 DigEino 作为 DigFlow Agent 插件时，能够将 Agent 运行结果通过企业微信应用消息发送给用户。企业微信通过中转到个人微信，相比公众号具有无封号风险、无需 48 小时内互动等优势。",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "本更新新增三个 Eino 工具：文字消息、图片消息、文本卡片消息。Token 由 &#96;go-workwx&#96; 库内部管理，无需额外配置。",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "## 新功能",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "### 1. 文字消息 (&#96;send_wecom_message&#96;)",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "- 发送纯文本消息给企业成员",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "- 超过 850 字自动分条发送（企业微信单条建议上限）",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "- 支持指定 &#96;agent_id&#96; 或使用配置中第一个应用",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "### 2. 图片消息 (&#96;send_wecom_image&#96;)",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "- 使用临时素材的 &#96;media_id&#96; 发送图片",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "- 需先通过企业微信临时素材上传接口获取 &#96;media_id&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "### 3. 文本卡片消息 (&#96;send_wecom_text_card&#96;)",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "- 发送标题 + 描述 + 链接的卡片，适合通知类场景",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "- 用户点击可跳转指定 URL",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "### 4. 客服消息 (&#96;send_wecom_customer_message&#96;) — 发给个人微信用户",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "- 使用企业微信「客户联系」的客服能力，将消息发给**个人微信**用户",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "- 需提供 &#96;open_kf_id&#96;（客服账号 ID）和 &#96;customer_id&#96;（外部联系人 ID）",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "- 用户需先通过扫码/链接添加企业为客服后才能收到消息",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "- 支持第三方传入 &#96;access_token&#96;（需来自具备「管理所有客服会话」权限的应用）",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "- 或配置 &#96;ManageAllKFSession: true&#96; 的应用，由 DigEino 内部获取 token",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "## 修改的组件",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "### 新增文件",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;tools/wx/wecom_message.go&#96;：企业微信消息发送逻辑（文字、图片、文本卡片）",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;tools/wx/wecom_tool.go&#96;：三个 Eino 工具的工厂函数",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "### 更新的文件",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;config/config.go&#96;：新增 &#96;WeComConfig&#96;、&#96;WeComApplication&#96; 结构体",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;config/config.yaml&#96;：新增 &#96;WeCom&#96; 配置块",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;tools/wx/wx_types.go&#96;：新增企业微信相关请求/响应类型",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;tools/tools.go&#96;：在 &#96;BaseTools&#96; 中注册三个企业微信工具",
            "lineNumber": 44
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.48469066619873047
    },
    {

        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "func SendWeComCustomerMessage(ctx context.Context, req SendWeComCustomerMessageRequest) (SendWeComCustomerMessageResponse, error) {",
            "lineNumber": 403
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif req.OpenKfID == \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 404
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn SendWeComCustomerMessageResponse{}, fmt.Errorf(\"open_kf_id is required\")",
            "lineNumber": 405
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 406
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif req.CustomerID == \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 407
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn SendWeComCustomerMessageResponse{}, fmt.Errorf(\"customer_id is required\")",
            "lineNumber": 408
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 409
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif req.Content == \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 410
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn SendWeComCustomerMessageResponse{}, fmt.Errorf(\"content is required\")",
            "lineNumber": 411
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 412
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 413
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 第三方传入 token 时直接调客服 API",
            "lineNumber": 414
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif req.AccessToken != \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 415
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tif utf8.RuneCountInString(req.Content) &gt; maxTextLength {",
            "lineNumber": 416
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tparts := splitMsg(req.Content, maxTextLength)",
            "lineNumber": 417
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tfor _, part := range parts {",
            "lineNumber": 418
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\tbody := map[string]interface{}{",
            "lineNumber": 419
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\t\"msgtype\": \"text\",",
            "lineNumber": 420
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\t\"text\":    map[string]string{\"content\": part},",
            "lineNumber": 421
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 422
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\tif err := sendWeComCustomerMessageAPI(ctx, req.AccessToken, req.OpenKfID, req.CustomerID, body); err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 423
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\treturn SendWeComCustomerMessageResponse{Success: false, Message: fmt.Sprintf(\"发送失败: %v\", err)}, err",
            "lineNumber": 424
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 425
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 426
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\treturn SendWeComCustomerMessageResponse{Success: true, Message: fmt.Sprintf(\"成功发送 %d 条消息\", len(parts))}, nil",
            "lineNumber": 427
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 428
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tbody := map[string]interface{}{",
            "lineNumber": 429
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\"msgtype\": \"text\",",
            "lineNumber": 430
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\"text\":    map[string]string{\"content\": req.Content},",
            "lineNumber": 431
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 432
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tif err := sendWeComCustomerMessageAPI(ctx, req.AccessToken, req.OpenKfID, req.CustomerID, body); err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 433
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\treturn SendWeComCustomerMessageResponse{Success: false, Message: fmt.Sprintf(\"发送失败: %v\", err)}, err",
            "lineNumber": 434
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 435
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn SendWeComCustomerMessageResponse{Success: true, Message: \"客服消息发送成功\"}, nil",
            "lineNumber": 436
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 437
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 438
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 439
          },

            "lineNumber": 440
          },

            "lineNumber": 441
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 442
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 443
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 444
          },

            "lineNumber": 445
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 446
          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 448
          },

            "lineNumber": 449

        ]

    {
      "codeBlock": {

        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "func sendMessageRequest(ctx context.Context, url string, requestBody map[string]interface{}, openid string) error {",
            "lineNumber": 443
          },
          {
            "text": "\tjsonData, err := json.Marshal(requestBody)",
            "lineNumber": 444
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 445
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to marshal request: %w\", err)",
            "lineNumber": 446
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 447
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 448
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 创建 HTTP 请求",
            "lineNumber": 449
          },
          {
            "text": "\thttpReq, err := http.NewRequestWithContext(ctx, \"POST\", url, bytes.NewBuffer(jsonData))",
            "lineNumber": 450
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 451
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to create request: %w\", err)",
            "lineNumber": 452
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 453
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 454
          },
          {
            "text": "\thttpReq.Header.Set(\"Content-Type\", \"application/json\")",
            "lineNumber": 455
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 456
          },
          {
            "text": "\tclient := &amp;http.Client{",
            "lineNumber": 457
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tTimeout: 30 * time.Second,",
            "lineNumber": 458
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 459
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 460
          },
          {
            "text": "\tresp, err := client.Do(httpReq)",
            "lineNumber": 461
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 462
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to call WeChat API: %w\", err)",
            "lineNumber": 463
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 464
          },
          {
            "text": "\tdefer resp.Body.Close()",
            "lineNumber": 465
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 466
          },
          {
            "text": "\tbody, err := io.ReadAll(resp.Body)",
            "lineNumber": 467
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 468
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to read response body: %w\", err)",
            "lineNumber": 469
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 470
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 471
          },
          {
            "text": "\tvar apiResp WeChatMessageResponse",
            "lineNumber": 472
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err := json.Unmarshal(body, &amp;apiResp); err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 473
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"failed to parse response: %w\", err)",
            "lineNumber": 474
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 475
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 476
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 检查响应",
            "lineNumber": 477
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif apiResp.ErrCode != 0 {",
            "lineNumber": 478
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t// 处理常见的错误码",
            "lineNumber": 479
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tswitch apiResp.ErrCode {",
            "lineNumber": 480
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tcase 45015:",
            "lineNumber": 481
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"用户48小时内未与公众号交互，无法发送客服消息\")",
            "lineNumber": 482
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tcase 40001:",
            "lineNumber": 483
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"access_token 无效，请检查配置\")",
            "lineNumber": 484
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tcase 40003:",
            "lineNumber": 485
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"openid 无效: %s\", openid)",
            "lineNumber": 486
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tcase 45047:",
            "lineNumber": 487
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"发送消息过于频繁，请稍后再试\")",
            "lineNumber": 488
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tdefault:",
            "lineNumber": 489
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"WeChat API error: errcode=%d, errmsg=%s\", apiResp.ErrCode, apiResp.ErrMsg)",
            "lineNumber": 490
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 491
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 492
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 493
          },
          {
            "text": "\treturn nil",
            "lineNumber": 494
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 495
          }
        ]

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/wx/wx_message.go",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 321,

          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 393,

          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "func SendWeChatLinkMessage(ctx context.Context, req SendWeChatLinkMessageRequest) (SendWeChatLinkMessageResponse, error) {",
            "lineNumber": 323
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 1. 验证请求参数",
            "lineNumber": 324
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif len(req.Articles) == 0 {",
            "lineNumber": 325
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn SendWeChatLinkMessageResponse{}, fmt.Errorf(\"articles is required and cannot be empty\")",
            "lineNumber": 326
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 327
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif len(req.Articles) &gt; 1 {",
            "lineNumber": 328
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn SendWeChatLinkMessageResponse{}, fmt.Errorf(\"articles count must be 1 or less\")",
            "lineNumber": 329
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 330
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 331
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 验证文章内容",
            "lineNumber": 332
          },
          {
            "text": "\tfor i, article := range req.Articles {",
            "lineNumber": 333
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tif article.Title == \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 334
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\treturn SendWeChatLinkMessageResponse{}, fmt.Errorf(\"article[%d].title is required\", i)",
            "lineNumber": 335
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 336
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tif article.Description == \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 337
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\treturn SendWeChatLinkMessageResponse{}, fmt.Errorf(\"article[%d].description is required\", i)",
            "lineNumber": 338
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 339
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tif article.PicURL == \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 340
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\treturn SendWeChatLinkMessageResponse{}, fmt.Errorf(\"article[%d].picurl is required\", i)",
            "lineNumber": 341
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 342
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tif article.URL == \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 343
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\treturn SendWeChatLinkMessageResponse{}, fmt.Errorf(\"article[%d].url is required\", i)",
            "lineNumber": 344
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 345
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 346
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 347
          },
          {
            "text": "\tcfg := config.Get()",
            "lineNumber": 348
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 349
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 2. 确定接收者列表",
            "lineNumber": 350
          },
          {
            "text": "\tvar openids []string",
            "lineNumber": 351
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif req.OpenID != \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 352
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t// 指定了单个 openid",
            "lineNumber": 353
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\topenids = []string{req.OpenID}",
            "lineNumber": 354
          },
          {
            "text": "\t} else {",
            "lineNumber": 355
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t// 从配置中读取 openid 列表",
            "lineNumber": 356
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\topenids = cfg.WeChat.OpenIDs",
            "lineNumber": 357
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tif len(openids) == 0 {",
            "lineNumber": 358
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\treturn SendWeChatLinkMessageResponse{}, fmt.Errorf(\"no openid specified and no openids configured\")",
            "lineNumber": 359
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 360
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 361
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 362
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 3. 获取 AccessToken（优先使用请求中传入的）",
            "lineNumber": 363
          },
          {
            "text": "\taccessToken := req.AccessToken",
            "lineNumber": 364
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif accessToken == \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 365
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tvar err error",
            "lineNumber": 366
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\taccessToken, err = GetAccessToken(ctx)",
            "lineNumber": 367
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 368
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\treturn SendWeChatLinkMessageResponse{}, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to get access token: %w\", err)",
            "lineNumber": 369
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 370
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 371
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 372
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 4. 逐个发送消息",
            "lineNumber": 373
          },
          {
            "text": "\tvar sentTo []string",
            "lineNumber": 374
          },
          {
            "text": "\tvar failedTo []FailedMessage",
            "lineNumber": 375
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 376
          },
          {
            "text": "\tfor _, openid := range openids {",
            "lineNumber": 377
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\terr := sendLinkMessageToUser(ctx, accessToken, openid, req.Articles)",
            "lineNumber": 378
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 379
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tfailedTo = append(failedTo, FailedMessage{",
            "lineNumber": 380
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\tOpenID: openid,",
            "lineNumber": 381
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\tReason: err.Error(),",
            "lineNumber": 382
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t})",
            "lineNumber": 383
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t} else {",
            "lineNumber": 384
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tsentTo = append(sentTo, openid)",
            "lineNumber": 385
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 386
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 387
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 388
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 5. 构建响应",
            "lineNumber": 389
          },
          {
            "text": "\tresponse := SendWeChatLinkMessageResponse{",
            "lineNumber": 390
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tSuccess:  len(failedTo) == 0,",
            "lineNumber": 391
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tSentTo:   sentTo,",
            "lineNumber": 392
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tFailedTo: failedTo,",
            "lineNumber": 393
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 394
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.47367793321609497
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/wx/wecom_message.go",
        "range": {

        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "package wx",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "import (",

          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"bytes\"",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"context\"",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"encoding/json\"",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"fmt\"",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"io\"",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"net/http\"",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"time\"",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"unicode/utf8\"",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\"",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"github.com/whyiyhw/go-workwx\"",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": ")",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "const maxTextLength = 850 // 企业微信单条消息建议不超过 850 字符",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "// getWeComAgentID 解析 agentID，若为 0 则从配置取第一个",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "func getWeComAgentID(agentID int64) (int64, error) {",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif agentID != 0 {",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn agentID, nil",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "\tcfg := config.Get()",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif len(cfg.WeCom.Applications) == 0 {",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn 0, fmt.Errorf(\"WeCom Applications not configured\")",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "\treturn cfg.WeCom.Applications[0].AgentID, nil",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "// getWeComAPIHost 获取企业微信 API 地址",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "func getWeComAPIHost() string {",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "\tcfg := config.Get()",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif cfg.WeCom.QYAPIHost != \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn cfg.WeCom.QYAPIHost",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "\treturn \"https://qyapi.weixin.qq.com\"",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "// sendWeComMessageAPI 直接调用企业微信 API 发送消息（用于第三方传入 token）",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "func sendWeComMessageAPI(ctx context.Context, accessToken string, agentID int64, userID string, body map[string]interface{}) error {",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {

          }
        ]
      },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/wx/wx_message.go",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 388,
            "column": 19
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 443,
            "column": 43
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "\tresponse := SendWeChatLinkMessageResponse{",
            "lineNumber": 390
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tSuccess:  len(failedTo) == 0,",
            "lineNumber": 391
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tSentTo:   sentTo,",
            "lineNumber": 392
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tFailedTo: failedTo,",
            "lineNumber": 393
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 394
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 395
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif len(sentTo) &gt; 0 &amp;&amp; len(failedTo) == 0 {",
            "lineNumber": 396
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tresponse.Message = fmt.Sprintf(\"成功发送图文链接消息给 %d 个用户\", len(sentTo))",
            "lineNumber": 397
          },
          {
            "text": "\t} else if len(sentTo) &gt; 0 &amp;&amp; len(failedTo) &gt; 0 {",
            "lineNumber": 398
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tresponse.Message = fmt.Sprintf(\"部分成功：成功发送给 %d 个用户，失败 %d 个\", len(sentTo), len(failedTo))",
            "lineNumber": 399
          },
          {
            "text": "\t} else {",
            "lineNumber": 400
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tresponse.Message = fmt.Sprintf(\"发送失败：所有 %d 个用户都发送失败\", len(failedTo))",
            "lineNumber": 401
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 402
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 403
          },
          {
            "text": "\treturn response, nil",
            "lineNumber": 404
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 405
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 406
          },
          {
            "text": "// sendLinkMessageToUser 向单个用户发送图文链接消息",
            "lineNumber": 407
          },
          {
            "text": "func sendLinkMessageToUser(ctx context.Context, accessToken, openid string, articles []LinkMessageArticle) error {",
            "lineNumber": 408
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif openid == \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 409
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"openid is required\")",
            "lineNumber": 410
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 411
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif len(articles) == 0 {",
            "lineNumber": 412
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"articles is required\")",
            "lineNumber": 413
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 414
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 415
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 微信客服消息接口",
            "lineNumber": 416
          },
          {
            "text": "\turl := fmt.Sprintf(\"https://api.weixin.qq.com/cgi-bin/message/custom/send?access_token=%s\", accessToken)",
            "lineNumber": 417
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 418
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 构建文章列表",
            "lineNumber": 419
          },
          {
            "text": "\tarticlesList := make([]map[string]string, len(articles))",
            "lineNumber": 420
          },
          {
            "text": "\tfor i, article := range articles {",
            "lineNumber": 421
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tarticlesList[i] = map[string]string{",
            "lineNumber": 422
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\"title\":       article.Title,",
            "lineNumber": 423
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\"description\": article.Description,",
            "lineNumber": 424
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\"picurl\":      article.PicURL,",
            "lineNumber": 425
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\"url\":         article.URL,",
            "lineNumber": 426
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 427
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 428
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 429
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 构建请求体",
            "lineNumber": 430
          },
          {
            "text": "\trequestBody := map[string]interface{}{",
            "lineNumber": 431
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\"touser\":  openid,",
            "lineNumber": 432
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\"msgtype\": \"news\",",
            "lineNumber": 433
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\"news\": map[string]interface{}{",
            "lineNumber": 434
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\"articles\": articlesList,",
            "lineNumber": 435
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t},",
            "lineNumber": 436
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 437
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 438
          },
          {
            "text": "\treturn sendMessageRequest(ctx, url, requestBody, openid)",
            "lineNumber": 439
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 440
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 441
          },
          {
            "text": "// sendMessageRequest 通用的发送消息请求函数",
            "lineNumber": 442
          },
          {
            "text": "func sendMessageRequest(ctx context.Context, url string, requestBody map[string]interface{}, openid string) error {",
            "lineNumber": 443
          },
          {
            "text": "\tjsonData, err := json.Marshal(requestBody)",
            "lineNumber": 444
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.4544881582260132
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/ideas/企业微信员工发客户消息方案.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 49
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "# 企业微信员工发给客户消息 - 实现方案",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "## 一、chatgpt-wechat-main 调研结论",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "**chatgpt-wechat-main 未实现该功能。** 其仅包含：",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "- **客服消息**：&#96;SendCustomerChatMessage(openKfID, customerID, msg)&#96;，使用 &#96;cgi-bin/kf/send_msg&#96;，面向「用户添加企业为客服」的场景",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "- **应用消息**：&#96;SendToWeComUser(agentID, userID, msg)&#96;，面向企业成员",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "- **GetCustomerList**：获取客服账号列表 (&#96;kf/account/list&#96;)，不是外部联系人列表",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "无任何 &#96;externalcontact&#96;、&#96;external_contact&#96;、客户联系相关服务端实现。",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "## 二、企业微信两种「发给个人微信」场景对比",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "flowchart TB",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "    subgraph 客服场景",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "        KF[用户扫码添加企业为客服]",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "        KFAPI[\"cgi-bin/kf/send_msg\"]",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "        KFID[open_kf_id + customer_id]",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "        KF --&gt; KFAPI",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "        KFAPI --&gt; KFID",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "    end",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "    subgraph 员工场景",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "        EC[用户扫码添加员工为好友]",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "        ECAPI[\"cgi-bin/externalcontact/add_msg_template\"]",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "        ECID[sender + external_userid]",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "        EC --&gt; ECAPI",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "        ECAPI --&gt; ECID",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "    end",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "| 维度     | 客服消息（已实现）      | 员工发客户（待实现）                          |",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "| -------- | ----------------------- | --------------------------------------------- |",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "| 添加方式 | 用户添加企业为客服      | 用户添加员工为好友                            |",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "| API      | &#96;cgi-bin/kf/send_msg&#96;   | &#96;cgi-bin/externalcontact/add_msg_template&#96; 等 |",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "| 凭证     | 应用 ManageAllKFSession | **客户联系 secret**                           |",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "| 参数     | open_kf_id, customer_id | sender (员工 userid), external_userid         |",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "| **多轮对话** | 支持 | 不支持 |",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "| **限制** | 用户发消息后 48 小时内最多回复 5 条，用户续发可再回复 | 每位客户每天最多 1 条，单向群发 |",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "### 2.1 多轮对话与限制说明",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "**客服消息**（&#96;kf/send_msg&#96;）支持多轮对话：用户主动发消息后 48 小时内，企业可回复最多 5 条；用户继续发消息可再次回复。适合对话式客服场景。",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "**员工发客户**（&#96;add_msg_template&#96;）不支持多轮：无论单独发 1 个还是群发多个，都走群发流程，受「每位客户每天 1 条」限制，是单向群发，非对话模式。企业微信目前没有服务端「员工-客户单聊即时发送」API。",
            "lineNumber": 49
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.4539041519165039
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/wx/tool.go",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 33,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "package wx",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "import (",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"context\"",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"fmt\"",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool\"",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool/utils\"",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\"",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": ")",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "// NewWeChatMessageTool 创建微信推送工具",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "func NewWeChatMessageTool(ctx context.Context) (tool.BaseTool, error) {",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "\tcfg := config.Get()",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif cfg.WeChat.Enabled == nil || !*cfg.WeChat.Enabled {",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"WeChat tool is not enabled in config\")",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif cfg.WeChat.AppID == \"\" || cfg.WeChat.AppSecret == \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"WeChat AppID or AppSecret not configured\")",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "\treturn utils.InferTool(",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\"send_wechat_message\",",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\"通过微信服务号推送文字消息给指定的用户openid。支持发送给单个用户或配置中的所有用户。注意：用户需要在48小时内与公众号有交互才能接收客服消息。\",",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tfunc(ctx context.Context, req *SendWeChatTextMessageRequest) (*SendWeChatTextMessageResponse, error) {",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tresp, err := SendWeChatTextMessage(ctx, *req)",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\treturn nil, err",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\treturn &amp;resp, nil",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t},",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "\t)",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {

          }

      "score": 0.44987499713897705
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/ideas/企业微信员工发客户消息方案.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 140
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 189
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "- 实现 &#96;getExternalContactAccessToken()&#96;：用 &#96;ExternalContactSecret&#96; 获取 token",
            "lineNumber": 141
          },
          {
            "text": "- 实现 &#96;SendWeComExternalContactMessage()&#96;：单独发送，调用 &#96;add_msg_template&#96;（传 1 个 external_userid）",
            "lineNumber": 142
          },
          {
            "text": "- 实现 &#96;SendWeComExternalContactBroadcast()&#96;：群发，调用 &#96;add_msg_template&#96;（传多个 external_userid）",
            "lineNumber": 143
          },
          {
            "text": "- 可选：支持 add_msg_template 的异步流程（任务创建 → 状态查询）",
            "lineNumber": 144
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145
          },
          {
            "text": "### 4. 新增工具（wecom_tool.go）",
            "lineNumber": 146
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147
          },
          {
            "text": "| 工具名 | 用途 | 参数 |",
            "lineNumber": 148
          },
          {
            "text": "|--------|------|------|",
            "lineNumber": 149
          },
          {
            "text": "| &#96;send_wecom_external_contact_message&#96; | 单独发送 | sender, external_userid （单个）, content |",
            "lineNumber": 150
          },
          {
            "text": "| &#96;send_wecom_external_contact_broadcast&#96; | 群发 | sender, external_userids （数组）, content |",
            "lineNumber": 151
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 152
          },
          {
            "text": "**工具一：单独发送**",
            "lineNumber": 153
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 154
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go",
            "lineNumber": 155
          },
          {
            "text": "func NewWeComExternalContactMessageTool(ctx context.Context) (tool.BaseTool, error)",
            "lineNumber": 156
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 157
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 158
          },
          {
            "text": "- 工具名：&#96;send_wecom_external_contact_message&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 159
          },
          {
            "text": "- 描述：通过企业微信客户联系，由指定员工向**单个**已添加该员工的客户发送文字消息",
            "lineNumber": 160
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 161
          },
          {
            "text": "**工具二：群发**",
            "lineNumber": 162
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 163
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go",
            "lineNumber": 164
          },
          {
            "text": "func NewWeComExternalContactBroadcastTool(ctx context.Context) (tool.BaseTool, error)",
            "lineNumber": 165
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 166
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 167
          },
          {
            "text": "- 工具名：&#96;send_wecom_external_contact_broadcast&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 168
          },
          {
            "text": "- 描述：通过企业微信客户联系，由指定员工向**多个**已添加该员工的客户群发文字消息",
            "lineNumber": 169
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 170
          },
          {
            "text": "### 5. 可选能力",
            "lineNumber": 171
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 172
          },
          {
            "text": "- 获取员工客户列表：&#96;GET /cgi-bin/externalcontact/list?userid=xxx&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 173
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 174
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 175
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 176
          },
          {
            "text": "## 五、实现注意事项",
            "lineNumber": 177
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 178
          },
          {
            "text": "1. **go-workwx 支持**：需确认 whyiyhw/go-workwx 或 xen0n/go-workwx 是否封装 &#96;externalcontact&#96;；若无，需手写 HTTP 请求。",
            "lineNumber": 179
          },
          {
            "text": "2. **限制**：同一成员对同一客户每日群发上限 1 条，需做限频或提示。",
            "lineNumber": 180
          },
          {
            "text": "3. **external_userid 获取**：调用方需已有 external_userid；可考虑增加「获取员工客户列表」工具供上游使用。",
            "lineNumber": 181
          },
          {
            "text": "4. **权限**：成员需开通客户联系，且客户需已添加该成员。",
            "lineNumber": 182
          },
          {
            "text": "5. **两工具共用**：单独发送与群发共用 &#96;add_msg_template&#96;，仅 external_userid 数量不同。",
            "lineNumber": 183
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 184
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 185
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 186
          },
          {
            "text": "## 六、建议实施顺序",
            "lineNumber": 187
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 188
          },
          {
            "text": "1. 配置 &#96;ExternalContactSecret&#96; 与相关结构体",
            "lineNumber": 189
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.449108362197876
    },
    {

          {

          },
          {
            "text": "// NewWeComMessageTool 创建企业微信文字消息发送工具",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {

          {

          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 17

          {
            "lineNumber": 21
          },

            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\"通过企业微信应用消息发送文字给指定的企业成员。user_id 为企业成员 ID，由 DigFlow 等调用方从会话上下文传入。支持超过 850 字时自动分条发送。\",",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {

          {

            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\treturn nil, err",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t},",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "\t)",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "// NewWeComImageTool 创建企业微信图片消息发送工具",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },

            "text": "func NewWeComImageTool(ctx context.Context) (tool.BaseTool, error) {",
            "lineNumber": 36

          {

          {
            "text": "\tif cfg.WeCom.Enabled == nil || !*cfg.WeCom.Enabled {",
            "lineNumber": 38

          {

            "lineNumber": 360
          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 368
          },
          {

          },

          },

            "lineNumber": 372
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 373
          },

          },

            "lineNumber": 383

            "lineNumber": 384
          },

          },
          {

          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/wx/wecom_message.go",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 199,
            "column": 48
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 257,
            "column": 20
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "func getWeComApp(agentID int64) (*workwx.WorkwxApp, error) {",
            "lineNumber": 201
          },
          {
            "text": "\tcfg := config.Get()",
            "lineNumber": 202
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif cfg.WeCom.CorpID == \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 203
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"WeCom CorpID not configured\")",
            "lineNumber": 204
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 205
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif len(cfg.WeCom.Applications) == 0 {",
            "lineNumber": 206
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"WeCom Applications not configured\")",
            "lineNumber": 207
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 208
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 209
          },
          {
            "text": "\tvar corpSecret string",
            "lineNumber": 210
          },
          {
            "text": "\tvar targetAgentID int64",
            "lineNumber": 211
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif agentID != 0 {",
            "lineNumber": 212
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tfor _, app := range cfg.WeCom.Applications {",
            "lineNumber": 213
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tif app.AgentID == agentID {",
            "lineNumber": 214
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\tcorpSecret = app.AgentSecret",
            "lineNumber": 215
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\ttargetAgentID = app.AgentID",
            "lineNumber": 216
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\tbreak",
            "lineNumber": 217
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 218
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 219
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tif corpSecret == \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 220
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"WeCom application with AgentID %d not found\", agentID)",
            "lineNumber": 221
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 222
          },
          {
            "text": "\t} else {",
            "lineNumber": 223
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tapp := cfg.WeCom.Applications[0]",
            "lineNumber": 224
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tcorpSecret = app.AgentSecret",
            "lineNumber": 225
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\ttargetAgentID = app.AgentID",
            "lineNumber": 226
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 227
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 228
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif corpSecret == \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 229
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"WeCom AgentSecret not configured\")",
            "lineNumber": 230
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 231
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 232
          },
          {
            "text": "\tvar wx *workwx.Workwx",
            "lineNumber": 233
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif cfg.WeCom.QYAPIHost != \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 234
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\twx = workwx.New(cfg.WeCom.CorpID, workwx.WithQYAPIHost(cfg.WeCom.QYAPIHost))",
            "lineNumber": 235
          },
          {
            "text": "\t} else {",
            "lineNumber": 236
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\twx = workwx.New(cfg.WeCom.CorpID)",
            "lineNumber": 237
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 238
          },
          {
            "text": "\treturn wx.WithApp(corpSecret, targetAgentID), nil",
            "lineNumber": 239
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 240
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 241
          },
          {
            "text": "// splitMsg 按字符数切割消息（支持多字节字符）",
            "lineNumber": 242
          },
          {
            "text": "func splitMsg(s string, maxLen int) []string {",
            "lineNumber": 243
          },
          {
            "text": "\tvar result []string",
            "lineNumber": 244
          },
          {
            "text": "\trunes := []rune(s)",
            "lineNumber": 245
          },
          {
            "text": "\tfor len(runes) &gt; maxLen {",
            "lineNumber": 246
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tresult = append(result, string(runes[:maxLen]))",
            "lineNumber": 247
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\trunes = runes[maxLen:]",
            "lineNumber": 248
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 249
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif len(runes) &gt; 0 {",
            "lineNumber": 250
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tresult = append(result, string(runes))",
            "lineNumber": 251
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 252
          },
          {
            "text": "\treturn result",
            "lineNumber": 253
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 254
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 255
          },
          {
            "text": "// SendWeComMessage 发送企业微信文字消息",
            "lineNumber": 256
          },
          {
            "text": "func SendWeComMessage(ctx context.Context, req SendWeComMessageRequest) (SendWeComMessageResponse, error) {",
            "lineNumber": 257
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif req.UserID == \"\"",
            "lineNumber": 258
          }
        ]
      },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/wx/wx_message.go",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 170,

          },
          "endPosition": {

        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "func sendImageMessageToUser(ctx context.Context, accessToken, openid, mediaID string) error {",
            "lineNumber": 172
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif openid == \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 173
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"openid is required\")",
            "lineNumber": 174
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 175
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif mediaID == \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 176
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"media_id is required\")",
            "lineNumber": 177
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 178
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 179
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 微信客服消息接口",
            "lineNumber": 180
          },
          {
            "text": "\turl := fmt.Sprintf(\"https://api.weixin.qq.com/cgi-bin/message/custom/send?access_token=%s\", accessToken)",
            "lineNumber": 181
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 182
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 构建请求体",
            "lineNumber": 183
          },
          {
            "text": "\trequestBody := map[string]interface{}{",
            "lineNumber": 184
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\"touser\":  openid,",
            "lineNumber": 185
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\"msgtype\": \"image\",",
            "lineNumber": 186
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\"image\": map[string]string{",
            "lineNumber": 187
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\"media_id\": mediaID,",
            "lineNumber": 188
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t},",
            "lineNumber": 189
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 190
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 191
          },
          {
            "text": "\treturn sendMessageRequest(ctx, url, requestBody, openid)",
            "lineNumber": 192
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 193
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 194
          },
          {
            "text": "// SendWeChatMiniProgramPage 发送微信小程序卡片消息",
            "lineNumber": 195
          },
          {
            "text": "func SendWeChatMiniProgramPage(ctx context.Context, req SendWeChatMiniProgramPageRequest) (SendWeChatMiniProgramPageResponse, error) {",
            "lineNumber": 196
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 1. 验证请求参数",
            "lineNumber": 197
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif req.Title == \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 198
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn SendWeChatMiniProgramPageResponse{}, fmt.Errorf(\"title is required\")",
            "lineNumber": 199
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 200
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 201
          },
          {
            "text": "\tcfg := config.Get()",
            "lineNumber": 202
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 203
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 2. 确定小程序配置",
            "lineNumber": 204
          },
          {
            "text": "\tappID := req.AppID",
            "lineNumber": 205
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif appID == \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 206
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tappID = cfg.WeChat.MiniProgram.AppID",
            "lineNumber": 207
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tif appID == \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 208
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\treturn SendWeChatMiniProgramPageResponse{}, fmt.Errorf(\"appid is required (either in request or config)\")",
            "lineNumber": 209
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 210
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 211
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 212
          },
          {
            "text": "\tpagePath := req.PagePath",
            "lineNumber": 213
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif pagePath == \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 214
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tpagePath = cfg.WeChat.MiniProgram.DefaultPath",
            "lineNumber": 215
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tif pagePath == \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 216
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\treturn SendWeChatMiniProgramPageResponse{}, fmt.Errorf(\"pagepath is required (either in request or config)\")",
            "lineNumber": 217
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 218
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 219
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 220
          },
          {
            "text": "\tthumbMediaID := req.ThumbMediaID",
            "lineNumber": 221
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif thumbMediaID == \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 222
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tthumbMediaID = cfg.WeChat.MiniProgram.ThumbMediaID",
            "lineNumber": 223
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tif thumbMediaID == \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 224
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\treturn SendWeChatMiniProgramPageResponse{}, fmt.Errorf(\"thumb_media_id is required (either in request or config)\")",
            "lineNumber": 225
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 226
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 227
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 228
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 3. 确定接收者列表",
            "lineNumber": 229
          },
          {
            "text": "\tvar openids []string",
            "lineNumber": 230
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif req.OpenID != \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 231
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t// 指定了单个 openid",
            "lineNumber": 232
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.4414931535720825
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/wx/wx_message.go",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 104,
            "column": 50
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 174,
            "column": 2
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "func SendWeChatImageMessage(ctx context.Context, req SendWeChatImageMessageRequest) (SendWeChatImageMessageResponse, error) {",
            "lineNumber": 106
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 1. 验证请求参数",
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif req.MediaID == \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn SendWeChatImageMessageResponse{}, fmt.Errorf(\"media_id is required\")",
            "lineNumber": 109
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 110
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "text": "\tcfg := config.Get()",
            "lineNumber": 112
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 2. 确定接收者列表",
            "lineNumber": 114
          },
          {
            "text": "\tvar openids []string",
            "lineNumber": 115
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif req.OpenID != \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 116
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t// 指定了单个 openid",
            "lineNumber": 117
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\topenids = []string{req.OpenID}",
            "lineNumber": 118
          },
          {
            "text": "\t} else {",
            "lineNumber": 119
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t// 从配置中读取 openid 列表",
            "lineNumber": 120
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\topenids = cfg.WeChat.OpenIDs",
            "lineNumber": 121
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tif len(openids) == 0 {",
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\treturn SendWeChatImageMessageResponse{}, fmt.Errorf(\"no openid specified and no openids configured\")",
            "lineNumber": 123
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 124
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 3. 获取 AccessToken（优先使用请求中传入的）",
            "lineNumber": 127
          },
          {
            "text": "\taccessToken := req.AccessToken",
            "lineNumber": 128
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif accessToken == \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 129
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tvar err error",
            "lineNumber": 130
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\taccessToken, err = GetAccessToken(ctx)",
            "lineNumber": 131
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 132
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\treturn SendWeChatImageMessageResponse{}, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to get access token: %w\", err)",
            "lineNumber": 133
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 134
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 135
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 4. 逐个发送消息",
            "lineNumber": 137
          },
          {
            "text": "\tvar sentTo []string",
            "lineNumber": 138
          },
          {
            "text": "\tvar failedTo []FailedMessage",
            "lineNumber": 139
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140
          },
          {
            "text": "\tfor _, openid := range openids {",
            "lineNumber": 141
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\terr := sendImageMessageToUser(ctx, accessToken, openid, req.MediaID)",
            "lineNumber": 142
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 143
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tfailedTo = append(failedTo, FailedMessage{",
            "lineNumber": 144
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\tOpenID: openid,",
            "lineNumber": 145
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\tReason: err.Error(),",
            "lineNumber": 146
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t})",
            "lineNumber": 147
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t} else {",
            "lineNumber": 148
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tsentTo = append(sentTo, openid)",
            "lineNumber": 149
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 150
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 151
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 152
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 5. 构建响应",
            "lineNumber": 153
          },
          {
            "text": "\tresponse := SendWeChatImageMessageResponse{",
            "lineNumber": 154
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tSuccess:  len(failedTo) == 0,",
            "lineNumber": 155
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tSentTo:   sentTo,",
            "lineNumber": 156
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tFailedTo: failedTo,",
            "lineNumber": 157
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 158
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 159
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif len(sentTo) &gt; 0 &amp;&amp; len(failedTo) == 0 {",
            "lineNumber": 160
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tresponse.Message = fmt.Sprintf(\"成功发送图片消息给 %d 个用户\", len(sentTo))",
            "lineNumber": 161
          },
          {
            "text": "\t} else if len(sentTo) &gt; 0 &amp;&amp; len(failedTo) &gt; 0 {",
            "lineNumber": 162
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tresponse.Message = fmt.Sprintf(\"部分成功：成功发送给 %d 个用户，失败 %d 个\", len(sentTo), len(failedTo))",
            "lineNumber": 163
          },
          {
            "text": "\t} else {",
            "lineNumber": 164
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tresponse.Message = fmt.Sprintf(\"发送失败：所有 %d 个用户都发送失败\", len(failedTo))",
            "lineNumber": 165
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 166
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 167
          },
          {
            "text": "\treturn response, nil",
            "lineNumber": 168
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 169
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 170
          },
          {
            "text": "// sendImageMessageToUser 向单个用户发送图片消息",
            "lineNumber": 171
          },
          {
            "text": "func sendImageMessageToUser(ctx context.Context, accessToken, openid, mediaID string) error {",
            "lineNumber": 172
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif openid == \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 173
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"openid is required\")",
            "lineNumber": 174
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 175
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.43874019384384155
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/updates/2026-02-10_access_token_third_party.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 60
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "# 更新：access_token 支持第三方传入",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "**日期**: 2026-02-10",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "**类别**: 功能增强 / 工具",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": "## 概述",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "公众号（OA）和企业微信（WeCom）的发送工具现已支持通过请求参数传入 &#96;access_token&#96;。当调用方已有自己的 token 管理（如 chatgpt-wechat、DigFlow 等）时，可直接传入 token，无需 DigEino 内部获取，便于统一 token 策略、避免多端重复获取。",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "## 新功能",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "### 请求参数新增 &#96;access_token&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "所有发送接口的请求体中均新增可选字段 &#96;access_token&#96;：",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "- **公众号**：&#96;SendWeChatTextMessageRequest&#96;、&#96;SendWeChatImageMessageRequest&#96;、&#96;SendWeChatMiniProgramPageRequest&#96;、&#96;SendWeChatLinkMessageRequest&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "- **企业微信**：&#96;SendWeComMessageRequest&#96;、&#96;SendWeComImageMessageRequest&#96;、&#96;SendWeComTextCardRequest&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "**优先级**：若请求中提供了 &#96;access_token&#96;，则优先使用；否则仍由 DigEino 内部自动获取（公众号从缓存/API，企业微信由 go-workwx 管理）。",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "## 修改的组件",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "### 更新的文件",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;tools/wx/wx_types.go&#96;：各 Request 类型新增 &#96;AccessToken string&#96; 字段",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;tools/wx/wx_message.go&#96;：公众号发送逻辑中，优先使用 &#96;req.AccessToken&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;tools/wx/wecom_message.go&#96;：企业微信发送逻辑中，若传入 token 则直接调 API，否则使用 go-workwx",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "### 新增类型",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;WeComMessageAPIResponse&#96;：企业微信发送消息 API 的响应结构",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "## 使用示例",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "### 公众号",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "req := wx.SendWeChatTextMessageRequest{",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "    OpenID:      \"user_openid\",",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "    Content:     \"消息内容\",",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "    AccessToken: \"第三方获取的 token\",  // 可选",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "resp, err := wx.SendWeChatTextMessage(ctx, req)",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "### 企业微信",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "req := wx.SendWeComMessageRequest{",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "    UserID:      \"ZhangSan\",",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "    Content:     \"消息内容\",",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "    AccessToken: \"第三方获取的 token\",  // 可选",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "resp, err := wx.SendWeComMessage(ctx, req)",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "### Agent 工具调用（JSON）",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;json",
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "{",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "  \"user_id\": \"ZhangSan\",",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "  \"content\": \"任务已完成\",",
            "lineNumber": 60
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.435499906539917
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/wx/wx_message.go",
