        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "func sendMiniProgramPageMessageToUser(ctx context.Context, accessToken, openid, title, appID, pagePath, thumbMediaID string) error {",
            "lineNumber": 287
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif openid == \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 288
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"openid is required\")",
            "lineNumber": 289
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 290
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif title == \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 291
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"title is required\")",
            "lineNumber": 292
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 293
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif appID == \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 294
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"appid is required\")",
            "lineNumber": 295
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 296
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif pagePath == \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 297
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"pagepath is required\")",
            "lineNumber": 298
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 299
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif thumbMediaID == \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 300
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"thumb_media_id is required\")",
            "lineNumber": 301
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 302
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 303
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 微信客服消息接口",
            "lineNumber": 304
          },
          {
            "text": "\turl := fmt.Sprintf(\"https://api.weixin.qq.com/cgi-bin/message/custom/send?access_token=%s\", accessToken)",
            "lineNumber": 305
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 306
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 构建请求体",
            "lineNumber": 307
          },
          {
            "text": "\trequestBody := map[string]interface{}{",
            "lineNumber": 308
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\"touser\":  openid,",
            "lineNumber": 309
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\"msgtype\": \"miniprogrampage\",",
            "lineNumber": 310
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\"miniprogrampage\": map[string]string{",
            "lineNumber": 311
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\"title\":         title,",
            "lineNumber": 312
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\"appid\":         appID,",
            "lineNumber": 313
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\"pagepath\":      pagePath,",
            "lineNumber": 314
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\"thumb_media_id\": thumbMediaID,",
            "lineNumber": 315
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t},",
            "lineNumber": 316
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 317
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 318
          },
          {
            "text": "\treturn sendMessageRequest(ctx, url, requestBody, openid)",
            "lineNumber": 319
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 320
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 321
          },
          {
            "text": "// SendWeChatLinkMessage 发送微信图文链接消息",

          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 323
          },
          {

          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/wx/wecom_tool.go",

        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "func NewWeComTextCardTool(ctx context.Context) (tool.BaseTool, error) {",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "\tcfg := config.Get()",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif cfg.WeCom.Enabled == nil || !*cfg.WeCom.Enabled {",
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"WeCom tool is not enabled in config\")",
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif cfg.WeCom.CorpID == \"\" || len(cfg.WeCom.Applications) == 0 {",
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"WeCom CorpID or Applications not configured\")",
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "text": "\treturn utils.InferTool(",
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\"send_wecom_text_card\",",
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\"通过企业微信应用消息发送文本卡片给指定的企业成员。文本卡片包含标题、描述和可点击的链接，适合通知类场景。\",",
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tfunc(ctx context.Context, req *SendWeComTextCardRequest) (*SendWeComTextCardResponse, error) {",
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tresp, err := SendWeComTextCard(ctx, *req)",
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\treturn nil, err",
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\treturn &amp;resp, nil",
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t},",
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "text": "\t)",
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "text": "// NewWeComCustomerMessageTool 创建企业微信客服消息发送工具（发给个人微信用户）",
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "text": "func NewWeComCustomerMessageTool(ctx context.Context) (tool.BaseTool, error) {",
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif cfg.WeCom.CorpID == \"\" || len(cfg.WeCom.Applications) == 0 {",
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"WeCom CorpID or Applications not configured\")",
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "text": "\treturn utils.InferTool(",
            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\"send_wecom_customer_message\",",
            "lineNumber": 92
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\"通过企业微信客服消息发送文字给个人微信用户。需使用 open_kf_id（客服账号ID）和 customer_id（外部联系人ID）。用户需先通过扫码/链接添加企业为客服后才能收到消息。支持超过 850 字时自动分条发送。\",",
            "lineNumber": 93
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tfunc(ctx context.Context, req *SendWeComCustomerMessageRequest) (*SendWeComCustomerMessageResponse, error) {",
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tresp, err := SendWeComCustomerMessage(ctx, *req)",
            "lineNumber": 95
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 97
          },
          {

          },

          },
          {
            "text": "\t)",
            "lineNumber": 101
          },
          {
            "text": "}",

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103
          },
          {
            "text": "// NewWeComCustomerImageTool 创建企业微信客服图片消息发送工具（发给个人微信用户）",

          },
          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/tools_info.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 26
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 73
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "**web_search 引擎选择**：",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "| 引擎 | 特点 | 配置 |",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "|------|------|------|",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "| Bocha | 国内服务，中文友好 | &#96;Tools.WebSearch.Bocha.ApiKey&#96; |",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "| Firecrawl | 与 scrape 共用 ApiKey | &#96;Tools.Firecrawl.ApiKey&#96; |",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "| **Tavily** | 面向 AI、低延迟、英文/国际搜索 | &#96;Tools.WebSearch.Tavily.ApiKey&#96; 或 &#96;TAVILY_API_KEY&#96; |",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "| SerpApi/Google | 依赖第三方 API | 各自 ApiKey |",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "## 2. 智能 UI/UX 设计 (UI/UX Design)",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "基于 AI 的设计知识库检索与设计系统自动生成工具。",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "| 工具名称 | 功能描述 | 主要参数 |",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "| :--- | :--- | :--- |",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "| &#96;ui_ux_search&#96; | 检索 UI/UX 知识库（样式、配色、字体、交互、落地页模式等）。 | &#96;query&#96;: 检索词; &#96;stack&#96;: 技术栈(如 tailwind) |",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "| &#96;generate_design_system&#96; | 为特定产品需求生成完整的 UI/UX 设计系统。 | &#96;query&#96;: 需求描述; &#96;project_name&#96;: 项目名 |",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "| &#96;persist_design_system&#96; | 将生成的设计系统持久化为 &#96;MASTER.md&#96; 及页面覆盖文件。 | &#96;project_name&#96;: 项目名; &#96;page_name&#96;: 页面名 |",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "## 3. 社交推送与通知 (Messaging &amp; Push)",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "支持 WeChat 公众号及 WeCom（企业微信）的多种消息类型推送。",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "### 3.1 企业微信 (WeCom)",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": "| 工具名称 | 功能描述 | 主要参数 |",
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "| :--- | :--- | :--- |",
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "| &#96;send_wecom_message&#96; | 发送企业微信应用消息（文字）。 | &#96;user_id&#96;: 成员ID; &#96;content&#96;: 文本内容 |",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "| &#96;send_wecom_image&#96; | 发送图片消息。 | &#96;user_id&#96;: 成员ID; &#96;media_id&#96;: 临时素材ID |",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "| &#96;send_wecom_text_card&#96; | 发送文本卡片（带链接和描述）。 | &#96;user_id&#96;: 成员ID; &#96;title&#96;: 标题; &#96;url&#96;: 链接 |",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "text": "| &#96;send_wecom_customer_message&#96; | **客服消息**。发送给添加了客服的个人微信用户。 | &#96;customer_id&#96;: 外部ID; &#96;content&#96;: 文本内容 |",
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "text": "### 3.2 个人微信 (WeChat)",
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "text": "| 工具名称 | 功能描述 | 主要参数 |",
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "| :--- | :--- | :--- |",
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "text": "| &#96;send_wechat_message&#96; | 通过微信服务号推送文字消息给关注用户。 | &#96;openid&#96;: 用户识别码; &#96;content&#96;: 文本内容 |",
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "text": "## 4. 如何在 Go 项目中集成 (Integration Guide)",
            "lineNumber": 72
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.4310455024242401
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/wx/wx_message.go",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 229,
            "column": 21
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 289,
            "column": 2
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "\tif req.OpenID != \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 231
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t// 指定了单个 openid",
            "lineNumber": 232
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\topenids = []string{req.OpenID}",
            "lineNumber": 233
          },
          {
            "text": "\t} else {",
            "lineNumber": 234
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t// 从配置中读取 openid 列表",
            "lineNumber": 235
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\topenids = cfg.WeChat.OpenIDs",
            "lineNumber": 236
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tif len(openids) == 0 {",
            "lineNumber": 237
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\treturn SendWeChatMiniProgramPageResponse{}, fmt.Errorf(\"no openid specified and no openids configured\")",
            "lineNumber": 238
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 239
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 240
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 241
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 4. 获取 AccessToken（优先使用请求中传入的）",
            "lineNumber": 242
          },
          {
            "text": "\taccessToken := req.AccessToken",
            "lineNumber": 243
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif accessToken == \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 244
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tvar err error",
            "lineNumber": 245
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\taccessToken, err = GetAccessToken(ctx)",
            "lineNumber": 246
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 247
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\treturn SendWeChatMiniProgramPageResponse{}, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to get access token: %w\", err)",
            "lineNumber": 248
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 249
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 250
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 251
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 5. 逐个发送消息",
            "lineNumber": 252
          },
          {
            "text": "\tvar sentTo []string",
            "lineNumber": 253
          },
          {
            "text": "\tvar failedTo []FailedMessage",
            "lineNumber": 254
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 255
          },
          {
            "text": "\tfor _, openid := range openids {",
            "lineNumber": 256
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\terr := sendMiniProgramPageMessageToUser(ctx, accessToken, openid, req.Title, appID, pagePath, thumbMediaID)",
            "lineNumber": 257
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 258
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tfailedTo = append(failedTo, FailedMessage{",
            "lineNumber": 259
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\tOpenID: openid,",
            "lineNumber": 260
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\tReason: err.Error(),",
            "lineNumber": 261
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t})",
            "lineNumber": 262
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t} else {",
            "lineNumber": 263
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tsentTo = append(sentTo, openid)",
            "lineNumber": 264
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 265
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 266
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 267
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 6. 构建响应",
            "lineNumber": 268
          },
          {
            "text": "\tresponse := SendWeChatMiniProgramPageResponse{",
            "lineNumber": 269
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tSuccess:  len(failedTo) == 0,",
            "lineNumber": 270
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tSentTo:   sentTo,",
            "lineNumber": 271
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tFailedTo: failedTo,",
            "lineNumber": 272
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 273
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 274
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif len(sentTo) &gt; 0 &amp;&amp; len(failedTo) == 0 {",
            "lineNumber": 275
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tresponse.Message = fmt.Sprintf(\"成功发送小程序卡片消息给 %d 个用户\", len(sentTo))",
            "lineNumber": 276
          },
          {
            "text": "\t} else if len(sentTo) &gt; 0 &amp;&amp; len(failedTo) &gt; 0 {",
            "lineNumber": 277
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tresponse.Message = fmt.Sprintf(\"部分成功：成功发送给 %d 个用户，失败 %d 个\", len(sentTo), len(failedTo))",
            "lineNumber": 278
          },
          {
            "text": "\t} else {",
            "lineNumber": 279
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tresponse.Message = fmt.Sprintf(\"发送失败：所有 %d 个用户都发送失败\", len(failedTo))",
            "lineNumber": 280
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 281
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 282
          },
          {
            "text": "\treturn response, nil",
            "lineNumber": 283
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 284
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 285
          },
          {
            "text": "// sendMiniProgramPageMessageToUser 向单个用户发送小程序卡片消息",
            "lineNumber": 286
          },
          {
            "text": "func sendMiniProgramPageMessageToUser(ctx context.Context, accessToken, openid, title, appID, pagePath, thumbMediaID string) error {",
            "lineNumber": 287
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif openid == \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 288
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"openid is required\")",
            "lineNumber": 289
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 290
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.42924386262893677
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/wx/wecom_message.go",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 444,
            "column": 37
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 493,
            "column": 92
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "\t\tOpenKfID: req.OpenKfID,",
            "lineNumber": 446
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 447
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 448
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif utf8.RuneCountInString(req.Content) &gt; maxTextLength {",
            "lineNumber": 449
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tparts := splitMsg(req.Content, maxTextLength)",
            "lineNumber": 450
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tfor _, part := range parts {",
            "lineNumber": 451
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tif err := app.SendTextMessage(recipient, part, false); err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 452
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\treturn SendWeComCustomerMessageResponse{Success: false, Message: fmt.Sprintf(\"发送失败: %v\", err)}, err",
            "lineNumber": 453
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 454
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 455
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn SendWeComCustomerMessageResponse{Success: true, Message: fmt.Sprintf(\"成功发送 %d 条消息\", len(parts))}, nil",
            "lineNumber": 456
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 457
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 458
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err := app.SendTextMessage(recipient, req.Content, false); err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 459
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn SendWeComCustomerMessageResponse{Success: false, Message: fmt.Sprintf(\"发送失败: %v\", err)}, err",
            "lineNumber": 460
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 461
          },
          {
            "text": "\treturn SendWeComCustomerMessageResponse{Success: true, Message: \"客服消息发送成功\"}, nil",
            "lineNumber": 462
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 463
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 464
          },
          {
            "text": "// SendWeComCustomerImage 发送企业微信客服图片消息（发给个人微信用户）",
            "lineNumber": 465

          },
          {
            "text": "    ctx := context.Background()",
            "lineNumber": 213
          },
          {
            "text": "    ",
            "lineNumber": 214
          },
          {
            "text": "    // 获取 DigEino 的所有基础工具",
            "lineNumber": 215
          },
          {
            "text": "    baseTools, err := digeinoTools.BaseTools(ctx)",
            "lineNumber": 216
          },
          {
            "text": "    if err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 217
          },
          {
            "text": "        logger.Error(\"获取 DigEino 基础工具失败\", zap.Error(err))",
            "lineNumber": 218
          },
          {
            "text": "        return",
            "lineNumber": 219
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 220
          },
          {
            "text": "    ",
            "lineNumber": 221
          },
          {
            "text": "    // 批量注册工具",
            "lineNumber": 222
          },
          {
            "text": "    for _, tool := range baseTools {",
            "lineNumber": 223
          },
          {
            "text": "        info, err := tool.Info(ctx)",
            "lineNumber": 224
          },
          {
            "text": "        if err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 225
          },
          {
            "text": "            logger.Warn(\"获取工具信息失败\", zap.Error(err))",
            "lineNumber": 226
          },
          {
            "text": "            continue",
            "lineNumber": 227
          },
          {
            "text": "        }",
            "lineNumber": 228
          },
          {
            "text": "        ",
            "lineNumber": 229
          },
          {
            "text": "        if err := variable.ToolRegistry.Register(info.Name, tool); err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 230
          },
          {
            "text": "            logger.Warn(\"工具已存在\", zap.String(\"name\", info.Name))",
            "lineNumber": 231
          },
          {
            "text": "        } else {",
            "lineNumber": 232
          },
          {
            "text": "            logger.Info(\"工具注册成功\", zap.String(\"name\", info.Name))",
            "lineNumber": 233
          },
          {
            "text": "        }",
            "lineNumber": 234
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 235
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 236
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 237
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 238
          },
          {
            "text": "**注意**：这种方式会注册 DigEino 的所有基础工具，包括：",
            "lineNumber": 239
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;ui_ux_search&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 240
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;generate_design_system&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 241
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;persist_design_system&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 242
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;send_wechat_message&#96;（如果配置了微信）",
            "lineNumber": 243
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 244
          },
          {
            "text": "### 方式三：使用 UI/UX Agent 工具（推荐）⭐",
            "lineNumber": 245
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 246
          },
          {
            "text": "**这是最推荐的方式**，Agent 工具会自动完成整个设计系统生成工作流，包括需求分析、生成、补充搜索和持久化。",
            "lineNumber": 247
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 248
          },
          {
            "text": "#### 什么是 UI/UX Agent 工具？",
            "lineNumber": 249
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 250
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;generate_ui_design_system&#96; 是一个智能编排的 Agent 工具，它将整个设计系统生成工作流封装成一个工具。相比单独使用各个工具，Agent 工具的优势是：",
            "lineNumber": 251
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 252
          },
          {
            "text": "- ✅ **自动工作流编排**：自动完成需求分析、生成、搜索、持久化",
            "lineNumber": 253
          },
          {
            "text": "- ✅ **智能决策**：根据用户需求自动决定调用哪些工具",
            "lineNumber": 254
          },
          {
            "text": "- ✅ **完整输出**：一次性返回完整的设计系统",
            "lineNumber": 255
          },
          {
            "text": "- ✅ **简单易用**：只需一个工具调用，无需手动编排",
            "lineNumber": 256
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 257
          },
          {
            "text": "#### 步骤 1：在 agent.yml 中配置模型",
            "lineNumber": 258
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 259
          },
          {
            "text": "在你的应用配置 &#96;app/your_app/config/agent.yml&#96; 中确保有模型配置：",
            "lineNumber": 260
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 261
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml",
            "lineNumber": 262
          },
          {
            "text": "Models:",
            "lineNumber": 263
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Name: \"ui_model\"  # 模型名称，用于 Agent（必须与代码中的名称一致）",
            "lineNumber": 264
          },
          {
            "text": "    ",
            "lineNumber": 265
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.43315258622169495

      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/ideas/digflow_ui_ux_integration.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},

        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "# 在 DigFlow 中使用 DigEino UI/UX 工具",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "本指南说明如何在 DigFlow 项目中使用 DigEino 的 UI/UX 工具。",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "## 目录",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "- [前置条件](#前置条件)",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "- [快速开始](#快速开始)",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "- [使用方式](#使用方式)",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "  - [方式一：单独注册工具](#方式一单独注册工具)",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "  - [方式二：批量注册所有工具](#方式二批量注册所有工具)",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "  - [方式三：使用 UI/UX Agent 工具（推荐）](#方式三使用-uiux-agent-工具推荐)",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "- [Agent 工具详解](#agent-工具详解)",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "- [配置说明](#配置说明)",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "- [使用示例](#使用示例)",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "- [故障排查](#故障排查)",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "- [参考](#参考)",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "## 前置条件",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "1. **DigFlow 项目已存在**：确保你已经有一个 DigFlow 项目",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "2. **DigEino 依赖已添加**：DigFlow 的 &#96;go.mod&#96; 中应该已经包含 DigEino 依赖",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "require (",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "    github.com/originaleric/digeino v1.0.2  // 或更新版本",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": ")",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "## 快速开始",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "### 最简单的使用方式",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "**1. 添加依赖**（如果还没有）",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "go get github.com/originaleric/digeino",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "**2. 注册工具**",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "在你的 DigFlow 应用的 &#96;app/your_app/tools/tool_register.go&#96; 中：",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "package tools",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "import (",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"context\"",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"DigFlow/internal/global/variable\"",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/ui_ux\"",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": ")",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "func init() {",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "    ctx := context.Background()",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "    ",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": "    // 注册 UI/UX 搜索工具",
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "    tool, _ := ui_ux.NewUIUXSearchTool(ctx)",
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "    variable.ToolRegistry.Register(\"ui_ux_search\", tool)",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "text": "**3. 在 Agent 中使用**",
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "text": "在你的 Agent 配置 &#96;app/your_app/config/agent.yml&#96; 中：",
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml",
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "Tools:",
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Name: \"ui_ux_search\"",
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "text": "    Description: \"检索 UI/UX 设计知识库\"",
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "text": "Nodes:",
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Key: \"designer\"",
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "text": "    Type: \"chat_model\"",
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "text": "    BindTools:",
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "text": "      - \"ui_ux_search\"",
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "text": "## 使用方式",
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "text": "### 方式一：单独注册工具",
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "text": "适合只需要特定工具的场景。",
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "text": "#### 步骤 1：创建或编辑工具注册文件",
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "text": "在你的 DigFlow 应用中创建 &#96;app/your_app/tools/tool_register.go&#96;：",
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go",
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "text": "package tools",
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "text": "import (",
            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"context\"",
            "lineNumber": 92
          },
          {
            "text": "    ",
            "lineNumber": 93
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.42545440793037415
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/tools_info.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 66
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 129
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "text": "## 4. 如何在 Go 项目中集成 (Integration Guide)",
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;DigEino&#96; 的工具集是基于 [CloudWeGo Eino](https://github.com/cloudwego/eino) 框架开发的标准 &#96;tool.BaseTool&#96;。这意味着它们可以被集成到任何使用 Eino 框架的 Go 应用中。",
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "text": "### 4.1 引入依赖",
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "text": "首先，在您的项目中安装 &#96;DigEino&#96;：",
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash",
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "text": "go get github.com/originaleric/digeino",
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "text": "### 4.2 初始化配置",
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;DigEino&#96; 工具依赖于一个全局配置单例。在使用工具前，您需要初始化配置（支持从 YAML 加载或环境变量覆盖）：",
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go",
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "text": "import \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\"",
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "text": "func main() {",
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "text": "    // 方式 A：从 YAML 文件加载",
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "text": "    cfg, _ := config.LoadConfig(\"path/to/your/config.yaml\")",
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "text": "    ",
            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {
            "text": "    // 方式 B：手动设置关键参数（如从环境变量读取）",
            "lineNumber": 92
          },
          {
            "text": "    cfg := config.Get()",
            "lineNumber": 93
          },
          {
            "text": "    cfg.Tools.WebSearch.Engine = \"tavily\"",
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "text": "    cfg.Tools.WebSearch.Tavily.ApiKey = os.Getenv(\"TAVILY_API_KEY\")",
            "lineNumber": 95
          },
          {
            "text": "    // 或使用 Google: cfg.Tools.WebSearch.Google.ApiKey = \"...\"",
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {
            "text": "    cfg.Tools.Pinecone.ApiKey = os.Getenv(\"PINECONE_KEY\")",
            "lineNumber": 97
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 98
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 99
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "text": "### 4.3 获取并使用工具",
            "lineNumber": 101
          },
          {
            "text": "您可以一次性获取全量工具，或者仅引入特定工具：",
            "lineNumber": 102
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go",
            "lineNumber": 104
          },
          {
            "text": "import (",
            "lineNumber": 105
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools\"",
            "lineNumber": 106
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/research\"",
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "text": ")",
            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109
          },
          {
            "text": "func useTools(ctx context.Context) {",
            "lineNumber": 110
          },
          {
            "text": "    // 1. 获取所有通过 BaseTools 注册的工具",
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "text": "    allTools, _ := tools.BaseTools(ctx)",
            "lineNumber": 112
          },
          {
            "text": "    ",
            "lineNumber": 113
          },
          {
            "text": "    // 2. 或者初始化特定工具",
            "lineNumber": 114
          },
          {
            "text": "    grepTool, _ := research.NewGrepSearchTool(ctx)",
            "lineNumber": 115
          },
          {
            "text": "    ",
            "lineNumber": 116
          },
          {
            "text": "    // 3. 在 Eino Agent (Graph) 中使用",
            "lineNumber": 117
          },
          {
            "text": "    // graph.AddChatModelNode(\"model\", model, compose.WithBindTools(allTools))",
            "lineNumber": 118
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 119
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 120
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121
          },
          {
            "text": "### 4.4 兼容性说明",
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "text": "所有的工具都返回标准的 &#96;tool.BaseTool&#96; 接口：",
            "lineNumber": 123
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Schema 定义**：自动根据 Go 结构体生成 JSON Schema，模型可直接理解。",
            "lineNumber": 124
          },
          {
            "text": "- **并发安全**：支持 context 控制和超时刻。",
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "text": "- **错误处理**：内部已进行安全封装，返回友好的错误提示供模型自我纠错。",
            "lineNumber": 126
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 128
          },
          {
            "text": "**本工具库旨在为 Golang 生态提供一套开箱即用的「大模型工具箱」，助力开发者快速构建具备调研、设计与推送能力的智能体。**",
            "lineNumber": 129
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.39599230885505676
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/ideas/digflow_ui_ux_integration.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 260
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 328
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml",
            "lineNumber": 262
          },
          {
            "text": "Models:",
            "lineNumber": 263
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Name: \"ui_model\"  # 模型名称，用于 Agent（必须与代码中的名称一致）",
            "lineNumber": 264
          },
          {
            "text": "    Type: \"qwen\"      # 或 \"openai\"",
            "lineNumber": 265
          },
          {
            "text": "    Config:",
            "lineNumber": 266
          },
          {
            "text": "      api_key: \"${QWEN_API_KEY}\"",
            "lineNumber": 267
          },
          {
            "text": "      model: \"qwen-max\"",
            "lineNumber": 268
          },
          {
            "text": "      base_url: \"https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1\"",
            "lineNumber": 269
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 270
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 271
          },
          {
            "text": "#### 步骤 2：注册 Agent 工具（使用 DigFlow 的模型）⭐ 推荐",
            "lineNumber": 272
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 273
          },
          {
            "text": "**推荐方式**：使用 DigFlow 的 ModelRegistry 获取 ChatModel",
            "lineNumber": 274
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 275
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go",
            "lineNumber": 276
          },
          {
            "text": "package tools",
            "lineNumber": 277
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 278
          },
          {
            "text": "import (",
            "lineNumber": 279
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"context\"",
            "lineNumber": 280
          },
          {
            "text": "    ",
            "lineNumber": 281
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"DigFlow/internal/global/variable\"",
            "lineNumber": 282
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"DigFlow/internal/utils/logger\"",
            "lineNumber": 283
          },
          {
            "text": "    ",
            "lineNumber": 284
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/ui_ux\"",
            "lineNumber": 285
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"go.uber.org/zap\"",
            "lineNumber": 286
          },
          {
            "text": ")",
            "lineNumber": 287
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 288
          },
          {
            "text": "func init() {",
            "lineNumber": 289
          },
          {
            "text": "    ctx := context.Background()",
            "lineNumber": 290
          },
          {
            "text": "    ",
            "lineNumber": 291
          },
          {
            "text": "    // 从 DigFlow 的 ModelRegistry 获取 ChatModel",
            "lineNumber": 292
          },
          {
            "text": "    // 注意：模型名称必须与 agent.yml 中配置的 Model Name 一致",
            "lineNumber": 293
          },
          {
            "text": "    chatModel, err := variable.ModelRegistry.GetChatModel(\"ui_model\")",
            "lineNumber": 294
          },
          {
            "text": "    if err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 295
          },
          {
            "text": "        logger.Error(\"获取 ChatModel 失败\", ",
            "lineNumber": 296
          },
          {
            "text": "            zap.String(\"model_name\", \"ui_model\"),",
            "lineNumber": 297
          },
          {
            "text": "            zap.Error(err))",
            "lineNumber": 298
          },
          {
            "text": "        return",
            "lineNumber": 299
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 300
          },
          {
            "text": "    ",
            "lineNumber": 301
          },
          {
            "text": "    // 创建 UI/UX Agent 工具",
            "lineNumber": 302
          },
          {
            "text": "    agentTool, err := ui_ux.NewUIDesignSystemAgentTool(ctx, chatModel)",
            "lineNumber": 303
          },
          {
            "text": "    if err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 304
          },
          {
            "text": "        logger.Error(\"创建 UI/UX Agent 工具失败\", zap.Error(err))",
            "lineNumber": 305
          },
          {
            "text": "        return",
            "lineNumber": 306
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 307
          },
          {
            "text": "    ",
            "lineNumber": 308
          },
          {
            "text": "    // 注册工具",
            "lineNumber": 309
          },
          {
            "text": "    if err := variable.ToolRegistry.Register(\"generate_ui_design_system\", agentTool); err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 310
          },
          {
            "text": "        logger.Warn(\"UI/UX Agent 工具已存在\", zap.String(\"name\", \"generate_ui_design_system\"))",
            "lineNumber": 311
          },
          {
            "text": "    } else {",
            "lineNumber": 312
          },
          {
            "text": "        logger.Info(\"UI/UX Agent 工具注册成功\", zap.String(\"name\", \"generate_ui_design_system\"))",
            "lineNumber": 313
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 314
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 315
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 316
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 317
          },
          {
            "text": "#### 步骤 3：在 agent.yml 中配置工具",
            "lineNumber": 318
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 319
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml",
            "lineNumber": 320
          },
          {
            "text": "Tools:",
            "lineNumber": 321
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Name: \"generate_ui_design_system\"",
            "lineNumber": 322
          },
          {
            "text": "    Description: \"生成完整的 UI/UX 设计系统（智能编排 Agent）\"",
            "lineNumber": 323
          },
          {
            "text": "    UseGlobal: false",
            "lineNumber": 324
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 325
          },
          {
            "text": "Nodes:",
            "lineNumber": 326
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Key: \"designer\"",
            "lineNumber": 327
          },
          {
            "text": "    Type: \"chat_model\"",
            "lineNumber": 328
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.39203453063964844
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/ideas/digflow_ui_ux_integration.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 87
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 150
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go",
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "text": "package tools",
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "text": "import (",
            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"context\"",
            "lineNumber": 92
          },
          {
            "text": "    ",
            "lineNumber": 93
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"DigFlow/internal/global/variable\"",
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"DigFlow/internal/utils/logger\"",
            "lineNumber": 95
          },
          {
            "text": "    ",
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/ui_ux\"",
            "lineNumber": 97
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"go.uber.org/zap\"",
            "lineNumber": 98
          },
          {
            "text": ")",
            "lineNumber": 99
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "text": "func init() {",
            "lineNumber": 101
          },
          {
            "text": "    ctx := context.Background()",
            "lineNumber": 102
          },
          {
            "text": "    ",
            "lineNumber": 103
          },
          {
            "text": "    // 注册 UI/UX 搜索工具",
            "lineNumber": 104
          },
          {
            "text": "    searchTool, err := ui_ux.NewUIUXSearchTool(ctx)",
            "lineNumber": 105
          },
          {
            "text": "    if err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 106
          },
          {
            "text": "        logger.Error(\"创建 UI/UX 搜索工具失败\", zap.Error(err))",
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "text": "        return",
            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 109
          },
          {
            "text": "    if err := variable.ToolRegistry.Register(\"ui_ux_search\", searchTool); err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 110
          },
          {
            "text": "        logger.Warn(\"UI/UX 搜索工具已存在\", zap.String(\"name\", \"ui_ux_search\"))",
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "text": "    } else {",
            "lineNumber": 112
          },
          {
            "text": "        logger.Info(\"UI/UX 搜索工具注册成功\", zap.String(\"name\", \"ui_ux_search\"))",
            "lineNumber": 113
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 114
          },
          {
            "text": "    ",
            "lineNumber": 115
          },
          {
            "text": "    // 注册设计系统生成工具",
            "lineNumber": 116
          },
          {
            "text": "    designSystemTool, err := ui_ux.NewGenerateDesignSystemTool(ctx)",
            "lineNumber": 117
          },
          {
            "text": "    if err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 118
          },
          {
            "text": "        logger.Error(\"创建设计系统生成工具失败\", zap.Error(err))",
            "lineNumber": 119
          },
          {
            "text": "        return",
            "lineNumber": 120
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 121
          },
          {
            "text": "    if err := variable.ToolRegistry.Register(\"generate_design_system\", designSystemTool); err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "text": "        logger.Warn(\"设计系统生成工具已存在\", zap.String(\"name\", \"generate_design_system\"))",
            "lineNumber": 123
          },
          {
            "text": "    } else {",
            "lineNumber": 124
          },
          {
            "text": "        logger.Info(\"设计系统生成工具注册成功\", zap.String(\"name\", \"generate_design_system\"))",
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 126
          },
          {
            "text": "    ",
            "lineNumber": 127
          },
          {
            "text": "    // 注册设计系统持久化工具",
            "lineNumber": 128
          },
          {
            "text": "    persistTool, err := ui_ux.NewPersistDesignSystemTool(ctx)",
            "lineNumber": 129
          },
          {
            "text": "    if err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 130
          },
          {
            "text": "        logger.Error(\"创建设计系统持久化工具失败\", zap.Error(err))",
            "lineNumber": 131
          },
          {
            "text": "        return",
            "lineNumber": 132
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 133
          },
          {
            "text": "    if err := variable.ToolRegistry.Register(\"persist_design_system\", persistTool); err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 134
          },
          {
            "text": "        logger.Warn(\"设计系统持久化工具已存在\", zap.String(\"name\", \"persist_design_system\"))",
            "lineNumber": 135
          },
          {
            "text": "    } else {",
            "lineNumber": 136
          },
          {
            "text": "        logger.Info(\"设计系统持久化工具注册成功\", zap.String(\"name\", \"persist_design_system\"))",
            "lineNumber": 137
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 138
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 139
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 140
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141
          },
          {
            "text": "#### 步骤 2：在 bootstrap 中导入工具包",
            "lineNumber": 142
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143
          },
          {
            "text": "在 &#96;bootstrap/your_app/init.go&#96; 中导入工具包：",
            "lineNumber": 144
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go",
            "lineNumber": 146
          },
          {
            "text": "package yourappbootstrap",
            "lineNumber": 147
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148
          },
          {
            "text": "import (",
            "lineNumber": 149
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"DigFlow/bootstrap/common\"",
            "lineNumber": 150
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.39117860794067383
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/ideas/digflow_ui_ux_integration.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 146
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 214
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "package yourappbootstrap",
            "lineNumber": 147
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148
          },
          {
            "text": "import (",
            "lineNumber": 149
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"DigFlow/bootstrap/common\"",
            "lineNumber": 150
          },
          {
            "text": "    _ \"DigFlow/app/your_app/tools\"  // 导入工具包，触发 init() 注册",
            "lineNumber": 151
          },
          {
            "text": "    // ... 其他导入",
            "lineNumber": 152
          },
          {
            "text": ")",
            "lineNumber": 153
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 154
          },
          {
            "text": "func init() {",
            "lineNumber": 155
          },
          {
            "text": "    common.InitCommon()",
            "lineNumber": 156
          },
          {
            "text": "    // ... 其他初始化逻辑",
            "lineNumber": 157
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 158
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 159
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 160
          },
          {
            "text": "#### 步骤 3：在 agent.yml 中配置工具",
            "lineNumber": 161
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162
          },
          {
            "text": "在你的应用配置 &#96;app/your_app/config/agent.yml&#96; 中添加工具：",
            "lineNumber": 163
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 164
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml",
            "lineNumber": 165
          },
          {
            "text": "Tools:",
            "lineNumber": 166
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Name: \"ui_ux_search\"",
            "lineNumber": 167
          },
          {
            "text": "    Description: \"检索 UI/UX 设计知识库\"",
            "lineNumber": 168
          },
          {
            "text": "    UseGlobal: false",
            "lineNumber": 169
          },
          {
            "text": "  ",
            "lineNumber": 170
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Name: \"generate_design_system\"",
            "lineNumber": 171
          },
          {
            "text": "    Description: \"生成完整设计系统\"",
            "lineNumber": 172
          },
          {
            "text": "    UseGlobal: false",
            "lineNumber": 173
          },
          {
            "text": "  ",
            "lineNumber": 174
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Name: \"persist_design_system\"",
            "lineNumber": 175
          },
          {
            "text": "    Description: \"持久化设计系统到文件\"",
            "lineNumber": 176
          },
          {
            "text": "    UseGlobal: false",
            "lineNumber": 177
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 178
          },
          {
            "text": "Nodes:",
            "lineNumber": 179
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Key: \"designer\"",
            "lineNumber": 180
          },
          {
            "text": "    Type: \"chat_model\"",
            "lineNumber": 181
          },
          {
            "text": "    Model: \"qwen-max\"",
            "lineNumber": 182
          },
          {
            "text": "    SystemPrompt: |",
            "lineNumber": 183
          },
          {
            "text": "      你是一位专业的 UI/UX 设计师。",
            "lineNumber": 184
          },
          {
            "text": "      你可以使用以下工具：",
            "lineNumber": 185
          },
          {
            "text": "      - ui_ux_search: 搜索设计知识库",
            "lineNumber": 186
          },
          {
            "text": "      - generate_design_system: 生成完整设计系统",
            "lineNumber": 187
          },
          {
            "text": "      - persist_design_system: 持久化设计系统",
            "lineNumber": 188
          },
          {
            "text": "    BindTools:",
            "lineNumber": 189
          },
          {
            "text": "      - \"ui_ux_search\"",
            "lineNumber": 190
          },
          {
            "text": "      - \"generate_design_system\"",
            "lineNumber": 191
          },
          {
            "text": "      - \"persist_design_system\"",
            "lineNumber": 192
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 193
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 194
          },
          {
            "text": "### 方式二：批量注册所有工具",
            "lineNumber": 195
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 196
          },
          {
            "text": "如果你想要使用 DigEino 提供的所有基础工具（包括 UI/UX 工具和微信工具），可以使用 &#96;BaseTools()&#96; 函数：",
            "lineNumber": 197
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 198
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go",
            "lineNumber": 199
          },
          {
            "text": "package tools",
            "lineNumber": 200
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 201
          },
          {
            "text": "import (",
            "lineNumber": 202
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"context\"",
            "lineNumber": 203
          },
          {
            "text": "    ",
            "lineNumber": 204
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"DigFlow/internal/global/variable\"",
            "lineNumber": 205
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"DigFlow/internal/utils/logger\"",
            "lineNumber": 206
          },
          {
            "text": "    ",
            "lineNumber": 207
          },
          {
            "text": "    digeinoTools \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools\"",
            "lineNumber": 208
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"go.uber.org/zap\"",
            "lineNumber": 209
          },
          {
            "text": ")",
            "lineNumber": 210
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 211
          },
          {
            "text": "func init() {",
            "lineNumber": 212
          },
          {
            "text": "    ctx := context.Background()",
            "lineNumber": 213
          },
          {
            "text": "    ",
            "lineNumber": 214
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.3861137628555298
    },
    {

        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "func BaseTools(ctx context.Context) ([]tool.BaseTool, error) {",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "\tvar tools []tool.BaseTool",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 1. UI/UX 设计智能工具",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "\tuiTool, err := ui_ux.NewUIUXSearchTool(ctx)",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err == nil {",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, uiTool)",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 1.1. UI/UX 设计系统生成工具",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": "\tdesignSystemTool, err := ui_ux.NewGenerateDesignSystemTool(ctx)",
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err == nil {",
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, designSystemTool)",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 1.2. UI/UX 设计系统持久化工具",
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "text": "\tpersistTool, err := ui_ux.NewPersistDesignSystemTool(ctx)",
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err == nil {",
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, persistTool)",
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 2. 微信推送工具（如果已启用）",
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "text": "\twxTool, err := wx.NewWeChatMessageTool(ctx)",
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err == nil {",
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, wxTool)",
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 3. 企业微信推送工具（如果已启用）",
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "text": "\twecomTool, err := wx.NewWeComMessageTool(ctx)",
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err == nil {",
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, wecomTool)",
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "text": "\twecomImageTool, err := wx.NewWeComImageTool(ctx)",
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err == nil {",
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, wecomImageTool)",
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "text": "\twecomTextCardTool, err := wx.NewWeComTextCardTool(ctx)",
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {

          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "text": "\twecomCustomerTool, err := wx.NewWeComCustomerMessageTool(ctx)",
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {

          },
          {

          },

          },

          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/ideas/digflow_ui_ux_integration.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 380
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 443
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "func init() {",
            "lineNumber": 381
          },
          {
            "text": "    ctx := context.Background()",
            "lineNumber": 382
          },
          {
            "text": "    ",
            "lineNumber": 383
          },
          {
            "text": "    // 加载 DigEino 配置",
            "lineNumber": 384
          },
          {
            "text": "    // 注意：需要创建 DigEino 的配置文件 config/digeino.yaml",
            "lineNumber": 385
          },
          {
            "text": "    _, err := config.Load(\"config/digeino.yaml\")",
            "lineNumber": 386
          },
          {
            "text": "    if err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 387
          },
          {
            "text": "        logger.Error(\"加载 DigEino 配置失败\", zap.Error(err))",
            "lineNumber": 388
          },
          {
            "text": "        return",
            "lineNumber": 389
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 390
          },
          {
            "text": "    ",
            "lineNumber": 391
          },
          {
            "text": "    // 从配置创建 Agent 工具（自动读取 DigEino 配置中的 ChatModel）",
            "lineNumber": 392
          },
          {
            "text": "    agentTool, err := ui_ux.NewUIDesignSystemAgentToolFromConfig(ctx)",
            "lineNumber": 393
          },
          {
            "text": "    if err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 394
          },
          {
            "text": "        logger.Error(\"创建 UI/UX Agent 工具失败\", zap.Error(err))",
            "lineNumber": 395
          },
          {
            "text": "        return",
            "lineNumber": 396
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 397
          },
          {
            "text": "    ",
            "lineNumber": 398
          },
          {
            "text": "    // 注册工具",
            "lineNumber": 399
          },
          {
            "text": "    if err := variable.ToolRegistry.Register(\"generate_ui_design_system\", agentTool); err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 400
          },
          {
            "text": "        logger.Warn(\"UI/UX Agent 工具已存在\", zap.String(\"name\", \"generate_ui_design_system\"))",
            "lineNumber": 401
          },
          {
            "text": "    } else {",
            "lineNumber": 402
          },
          {
            "text": "        logger.Info(\"UI/UX Agent 工具注册成功\", zap.String(\"name\", \"generate_ui_design_system\"))",
            "lineNumber": 403
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 404
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 405
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 406
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 407
          },
          {
            "text": "**DigEino 配置文件** (&#96;config/digeino.yaml&#96;):",
            "lineNumber": 408
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 409
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml",
            "lineNumber": 410
          },
          {
            "text": "ChatModel:",
            "lineNumber": 411
          },
          {
            "text": "  Type: \"qwen\"",
            "lineNumber": 412
          },
          {
            "text": "  Config:",
            "lineNumber": 413
          },
          {
            "text": "    ApiKey: \"${QWEN_API_KEY}\"",
            "lineNumber": 414
          },
          {
            "text": "    Model: \"qwen-max\"",
            "lineNumber": 415
          },
          {
            "text": "    BaseUrl: \"https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1\"",
            "lineNumber": 416
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 417
          },
          {
            "text": "UIUX:",
            "lineNumber": 418
          },
          {
            "text": "  Storage:",
            "lineNumber": 419
          },
          {
            "text": "    BaseDir: \"storage/app/ui_ux\"",
            "lineNumber": 420
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 421
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 422
          },
          {
            "text": "## Agent 工具详解",
            "lineNumber": 423
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 424
          },
          {
            "text": "### Agent 工具参数",
            "lineNumber": 425
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 426
          },
          {
            "text": "Agent 工具接受以下参数：",
            "lineNumber": 427
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 428
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;json",
            "lineNumber": 429
          },
          {
            "text": "{",
            "lineNumber": 430
          },
          {
            "text": "  \"query\": \"beauty spa wellness service\",      // 必需：用户需求描述",
            "lineNumber": 431
          },
          {
            "text": "  \"project_name\": \"Serenity Spa\",              // 可选：项目名称",
            "lineNumber": 432
          },
          {
            "text": "  \"stack\": \"react\",                            // 可选：技术栈（react, vue, tailwind 等）",
            "lineNumber": 433
          },
          {
            "text": "  \"persist\": true,                             // 可选：是否持久化设计系统",
            "lineNumber": 434
          },
          {
            "text": "  \"page_name\": \"homepage\"                      // 可选：页面名称（用于生成页面覆盖）",
            "lineNumber": 435
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 436
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 437
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 438
          },
          {
            "text": "**参数说明**：",
            "lineNumber": 439
          },
          {
            "text": "- **query**（必需）：用户需求描述，例如 \"beauty spa wellness service\"",
            "lineNumber": 440
          },
          {
            "text": "- **project_name**（可选）：项目名称，用于生成设计系统和文件命名",
            "lineNumber": 441
          },
          {
            "text": "- **stack**（可选）：技术栈，Agent 会自动获取该技术栈的指南",
            "lineNumber": 442
          },
          {
            "text": "- **persist**（可选）：是否持久化设计系统到文件",
            "lineNumber": 443
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.3763430118560791
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/ui_ux/agent.go",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
