          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "package ui_ux",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "import (",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"context\"",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"fmt\"",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/model\"",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool\"",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/compose\"",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/schema\"",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": ")",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "// UIDesignSystemAgent UI/UX 设计系统生成 Agent",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "// 这是一个编排的 Agent，内部使用工具来完成设计系统生成工作流",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "type UIDesignSystemAgent struct {",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "\tagent compose.Runnable[[]*schema.Message, *schema.Message]",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "// NewUIDesignSystemAgent 创建 UI/UX 设计系统生成 Agent",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "// 需要传入 ChatModel，Agent 内部会使用工具进行工作流编排",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "func NewUIDesignSystemAgent(ctx context.Context, chatModel model.ChatModel, additionalTools ...tool.BaseTool) (*UIDesignSystemAgent, error) {",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 准备工具集",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "\tallTools := []tool.BaseTool{}",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 1. UI/UX 搜索工具",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "\tsearchTool, err := NewUIUXSearchTool(ctx)",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err == nil {",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tallTools = append(allTools, searchTool)",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 2. 设计系统生成工具",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "\tdesignSystemTool, err := NewGenerateDesignSystemTool(ctx)",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err == nil {",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tallTools = append(allTools, designSystemTool)",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 3. 持久化工具",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "\tpersistTool, err := NewPersistDesignSystemTool(ctx)",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err == nil {",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tallTools = append(allTools, persistTool)",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 4. 添加外部传入的额外工具（如其他项目工具）",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "\tallTools = append(allTools, additionalTools...)",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 绑定工具到模型",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "\ttoolInfos := make([]*schema.ToolInfo, 0, len(allTools))",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "\tfor _, t := range allTools {",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tif info, err := t.Info(ctx); err == nil {",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\ttoolInfos = append(toolInfos, info)",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err := chatModel.BindTools(toolInfos); err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to bind tools: %w\", err)",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 创建工具执行节点",
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "\ttoolNode, err := compose.NewToolNode(ctx, &amp;compose.ToolsNodeConfig{",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tTools: allTools,",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "\t})",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to create tool node: %w\", err)",
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 创建 Agent Lambda 节点（手动调用模型和工具）",
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "text": "\tagentLambda := func(ctx context.Context, input []*schema.Message) (*schema.Message, error) {",
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t// 构建消息列表（包含系统提示词）",
            "lineNumber": 67
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.3760744035243988
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/ui_ux/agent.go",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 64,
            "column": 63
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 128,
            "column": 82
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "\tagentLambda := func(ctx context.Context, input []*schema.Message) (*schema.Message, error) {",
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t// 构建消息列表（包含系统提示词）",
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tmessages := []*schema.Message{",
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tschema.SystemMessage(getSystemPrompt()),",
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tmessages = append(messages, input...)",
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t// 调用模型生成",
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\toutput, err := chatModel.Generate(ctx, messages)",
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"model generate failed: %w\", err)",
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t// 如果有工具调用，执行工具",
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tif len(output.ToolCalls) &gt; 0 {",
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t// 执行工具（工具节点接受单个消息，返回消息数组）",
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\ttoolResults, err := toolNode.Invoke(ctx, output)",
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"tool execution failed: %w\", err)",
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t// 将工具结果添加到消息列表，再次调用模型",
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tmessages = append(messages, output)",
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tmessages = append(messages, toolResults...)",
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t// 再次调用模型处理工具结果（可能需要多轮工具调用）",
            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tfor {",
            "lineNumber": 92
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\tfinalOutput, err := chatModel.Generate(ctx, messages)",
            "lineNumber": 93
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"model generate after tools failed: %w\", err)",
            "lineNumber": 95
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\t// 如果还有工具调用，继续执行",
            "lineNumber": 98
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\tif len(finalOutput.ToolCalls) &gt; 0 {",
            "lineNumber": 99
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\ttoolResults, err := toolNode.Invoke(ctx, finalOutput)",
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 101
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"tool execution failed: %w\", err)",
            "lineNumber": 102
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 103
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\tmessages = append(messages, finalOutput)",
            "lineNumber": 104
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\tmessages = append(messages, toolResults...)",
            "lineNumber": 105
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\tcontinue",
            "lineNumber": 106
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\treturn finalOutput, nil",
            "lineNumber": 109
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 110
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn output, nil",
            "lineNumber": 113
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 114
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 创建 Graph 工作流",
            "lineNumber": 116
          },
          {
            "text": "\tgraph := compose.NewGraph[[]*schema.Message, *schema.Message]()",
            "lineNumber": 117
          },
          {
            "text": "\t_ = graph.AddLambdaNode(\"ui_design_system_agent\", compose.InvokableLambda(agentLambda))",
            "lineNumber": 118
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 编译 Graph 为 Runnable",
            "lineNumber": 120
          },
          {
            "text": "\tcompiledGraph, err := graph.Compile(ctx)",
            "lineNumber": 121
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to compile graph: %w\", err)",
            "lineNumber": 123
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 124
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "text": "\treturn &amp;UIDesignSystemAgent{agent: compiledGraph}, nil",
            "lineNumber": 126
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 127
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128
          },
          {
            "text": "// NewUIDesignSystemAgentFromConfig 从配置创建 UI/UX 设计系统生成 Agent",
            "lineNumber": 129
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.349141001701355
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/ui_ux/README.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 78
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "# UI/UX Design System Agent",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "基于 ui_ux_pro_max v2.0 的设计系统生成 Agent，支持完整的工作流编排和工具调用。",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "## 功能特性",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "### 1. 核心工具",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "- **&#96;ui_ux_search&#96;**: 搜索 UI/UX 设计知识库",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "- **&#96;generate_design_system&#96;**: 生成完整设计系统（包含推理引擎）",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "- **&#96;persist_design_system&#96;**: 持久化设计系统到文件（Master + Overrides 模式）",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "### 2. Agent 编排",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "- **&#96;UIDesignSystemAgent&#96;**: 智能编排的 Agent，自动完成设计系统生成工作流",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "- **&#96;NewUIDesignSystemAgentTool&#96;**: 将 Agent 包装成工具，供其他 Agent 使用",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "## 使用方法",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "### 方式一：直接使用工具",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "import (",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"context\"",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/ui_ux\"",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": ")",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "// 1. 搜索工具",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "searchTool, _ := ui_ux.NewUIUXSearchTool(ctx)",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "// 使用 searchTool...",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "// 2. 生成设计系统",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "designSystemTool, _ := ui_ux.NewGenerateDesignSystemTool(ctx)",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "// 使用 designSystemTool...",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "// 3. 持久化设计系统",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "persistTool, _ := ui_ux.NewPersistDesignSystemTool(ctx)",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "// 使用 persistTool...",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "### 方式二：使用 Agent（推荐）",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "**方式 2a：从配置创建（最简单，推荐）**",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "import (",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"context\"",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\"",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/ui_ux\"",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": ")",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "// 1. 加载配置（通常在应用启动时执行一次）",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "_, err := config.Load(\"config/config.yaml\")",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "if err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "    return err",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "// 2. 从配置创建 Agent（自动读取 config.yaml 中的 ChatModel 配置）",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "agent, err := ui_ux.NewUIDesignSystemAgentFromConfig(ctx)",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "if err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "text": "    return err",
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "text": "// 3. 调用 Agent",
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "result, err := agent.Invoke(ctx, \"生成一个美容spa的设计系统，项目名称：Serenity Spa\")",
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "text": "if err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "    return err",
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "text": "fmt.Println(result.Content)",
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "text": "**方式 2b：手动传入 ChatModel（向后兼容）**",
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go",
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "text": "import (",
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"context\"",
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/ui_ux\"",
            "lineNumber": 78
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.348574161529541
    },

          {

            "lineNumber": 79

          {
            "text": "// 1. 创建 ChatModel",
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "text": "chatModel, err := openaiModel.NewChatModel(ctx, &amp;openaiModel.ChatModelConfig{",

          {

          },

          },

          },

            "text": "agent, err := ui_ux.NewUIDesignSystemAgent(ctx, chatModel)",

          },

            "lineNumber": 92
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 93
          },
          {
            "text": "}",

          },
          {

          },
          {
            "text": "// 3. 调用 Agent",
            "lineNumber": 96
          },

          },

          {

            "lineNumber": 102
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 103
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104
          },
          {
            "text": "### 方式三：将 Agent 作为工具使用",
            "lineNumber": 105
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106
          },
          {
            "text": "**方式 3a：从配置创建（推荐）**",
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go",
            "lineNumber": 109
          },
          {
            "text": "import (",
            "lineNumber": 110
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"context\"",
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\"",
            "lineNumber": 112
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/ui_ux\"",
            "lineNumber": 113
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool\"",
            "lineNumber": 114
          },
          {
            "text": ")",

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116
          },

          },
          {

          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 129

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134
          },
          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/ideas/digflow_ui_ux_integration.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 527
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 597
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "func init() {",
            "lineNumber": 528
          },
          {
            "text": "    // 加载 DigEino 配置",
            "lineNumber": 529
          },
          {
            "text": "    _, err := config.Load(\"config/digeino.yaml\")",
            "lineNumber": 530
          },
          {
            "text": "    if err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 531
          },
          {
            "text": "        logger.Warn(\"加载 DigEino 配置失败，使用默认配置\", zap.Error(err))",
            "lineNumber": 532
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 533
          },
          {
            "text": "    ",
            "lineNumber": 534
          },
          {
            "text": "    // ... 注册工具",
            "lineNumber": 535
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 536
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 537
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 538
          },
          {
            "text": "## 使用示例",
            "lineNumber": 539
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 540
          },
          {
            "text": "### 示例 1：使用 UI/UX Agent 工具（推荐）⭐",
            "lineNumber": 541
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 542
          },
          {
            "text": "这是最简单的方式，Agent 会自动完成整个工作流：",
            "lineNumber": 543
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 544
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml",
            "lineNumber": 545
          },
          {
            "text": "Nodes:",
            "lineNumber": 546
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Key: \"designer\"",
            "lineNumber": 547
          },
          {
            "text": "    Type: \"chat_model\"",
            "lineNumber": 548
          },
          {
            "text": "    Model: \"ui_model\"",
            "lineNumber": 549
          },
          {
            "text": "    SystemPrompt: |",
            "lineNumber": 550
          },
          {
            "text": "      你是一位专业的 UI/UX 设计师。",
            "lineNumber": 551
          },
          {
            "text": "      当用户需要生成设计系统时，使用 generate_ui_design_system 工具。",
            "lineNumber": 552
          },
          {
            "text": "      这个工具会自动完成需求分析、生成设计系统、补充搜索和持久化。",
            "lineNumber": 553
          },
          {
            "text": "    BindTools:",
            "lineNumber": 554
          },
          {
            "text": "      - \"generate_ui_design_system\"",
            "lineNumber": 555
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 556
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 557
          },
          {
            "text": "**用户请求示例**：",
            "lineNumber": 558
          },
          {
            "text": "- \"生成一个美容spa的设计系统，项目名称：Serenity Spa\"",
            "lineNumber": 559
          },
          {
            "text": "- \"为我的电商平台生成设计系统，技术栈：react\"",
            "lineNumber": 560
          },
          {
            "text": "- \"生成设计系统并持久化，项目名称：MyApp，页面：homepage\"",
            "lineNumber": 561
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 562
          },
          {
            "text": "**Agent 会自动**：",
            "lineNumber": 563
          },
          {
            "text": "1. 分析需求：识别产品类型（Beauty/Spa）、样式关键词、行业、技术栈",
            "lineNumber": 564
          },
          {
            "text": "2. 生成设计系统：调用 &#96;generate_design_system&#96; 生成完整设计系统",
            "lineNumber": 565
          },
          {
            "text": "3. 补充搜索：根据需要调用 &#96;ui_ux_search&#96; 获取 React 技术栈指南",
            "lineNumber": 566
          },
          {
            "text": "4. 返回结果：返回完整的设计系统，包括 Pattern、Style、Colors、Typography、Effects",
            "lineNumber": 567
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 568
          },
          {
            "text": "### 示例 2：使用场景",
            "lineNumber": 569
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 570
          },
          {
            "text": "#### 场景 1：快速生成设计系统",
            "lineNumber": 571
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 572
          },
          {
            "text": "**用户请求**：",
            "lineNumber": 573
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 574
          },
          {
            "text": "生成一个电商平台的设计系统",
            "lineNumber": 575
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 576
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 577
          },
          {
            "text": "**Agent 响应**：",
            "lineNumber": 578
          },
          {
            "text": "- 自动识别产品类型：E-commerce",
            "lineNumber": 579
          },
          {
            "text": "- 生成完整设计系统（配色、字体、样式、布局模式）",
            "lineNumber": 580
          },
          {
            "text": "- 返回格式化的设计系统文档",
            "lineNumber": 581
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 582
          },
          {
            "text": "#### 场景 2：生成并持久化设计系统",
            "lineNumber": 583
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 584
          },
          {
            "text": "**用户请求**：",
            "lineNumber": 585
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 586
          },
          {
            "text": "生成一个 SaaS 产品的设计系统，项目名称：MySaaS，技术栈：react，并持久化",
            "lineNumber": 587
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 588
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 589
          },
          {
            "text": "**Agent 响应**：",
            "lineNumber": 590
          },
          {
            "text": "- 生成设计系统",
            "lineNumber": 591
          },
          {
            "text": "- 获取 React 技术栈指南",
            "lineNumber": 592
          },
          {
            "text": "- 持久化到 &#96;storage/app/ui_ux/design-system/mysaas/MASTER.md&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 593
          },
          {
            "text": "- 返回持久化路径",
            "lineNumber": 594
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 595
          },
          {
            "text": "#### 场景 3：生成页面特定设计系统",
            "lineNumber": 596
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.3371284008026123
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/updates/2026-01-11_ui_ux_plugin_integration.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 38
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "# Update: UI/UX Design Intelligence Plugin Integration",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "**Date**: 2026-01-11",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "**Category**: Feature / Tools",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": "## Summary",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "Integrated a comprehensive UI/UX Design Intelligence engine as a reusable tool within the Digeino framework. This enables any AI agent powered by Digeino to access professional design guidelines, color palettes, typography pairings, and interaction principles.",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "## New Features",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Native search engine**: Efficient BM25-based retrieval system for design knowledge.",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Embedded Knowledge Base**: 400+ professional design rules and patterns embedded directly into the binary using &#96;//go:embed&#96;.",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Domain Detection**: Automatic detection of query intent (e.g., distinguishing between a request for \"colors\" vs. \"layout\").",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Stack-Specific Guidelines**: Support for technology-specific advice (React, Vue, Tailwind, SwiftUI, Flutter, etc.).",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Eino Tool Wrapper**: Out-of-the-box compatibility with the Eino framework.",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "## Components Added",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;tools/ui_ux/bm25.go&#96;: Implementation of the BM25 ranking algorithm.",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;tools/ui_ux/detector.go&#96;: Natural language intent detector for design domains.",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;tools/ui_ux/service.go&#96;: Core orchestration service managing embedded CSV data.",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;tools/ui_ux/tool.go&#96;: Eino-compliant tool factory.",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;tools/ui_ux/data/&#96;: Full dataset including styles, colors, UX guidelines, and implementation prompts.",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "## How to Use",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "Import the &#96;ui_ux&#96; package and register the tool:",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "import \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/ui_ux\"",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "// ... ",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "uiTool, err := ui_ux.NewUIUXSearchTool(ctx)",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "if err == nil {",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "    tools = append(tools, uiTool)",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "## Impact",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "This update significantly lowers the barrier for AI agents to provide visually stunning and UX-sound UI recommendations without requiring external API calls or complex local file management.",
            "lineNumber": 38
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.3276081085205078
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/tools.go",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 109,
            "column": 77
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 165,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "\tif err == nil {",
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, wecomCustomerMiniprogramTool)",
            "lineNumber": 112
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 113
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 4. 通用调研系列工具",
            "lineNumber": 115
          },
          {
            "text": "\tgrepTool, err := research.NewGrepSearchTool(ctx)",
            "lineNumber": 116
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err == nil {",
            "lineNumber": 117
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, grepTool)",
            "lineNumber": 118
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 119
          },
          {
            "text": "\treadTool, err := research.NewReadFileTool(ctx)",
            "lineNumber": 120
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err == nil {",
            "lineNumber": 121
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, readTool)",
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 123
          },
          {
            "text": "\tdocTool, err := research.NewDocToMarkdownTool(ctx)",
            "lineNumber": 124
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err == nil {",
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, docTool)",
            "lineNumber": 126
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 127
          },
          {
            "text": "\tfirecrawlTool, err := research.NewFirecrawlTool(ctx)",
            "lineNumber": 128
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err == nil {",
            "lineNumber": 129
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, firecrawlTool)",
            "lineNumber": 130
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 131
          },
          {
            "text": "\twebSearchTool, err := websearch.NewWebSearchTool(ctx)",
            "lineNumber": 132
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err == nil {",
            "lineNumber": 133
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, webSearchTool)",
            "lineNumber": 134
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 135
          },
          {
            "text": "\tsemanticSearchTool, err := research.NewSemanticSearchTool(ctx)",
            "lineNumber": 136
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err == nil {",
            "lineNumber": 137
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, semanticSearchTool)",
            "lineNumber": 138
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 139
          },
          {
            "text": "\tcodeIndexTool, err := research.NewCodeIndexTool(ctx)",
            "lineNumber": 140
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err == nil {",
            "lineNumber": 141
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, codeIndexTool)",
            "lineNumber": 142
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 143
          },
          {
            "text": "\tjinaReaderTool, err := research.NewJinaReaderTool(ctx)",
            "lineNumber": 144
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err == nil {",
            "lineNumber": 145
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, jinaReaderTool)",
            "lineNumber": 146
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 147
          },
          {
            "text": "\twriteFileTool, err := research.NewWriteFileTool(ctx)",
            "lineNumber": 148
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err == nil {",
            "lineNumber": 149
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, writeFileTool)",
            "lineNumber": 150
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 151
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 152
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 5. 本地无头浏览器抓取工具（高级反爬场景，如微信公众号）",
            "lineNumber": 153
          },
          {
            "text": "\tlocalScraperTool, err := research.NewLocalScraperTool(ctx)",
            "lineNumber": 154
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err == nil {",
            "lineNumber": 155
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, localScraperTool)",
            "lineNumber": 156
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 157
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 5.1 本地浏览器通用抓取工具（read/screenshot + cookie 复用）",
            "lineNumber": 158
          },
          {
            "text": "\tbrowserBrowseTool, err := research.NewBrowserBrowseTool(ctx)",
            "lineNumber": 159
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err == nil {",
            "lineNumber": 160
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, browserBrowseTool)",
            "lineNumber": 161
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 162
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 163
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 这里未来可以放入通用的 Google 搜索、计算器等跨项目工具",
            "lineNumber": 164
          },
          {
            "text": "\treturn tools, nil",
            "lineNumber": 165
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 166
          }
        ]
      },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/ideas/digflow_ui_ux_integration.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 441
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 529
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "- **stack**（可选）：技术栈，Agent 会自动获取该技术栈的指南",
            "lineNumber": 442
          },
          {
            "text": "- **persist**（可选）：是否持久化设计系统到文件",
            "lineNumber": 443
          },
          {
            "text": "- **page_name**（可选）：页面名称，用于生成页面特定的覆盖文件",
            "lineNumber": 444
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 445
          },
          {
            "text": "### Agent 工作流",
            "lineNumber": 446
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 447
          },
          {
            "text": "Agent 内部自动执行以下工作流：",
            "lineNumber": 448
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 449
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 450
          },
          {
            "text": "1. 分析需求",
            "lineNumber": 451
          },
          {
            "text": "   ↓",
            "lineNumber": 452
          },
          {
            "text": "2. 生成设计系统（generate_design_system）",
            "lineNumber": 453
          },
          {
            "text": "   ↓",
            "lineNumber": 454
          },
          {
            "text": "3. 补充搜索（ui_ux_search，如果需要）",
            "lineNumber": 455
          },
          {
            "text": "   - 样式选项",
            "lineNumber": 456
          },
          {
            "text": "   - 图表推荐",
            "lineNumber": 457
          },
          {
            "text": "   - UX 最佳实践",
            "lineNumber": 458
          },
          {
            "text": "   - 字体选项",
            "lineNumber": 459
          },
          {
            "text": "   ↓",
            "lineNumber": 460
          },
          {
            "text": "4. 技术栈指南（ui_ux_search with stack，如果指定了技术栈）",
            "lineNumber": 461
          },
          {
            "text": "   ↓",
            "lineNumber": 462
          },
          {
            "text": "5. 持久化（persist_design_system，如果用户请求）",
            "lineNumber": 463
          },
          {
            "text": "   ↓",
            "lineNumber": 464
          },
          {
            "text": "6. 返回完整结果",
            "lineNumber": 465
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 466
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 467
          },
          {
            "text": "### 与单独工具的区别",
            "lineNumber": 468
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 469
          },
          {
            "text": "#### 使用单独工具（方式一、二）",
            "lineNumber": 470
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 471
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml",
            "lineNumber": 472
          },
          {
            "text": "# 需要手动编排工作流",
            "lineNumber": 473
          },
          {
            "text": "BindTools:",
            "lineNumber": 474
          },
          {
            "text": "  - \"ui_ux_search\"",
            "lineNumber": 475
          },
          {
            "text": "  - \"generate_design_system\"",
            "lineNumber": 476
          },
          {
            "text": "  - \"persist_design_system\"",
            "lineNumber": 477
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 478
          },
          {
            "text": "# 需要在 SystemPrompt 中详细说明调用顺序",
            "lineNumber": 479
          },
          {
            "text": "SystemPrompt: |",
            "lineNumber": 480
          },
          {
            "text": "  1. 先调用 generate_design_system",
            "lineNumber": 481
          },
          {
            "text": "  2. 然后调用 ui_ux_search 补充信息",
            "lineNumber": 482
          },
          {
            "text": "  3. 最后调用 persist_design_system",
            "lineNumber": 483
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 484
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 485
          },
          {
            "text": "#### 使用 Agent 工具（方式三）⭐",
            "lineNumber": 486
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 487
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml",
            "lineNumber": 488
          },
          {
            "text": "# 只需一个工具",
            "lineNumber": 489
          },
          {
            "text": "BindTools:",
            "lineNumber": 490
          },
          {
            "text": "  - \"generate_ui_design_system\"",
            "lineNumber": 491
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 492
          },
          {
            "text": "# SystemPrompt 简单明了",
            "lineNumber": 493
          },
          {
            "text": "SystemPrompt: |",
            "lineNumber": 494
          },
          {
            "text": "  使用 generate_ui_design_system 生成设计系统",
            "lineNumber": 495
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 496
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 497
          },
          {
            "text": "## 配置说明",
            "lineNumber": 498
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 499
          },
          {
            "text": "### 配置存储路径（可选）",
            "lineNumber": 500
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 501
          },
          {
            "text": "如果你想要自定义设计系统的存储路径，可以在 DigFlow 的配置中添加 DigEino 的配置：",
            "lineNumber": 502
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 503
          },
          {
            "text": "#### 创建 DigEino 配置文件",
            "lineNumber": 504
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 505
          },
          {
            "text": "在 DigFlow 项目中创建 &#96;config/digeino.yaml&#96;：",
            "lineNumber": 506
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 507
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml",
            "lineNumber": 508
          },
          {
            "text": "ChatModel:",
            "lineNumber": 509
          },
          {
            "text": "  Type: \"qwen\"",
            "lineNumber": 510
          },
          {
            "text": "  Config:",
            "lineNumber": 511
          },
          {
            "text": "    ApiKey: \"${QWEN_API_KEY}\"",
            "lineNumber": 512
          },
          {
            "text": "    Model: \"qwen-max\"",
            "lineNumber": 513
          },
          {
            "text": "    BaseUrl: \"https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1\"",
            "lineNumber": 514
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 515
          },
          {
            "text": "UIUX:",
            "lineNumber": 516
          },
          {
            "text": "  Storage:",
            "lineNumber": 517
          },
          {
            "text": "    BaseDir: \"storage/app/ui_ux\"  # 设计系统存储路径",
            "lineNumber": 518
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 519
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 520
          },
          {
            "text": "#### 在工具注册时加载配置",
            "lineNumber": 521
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 522
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go",
            "lineNumber": 523
          },
          {
            "text": "import (",
            "lineNumber": 524
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\"",
            "lineNumber": 525
          },
          {
            "text": ")",
            "lineNumber": 526
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 527
          },
          {
            "text": "func init() {",
            "lineNumber": 528
          },
          {
            "text": "    // 加载 DigEino 配置",
            "lineNumber": 529
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.32571038603782654
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/wx/tool.go",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 33,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "package wx",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "import (",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"context\"",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"fmt\"",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool\"",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool/utils\"",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\"",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": ")",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "// NewWeChatMessageTool 创建微信推送工具",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "func NewWeChatMessageTool(ctx context.Context) (tool.BaseTool, error) {",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "\tcfg := config.Get()",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif cfg.WeChat.Enabled == nil || !*cfg.WeChat.Enabled {",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"WeChat tool is not enabled in config\")",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif cfg.WeChat.AppID == \"\" || cfg.WeChat.AppSecret == \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"WeChat AppID or AppSecret not configured\")",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "\treturn utils.InferTool(",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\"send_wechat_message\",",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\"通过微信服务号推送文字消息给指定的用户openid。支持发送给单个用户或配置中的所有用户。注意：用户需要在48小时内与公众号有交互才能接收客服消息。\",",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tfunc(ctx context.Context, req *SendWeChatTextMessageRequest) (*SendWeChatTextMessageResponse, error) {",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tresp, err := SendWeChatTextMessage(ctx, *req)",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\treturn nil, err",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\treturn &amp;resp, nil",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t},",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "\t)",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 34
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.3223154544830322
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/ideas/digflow_ui_ux_integration.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 323
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 383
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "    UseGlobal: false",
            "lineNumber": 324
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 325
          },
          {
            "text": "Nodes:",
            "lineNumber": 326
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Key: \"designer\"",
            "lineNumber": 327
          },
          {
            "text": "    Type: \"chat_model\"",
            "lineNumber": 328
          },
          {
            "text": "    Model: \"ui_model\"",
            "lineNumber": 329
          },
          {
            "text": "    SystemPrompt: |",
            "lineNumber": 330
          },
          {
            "text": "      你是一位专业的 UI/UX 设计师。",
            "lineNumber": 331
          },
          {
            "text": "      当用户需要生成设计系统时，使用 generate_ui_design_system 工具。",
            "lineNumber": 332
          },
          {
            "text": "      这个工具会自动完成：",
            "lineNumber": 333
          },
          {
            "text": "      1. 分析需求（产品类型、样式、行业、技术栈）",
            "lineNumber": 334
          },
          {
            "text": "      2. 生成完整设计系统",
            "lineNumber": 335
          },
          {
            "text": "      3. 补充搜索详细信息",
            "lineNumber": 336
          },
          {
            "text": "      4. 获取技术栈指南",
            "lineNumber": 337
          },
          {
            "text": "      5. 持久化（如果用户请求）",
            "lineNumber": 338
          },
          {
            "text": "    BindTools:",
            "lineNumber": 339
          },
          {
            "text": "      - \"generate_ui_design_system\"",
            "lineNumber": 340
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 341
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Key: \"tools\"",
            "lineNumber": 342
          },
          {
            "text": "    Type: \"tools_node\"",
            "lineNumber": 343
          },
          {
            "text": "    Tools:",
            "lineNumber": 344
          },
          {
            "text": "      - \"generate_ui_design_system\"",
            "lineNumber": 345
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 346
          },
          {
            "text": "Edges:",
            "lineNumber": 347
          },
          {
            "text": "  - From: \"START\"",
            "lineNumber": 348
          },
          {
            "text": "    To: \"designer\"",
            "lineNumber": 349
          },
          {
            "text": "  - From: \"tools\"",
            "lineNumber": 350
          },
          {
            "text": "    To: \"designer\"",
            "lineNumber": 351
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 352
          },
          {
            "text": "Branches:",
            "lineNumber": 353
          },
          {
            "text": "  - From: \"designer\"",
            "lineNumber": 354
          },
          {
            "text": "    Condition: \"has_tool_calls\"",
            "lineNumber": 355
          },
          {
            "text": "    Targets:",
            "lineNumber": 356
          },
          {
            "text": "      - Key: \"tools\"",
            "lineNumber": 357
          },
          {
            "text": "        When: true",
            "lineNumber": 358
          },
          {
            "text": "      - Key: \"END\"",
            "lineNumber": 359
          },
          {
            "text": "        When: false",
            "lineNumber": 360
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 361
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 362
          },
          {
            "text": "#### 替代方式：使用 DigEino 配置创建 Agent",
            "lineNumber": 363
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 364
          },
          {
            "text": "如果你想要使用 DigEino 的配置系统（而不是 DigFlow 的模型），可以这样做：",
            "lineNumber": 365
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 366
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go",
            "lineNumber": 367
          },
          {
            "text": "package tools",
            "lineNumber": 368
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 369
          },
          {
            "text": "import (",
            "lineNumber": 370
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"context\"",
            "lineNumber": 371
          },
          {
            "text": "    ",
            "lineNumber": 372
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"DigFlow/internal/global/variable\"",
            "lineNumber": 373
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"DigFlow/internal/utils/logger\"",
            "lineNumber": 374
          },
          {
            "text": "    ",
            "lineNumber": 375
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\"",
            "lineNumber": 376
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools/ui_ux\"",
            "lineNumber": 377
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"go.uber.org/zap\"",
            "lineNumber": 378
          },
          {
            "text": ")",
            "lineNumber": 379
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 380
          },
          {
            "text": "func init() {",
            "lineNumber": 381
          },
          {
            "text": "    ctx := context.Background()",
            "lineNumber": 382
          },
          {
            "text": "    ",
            "lineNumber": 383
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.31719040870666504
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/ideas/digflow_ui_ux_integration.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 659
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 732
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "5. **模型名称一致性**：",
            "lineNumber": 660
          },
          {
            "text": "   - 使用 Agent 工具时，&#96;agent.yml&#96; 中的模型名称必须与 &#96;tool_register.go&#96; 中的名称一致",
            "lineNumber": 661
          },
          {
            "text": "   - 推荐使用 &#96;ui_model&#96; 作为模型名称",
            "lineNumber": 662
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 663
          },
          {
            "text": "## 故障排查",
            "lineNumber": 664
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 665
          },
          {
            "text": "### 问题 1：工具未找到",
            "lineNumber": 666
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 667
          },
          {
            "text": "**错误信息**：&#96;工具 xxx 未注册&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 668
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 669
          },
          {
            "text": "**解决方案**：",
            "lineNumber": 670
          },
          {
            "text": "1. 检查工具是否在 &#96;tool_register.go&#96; 中正确注册",
            "lineNumber": 671
          },
          {
            "text": "2. 检查 &#96;bootstrap/init.go&#96; 是否导入了工具包",
            "lineNumber": 672
          },
          {
            "text": "3. 查看日志确认工具注册是否成功",
            "lineNumber": 673
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 674
          },
          {
            "text": "### 问题 2：模型未找到（Agent 工具）",
            "lineNumber": 675
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 676
          },
          {
            "text": "**错误**：&#96;模型 ui_model 不存在&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 677
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 678
          },
          {
            "text": "**解决**：",
            "lineNumber": 679
          },
          {
            "text": "1. 检查 &#96;agent.yml&#96; 中是否配置了名为 &#96;ui_model&#96; 的模型",
            "lineNumber": 680
          },
          {
            "text": "2. 确保模型名称与 &#96;tool_register.go&#96; 中的名称一致",
            "lineNumber": 681
          },
          {
            "text": "3. 检查模型是否已正确注册到 ModelRegistry",
            "lineNumber": 682
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 683
          },
          {
            "text": "### 问题 3：Agent 工具创建失败",
            "lineNumber": 684
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 685
          },
          {
            "text": "**错误**：&#96;failed to create UI design system agent&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 686
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 687
          },
          {
            "text": "**解决**：",
            "lineNumber": 688
          },
          {
            "text": "1. 检查 ChatModel 是否正确获取",
            "lineNumber": 689
          },
          {
            "text": "2. 检查 DigEino 依赖是否正确安装",
            "lineNumber": 690
          },
          {
            "text": "3. 查看日志获取详细错误信息",
            "lineNumber": 691
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 692
          },
          {
            "text": "### 问题 4：工具调用失败",
            "lineNumber": 693
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 694
          },
          {
            "text": "**错误**：&#96;agent execution failed&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 695
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 696
          },
          {
            "text": "**解决**：",
            "lineNumber": 697
          },
          {
            "text": "1. 检查模型 API Key 是否正确配置",
            "lineNumber": 698
          },
          {
            "text": "2. 检查网络连接",
            "lineNumber": 699
          },
          {
            "text": "3. 查看 Agent 内部日志",
            "lineNumber": 700
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 701
          },
          {
            "text": "### 问题 5：配置加载失败",
            "lineNumber": 702
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 703
          },
          {
            "text": "**错误信息**：&#96;加载 DigEino 配置失败&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 704
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 705
          },
          {
            "text": "**解决方案**：",
            "lineNumber": 706
          },
          {
            "text": "1. 检查配置文件路径是否正确",
            "lineNumber": 707
          },
          {
            "text": "2. 如果不需要配置驱动功能，可以不加载 DigEino 配置",
            "lineNumber": 708
          },
          {
            "text": "3. 使用 DigFlow 的模型注册表代替",
            "lineNumber": 709
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 710
          },
          {
            "text": "### 问题 6：存储路径问题",
            "lineNumber": 711
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 712
          },
          {
            "text": "**错误信息**：&#96;failed to create directories&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 713
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 714
          },
          {
            "text": "**解决方案**：",
            "lineNumber": 715
          },
          {
            "text": "1. 检查存储目录的写入权限",
            "lineNumber": 716
          },
          {
            "text": "2. 确认 &#96;BaseDir&#96; 配置是否正确",
            "lineNumber": 717
          },
          {
            "text": "3. 使用绝对路径避免路径问题",
            "lineNumber": 718
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 719
          },
          {
            "text": "## 完整示例：在 UI Pro 应用中使用",
            "lineNumber": 720
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 721
          },
          {
            "text": "参考 &#96;DigFlow/app/ui_pro/config/agent.yml&#96;，你可以看到 UI Pro 应用已经配置了 UI/UX 工具：",
            "lineNumber": 722
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 723
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml",
            "lineNumber": 724
          },
          {
            "text": "Tools:",
            "lineNumber": 725
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Name: \"ui_ux_search\"",
            "lineNumber": 726
          },
          {
            "text": "    Description: \"检索 UI/UX 设计知识库\"",
            "lineNumber": 727
          },
          {
            "text": "    UseGlobal: true  # 如果工具在全局注册，使用 UseGlobal: true",
            "lineNumber": 728
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 729
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 730
          },
          {
            "text": "如果你的工具在应用级别注册，使用 &#96;UseGlobal: false&#96;。",
            "lineNumber": 731
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.314071387052536
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/updates/2026-02-10_wecom_push_tool.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 85
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 144
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "**user_id 来源**：由 DigFlow Agent 在调用时从会话上下文（如企业微信消息的 FromUserID）解析并传入。",
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "text": "**客服消息前置**：用户需先通过企业微信客服链接/扫码添加企业为客服，系统会为每个用户分配 &#96;external_userid&#96;（即 &#96;customer_id&#96;）。&#96;open_kf_id&#96; 在企业微信管理后台创建客服账号后获得。",
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92
          },
          {
            "text": "## 使用指南",
            "lineNumber": 93
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "text": "### 1. 前置条件",
            "lineNumber": 95
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {
            "text": "- 已注册企业微信（[work.weixin.qq.com](https://work.weixin.qq.com/)）",
            "lineNumber": 97
          },
          {
            "text": "- 创建自建应用并获取 AgentID、AgentSecret",
            "lineNumber": 98
          },
          {
            "text": "- 在 DigFlow 项目中已引入 DigEino 依赖",
            "lineNumber": 99
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "text": "### 2. 配置",
            "lineNumber": 101
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102
          },
          {
            "text": "在 DigEino 或 DigFlow 的 &#96;config.yaml&#96; 中启用并填写企业微信配置（见上方配置示例）。",
            "lineNumber": 103
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104
          },
          {
            "text": "### 3. 在 DigFlow 中注册工具",
            "lineNumber": 105
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106
          },
          {
            "text": "DigEino 的 &#96;BaseTools()&#96; 会自动注册企业微信工具（当 &#96;WeCom.Enabled: true&#96; 时）。在 DigFlow 的 &#96;tool_register.go&#96; 中引入 DigEino 工具：",
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go",
            "lineNumber": 109
          },
          {
            "text": "import (",
            "lineNumber": 110
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/tools\"",
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "text": ")",
            "lineNumber": 112
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113
          },
          {
            "text": "func init() {",
            "lineNumber": 114
          },
          {
            "text": "    ctx := context.Background()",
            "lineNumber": 115
          },
          {
            "text": "    baseTools, _ := tools.BaseTools(ctx)",
            "lineNumber": 116
          },
          {
            "text": "    for _, t := range baseTools {",
            "lineNumber": 117
          },
          {
            "text": "        variable.ToolRegistry.Register(t.Info(ctx).Name, t)",
            "lineNumber": 118
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 119
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 120
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 121
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "text": "或在 Agent 配置中显式绑定：",
            "lineNumber": 123
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml",
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "text": "Tools:",
            "lineNumber": 126
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Name: \"send_wecom_message\"",
            "lineNumber": 127
          },
          {
            "text": "    Description: \"通过企业微信发送文字消息\"",
            "lineNumber": 128
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Name: \"send_wecom_image\"",
            "lineNumber": 129
          },
          {
            "text": "    Description: \"通过企业微信发送图片消息\"",
            "lineNumber": 130
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Name: \"send_wecom_text_card\"",
            "lineNumber": 131
          },
          {
            "text": "    Description: \"通过企业微信发送文本卡片消息\"",
            "lineNumber": 132
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 133
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134
          },
          {
            "text": "### 4. 在 Agent 中调用",
            "lineNumber": 135
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136
          },
          {
            "text": "Agent 在执行过程中可调用上述工具，将结果发送给企业微信用户。&#96;user_id&#96; 需由调用方（如 chatgpt-wechat、DigFlow 的企业微信接入层）从收到的企业微信消息中解析 &#96;FromUserID&#96; 并传入工具参数。",
            "lineNumber": 137
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138
          },
          {
            "text": "**示例（Agent 内部逻辑）**：",
            "lineNumber": 139
          },
          {
            "text": "当用户通过企业微信发送消息时，会话上下文中应包含 &#96;user_id&#96;。Agent 完成处理后调用：",
            "lineNumber": 140
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;json",
            "lineNumber": 142
          },
          {
            "text": "{",
            "lineNumber": 143
          },
          {
            "text": "  \"tool\": \"send_wecom_message\",",
            "lineNumber": 144
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.3065764009952545
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/ui_ux/agent_tool.go",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 29,
            "column": 69
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 82,
            "column": 41
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "func NewUIDesignSystemAgentTool(ctx context.Context, chatModel model.ChatModel, additionalTools ...tool.BaseTool) (tool.BaseTool, error) {",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 创建 Agent 实例",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "\tagentInstance, err := NewUIDesignSystemAgent(ctx, chatModel, additionalTools...)",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to create UI design system agent: %w\", err)",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 将 Agent 包装成工具",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "\treturn utils.InferTool(",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\"generate_ui_design_system\",",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\"生成完整的 UI/UX 设计系统，包括样式、配色、字体、布局模式等。这是一个智能编排的 Agent，会自动分析需求、生成设计系统、补充搜索并获取技术栈指南。如果需要持久化，可以设置 persist=true。\",",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tfunc(ctx context.Context, req *UIDesignSystemAgentToolRequest) (*UIDesignSystemAgentToolResponse, error) {",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t// 构建查询字符串",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tqueryParts := []string{req.Query}",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tif req.ProjectName != \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\tqueryParts = append(queryParts, fmt.Sprintf(\"项目名称: %s\", req.ProjectName))",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tif req.Stack != \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\tqueryParts = append(queryParts, fmt.Sprintf(\"技术栈: %s\", req.Stack))",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tif req.Persist {",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\tqueryParts = append(queryParts, \"请持久化设计系统\")",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\tif req.PageName != \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\tqueryParts = append(queryParts, fmt.Sprintf(\"页面名称: %s\", req.PageName))",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tquery := fmt.Sprintf(\"生成设计系统：%s\", strings.Join(queryParts, \"，\"))",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t// 调用 Agent 执行完整工作流",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tresult, err := agentInstance.Invoke(ctx, query)",
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"agent execution failed: %w\", err)",
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t// 解析 Agent 返回的结果",
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tresponse := &amp;UIDesignSystemAgentToolResponse{",
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\tDesignSystem: result.Content,",
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\tMessage:      \"Design system generated successfully\",",
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tif req.Persist {",
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\tresponse.Message += \" and persisted to design-system/ directory\"",
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\treturn response, nil",
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t},",
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "text": "\t)",
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "text": "// NewUIDesignSystemAgentToolFromConfig 从配置创建 Agent 工具（便捷方法）",
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "text": "// 自动从 config.yaml 加载 ChatModel 配置",
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "text": "func NewUIDesignSystemAgentToolFromConfig",
            "lineNumber": 83
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.30366650223731995
    },

          {

          },
          {
            "text": "// NewWeComMessageTool 创建企业微信文字消息发送工具",

          },

          {
            "text": "\t}",

          {

          },

          },

          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {

          },
          {

          },
          {

          {

          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "// NewWeComImageTool 创建企业微信图片消息发送工具",

      "codeBlock": {
