        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "package websearch",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "import (",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"context\"",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"fmt\"",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"os\"",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool\"",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool/utils\"",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\"",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": ")",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "// WebSearch 执行网页搜索",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "func WebSearch(ctx context.Context, req *SearchRequest) (*SearchResponse, error) {",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "\tcfg := config.Get()",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "\ttoolCfg := cfg.Tools.WebSearch",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "\tengine := toolCfg.Engine",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif engine == \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tengine = \"duckduckgo\" // 默认为 duckduckgo 占位",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "\tfmt.Printf(\"执行搜索, engine: %s, query: %s, max_results: %d\\n\", engine, req.Query, req.MaxResults)",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "\tvar provider SearchProvider",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "\tvar err error",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 转换为 map[string]interface{} 以兼容各 Provider 接参",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "\tconfigMap := make(map[string]interface{})",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "\tswitch engine {",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "\tcase \"bocha\":",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tconfigMap[\"BochaApiKey\"] = toolCfg.Bocha.ApiKey",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tconfigMap[\"BochaBaseUrl\"] = toolCfg.Bocha.BaseUrl",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tprovider, err = NewBochaProvider(configMap)",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "\tcase \"serpapi\":",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tconfigMap[\"SerpAPIKey\"] = toolCfg.SerpApi.ApiKey",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tconfigMap[\"SerpAPIEngine\"] = \"google\"",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tif toolCfg.SerpApi.BaseUrl != \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t// 如果有自定义URL需求，此处可以扩展，目前原生没这个参数",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tprovider, err = NewSerpAPIProvider(configMap)",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "\tcase \"google\":",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tconfigMap[\"GoogleApiKey\"] = toolCfg.Google.ApiKey",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tconfigMap[\"GoogleSearchEngineId\"] = toolCfg.Google.Cx",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tprovider, err = NewGoogleProvider(configMap)",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "\tcase \"bing\":",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tconfigMap[\"BingApiKey\"] = toolCfg.Bing.ApiKey",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t// configMap[\"BingSafeSearch\"] = toolCfg.Bing.SafeSearch",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tprovider, err = NewBingProvider(configMap)",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "\tcase \"firecrawl\":",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t// Firecrawl Search 复用全局 Firecrawl ApiKey（与 firecrawl_scrape 相同）",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tfirecrawlCfg := cfg.Tools.Firecrawl",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tapiKey := firecrawlCfg.ApiKey",
            "lineNumber": 54
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.2802998125553131
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/tools_info.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 32
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "# DigEino 工具集概览 (Tools Information)",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "本文档旨在汇总 &#96;DigEino&#96; 中集成的所有 Eino 工具，详细说明其功能、参数及使用场景。",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "## 1. 调研与搜索 (Researcher &amp; Search)",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "这类工具旨在帮助 Agent 理解项目代码、阅读外部文档以及搜索互联网信息。",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "### 1.1 基础调研 (Basic Research)",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "| 工具名称 | 功能描述 | 主要参数 |",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "| :--- | :--- | :--- |",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "| &#96;research_grep&#96; | 在源码或指定目录中进行关键词检索（模拟 ripgrep）。 | &#96;query&#96;: 关键词; &#96;path&#96;: 搜索路径 |",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "| &#96;research_read&#96; | 精确读取指定文件的完整内容。 | &#96;path&#96;: 文件路径 |",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "| &#96;research_doc_to_md&#96; | 集成 **Unstructured.io**，将 PDF/Word/Docx 高质量转为 Markdown。 | &#96;path&#96;: 文档路径 |",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "### 1.2 高级检索 (Advanced Retrieval)",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "| 工具名称 | 功能描述 | 主要参数 |",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "| :--- | :--- | :--- |",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "| &#96;research_semantic_search&#96; | **向量语义搜索**。基于 Pinecone，通过相似度定位偏逻辑意图的内容。 | &#96;query&#96;: 搜索意图; &#96;max_results&#96;: 结果数 |",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "| &#96;research_code_index&#96; | **项目索引工具**。扫描指定目录并将代码/文档向量化存入 Pinecone。 | &#96;path&#96;: 目标目录 |",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "| &#96;web_search&#96; | **统一网页搜索**。支持 Bocha, SerpApi, Google, Bing, DuckDuckGo, Firecrawl 和 Tavily 引擎。 | &#96;query&#96;: 搜索词; &#96;max_results&#96;: 结果数; &#96;region&#96;: 地区 |",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {

          },
          {

          },

            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {

          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {

          },
          {

          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "text": "\tretryDelay := time.Duration(c.config.RetryDelay) * time.Millisecond",
            "lineNumber": 86
          },

          },
          {

          },

          },
          {

          },

          },

          {

          {
            "text": "func (c *WebhookClient) doPost(ctx context.Context, data []byte) error {",

          },
          {

          },

          },
          {

          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 110
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "text": "\treq, err := http.NewRequestWithContext(ctx, method, c.config.URL, bytes.NewBuffer(data))",
            "lineNumber": 112
          },

          },

          },

          },

            "lineNumber": 117
          },

            "lineNumber": 118
          },
          {

          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 120
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121
          },

          },
          {

          },

          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "text": "\tdefer resp.Body.Close()",
            "lineNumber": 126
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127
          },
          {

          },
          {

          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134
          },
          {
            "text": "func (c *WebhookClient) generateSignature(data []byte, secret string) string {",

          },

        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "// WebhookConfig 基础 Webhook 配置",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "type WebhookConfig struct {",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "\tURL        string            &#96;yaml:\"url\" json:\"url\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "\tMethod     string            &#96;yaml:\"method\" json:\"method,omitempty\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "\tHeaders    map[string]string &#96;yaml:\"headers\" json:\"headers,omitempty\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "\tSecret     string            &#96;yaml:\"secret\" json:\"secret,omitempty\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "\tTimeout    int               &#96;yaml:\"timeout\" json:\"timeout,omitempty\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "\tRetryDelay int               &#96;yaml:\"retry_delay\" json:\"retry_delay,omitempty\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "\tEvents     []string          &#96;yaml:\"events\" json:\"events,omitempty\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "// StatusStoreConfig 状态存储配置",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "type StatusStoreConfig struct {",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "\tEnabled *bool       &#96;yaml:\"Enabled\" json:\"Enabled,omitempty\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "text": "\tType    string      &#96;yaml:\"Type\" json:\"Type,omitempty\"&#96; // memory, mysql",
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "text": "\tMySQL   MySQLConfig &#96;yaml:\"MySQL\" json:\"MySQL\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "// MySQLConfig MySQL 配置",
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "text": "type MySQLConfig struct {",
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "\tHost        string &#96;yaml:\"Host\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "text": "\tUser        string &#96;yaml:\"User\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {

          },

            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "text": "// WeChatConfig 微信推送配置",
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "text": "type WeChatConfig struct {",
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "text": "\tEnabled       *bool    &#96;yaml:\"Enabled\" json:\"Enabled,omitempty\"&#96;             // 是否启用微信推送功能",
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "text": "\tAppID         string   &#96;yaml:\"AppID\" json:\"AppID,omitempty\"&#96;                 // 微信服务号 AppID",

            "lineNumber": 81

          {

          },

          {
            "text": "package webhook",

          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "import (",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 5
          },

            "lineNumber": 6

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/schema\"",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\"",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": ")",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "// StatusLogger 日志接口，调用方可选择性实现",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "type StatusLogger interface {",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "\tOnNodeStartLog(nodeKey, nodeType string, inputCount int)",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "\tOnNodeEndLog(nodeKey, nodeType string, outputCount int, err error)",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "\tOnCompleteLog(executionID string, duration time.Duration, usage *Usage)",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "// StatusCollector 状态收集器",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "type StatusCollector struct {",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "\texecutionID string",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "\tappName     string",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "\trequestID   string",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "\tstartTime   time.Time",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "\twebhookClients []*WebhookClient",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "\tstatusStore    StatusStoreInterface",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "\tstatusCallback func(status ExecutionStatus)",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30
          },

            "lineNumber": 31
          },

            "text": "\tstatusHistory []ExecutionStatus",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "\tnodeStartTime map[string]time.Time",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "\tpath          []string",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38
          },

            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 40
          },

            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "// NewStatusCollector 创建状态收集器，DataFlow 开关从 config.Get().Status.DataFlow 读取，默认关闭",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "func NewStatusCollector(executionID, appName, requestID string) *StatusCollector {",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "\tenableDataFlow := false",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif cfg := config.Get(); cfg != nil &amp;&amp; cfg.Status.DataFlow.Enabled != nil &amp;&amp; *cfg.Status.DataFlow.Enabled {",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tenableDataFlow = true",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "\treturn &amp;StatusCollector{",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\texecutionID:    executionID,",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tappName:        appName,",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\trequestID:      requestID,",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tstartTime:      time.Now(),",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tnodeStartTime:  make(map[string]time.Time),",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\ttokenUsageMap:  make(map[string]*Usage),",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tenableDataFlow: enableDataFlow,",
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "// EnableDataFlow 启用/禁用 DataFlow 追踪（优先级高于 eino.yml 配置）",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "text": "func (sc *StatusCollector) EnableDataFlow(enable bool) {",
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "text": "\tsc.mu.Lock()",
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "text": "\tdefer sc.mu.Unlock()",
            "lineNumber": 63
          },

          {
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "// SetLogger 设置日志 hook",
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "text": "func (sc *StatusCollector) SetLogger(logger StatusLogger) {",
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "text": "\tsc.mu.Lock()",
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "text": "\tdefer sc.mu.Unlock()",
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "text": "\tsc.logger = logger",
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "text": "// AddWebhookClient 添加 Webhook 客户端",
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "text": "func (sc *StatusCollector) AddWebhookClient(client *WebhookClient) {",
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "text": "\tsc.mu.Lock()",
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "text": "\tdefer sc.mu.Unlock()",
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "text": "\tsc.webhookClients =",
            "lineNumber": 78
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.3011283874511719
    },

          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./webhook/webhook_client.go",

        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "package webhook",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "import (",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"bytes\"",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"context\"",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"crypto/hmac\"",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"crypto/sha256\"",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"encoding/hex\"",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"encoding/json\"",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"fmt\"",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"net/http\"",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"time\"",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\"",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": ")",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "// WebhookClient Webhook 客户端",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "type WebhookClient struct {",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "\tconfig *config.WebhookConfig",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "\tclient *http.Client",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "var (",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 共享 Transport 以复用连接池",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "\tdefaultTransport = &amp;http.Transport{",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tMaxIdleConns:        100,",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tMaxIdleConnsPerHost: 100, // 显著提高单主机并发连接数，特别适用于本地 Webhook",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tIdleConnTimeout:     90 * time.Second,",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": ")",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "// NewWebhookClient 创建 Webhook 客户端",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "func NewWebhookClient(config *config.WebhookConfig) *WebhookClient {",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "\ttimeout := time.Duration(config.Timeout) * time.Second",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif timeout == 0 {",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\ttimeout = 5 * time.Second",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "\treturn &amp;WebhookClient{",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tconfig: config,",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tclient: &amp;http.Client{",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tTimeout:   timeout,",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tTransport: defaultTransport,",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t},",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "// SendStatus 发送状态更新",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "func (c *WebhookClient) SendStatus(ctx context.Context, status ExecutionStatus) error {",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 检查事件是否被订阅",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif len(c.config.Events) &gt; 0",
            "lineNumber": 51
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.29556751251220703
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/usage.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 80
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "# DigEino 使用指南",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;DigEino&#96; 是基于 &#96;Eino&#96; 的二次封装，旨在为 Go 项目提供统一的状态追踪、Webhook 回调及配置管理功能。",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "## 1. 安装",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "在您的 Go 项目中，通过以下命令导入：",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "go get github.com/originaleric/digeino",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "## 2. 配置管理",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;DigEino&#96; 提供了灵活的配置管理方式，推荐在项目启动时进行初始化。",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "### 2.1 依赖结构",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "配置主要包含两个部分：",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;HttpServer&#96;: 用于获取本地服务端口（构建默认 Webhook URL 时使用）。",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;Status&#96;: 包含 &#96;Webhook&#96; 和 &#96;Store&#96;（存储）的配置。",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "### 2.2 使用示例",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "#### 方式 A：从 YAML 文件加载（推荐）",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "首先，在您的项目中准备一个 &#96;config.yaml&#96; 文件（可以参考 &#96;DigEino/config/config.yaml&#96;）：",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "HttpServer:",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "  Api:",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "    Port: \":20201\"",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "Status:",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "  Webhook:",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "    Enabled: true",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "    URL: \"https://your-callback-url.com/webhook\"",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "    Events: [\"complete\", \"error\"]",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "  Store:",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "    Enabled: true",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "    Type: \"memory\" # 或 \"mysql\"",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "然后在代码中加载：",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "import \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\"",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "func main() {",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "    // 加载配置文件",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "    _, err := config.Load(\"path/to/your/config.yaml\")",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "    if err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "        panic(err)",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "#### 方式 B：在代码中手动设置",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "text": "import \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\"",
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "text": "func initConfig() {",
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "text": "    cfg := config.Default()",
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "    cfg.Status.Webhook.Config.URL = \"https://custom-url.com\"",
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "text": "    config.Set(cfg)",
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "text": "## 3. 核心功能使用",
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "text": "### 3.1 状态存储 (Status Store)",
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;DigEino&#96; 支持将执行状态存储在内存或 MySQL 中。",
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go",
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "text": "import \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/status\"",
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "text": "func someProcess() {",
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "text": "    // 获取默认存储实例（根据配置自动选择 memory 或 mysql）",
            "lineNumber": 80
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.2824796438217163
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./webhook/status_collector.go",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 207,
            "column": 37
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 285,
            "column": 77
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "func (sc *StatusCollector) sendStatusAsync(ctx context.Context, status ExecutionStatus) {",
            "lineNumber": 209
          },
          {
            "text": "\tsc.mu.Lock()",
            "lineNumber": 210
          },
          {
            "text": "\tsc.statusHistory = append(sc.statusHistory, status)",
            "lineNumber": 211
          },
          {
            "text": "\tcallback := sc.statusCallback",
            "lineNumber": 212
          },
          {
            "text": "\tstore := sc.statusStore",
            "lineNumber": 213
          },
          {
            "text": "\tclients := sc.webhookClients",
            "lineNumber": 214
          },
          {
            "text": "\tsc.mu.Unlock()",
            "lineNumber": 215
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 216
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 1. 优先执行回调（SSE 等），虽然它是同步调用，但在应用端可能已实现异步",
            "lineNumber": 217
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif callback != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 218
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tcallback(status)",
            "lineNumber": 219
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 220
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 221
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 2. 异步存储状态，避免数据库等慢操作阻塞主流程",
            "lineNumber": 222
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif store != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 223
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tgo func() {",
            "lineNumber": 224
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tstore.AddStatus(sc.executionID, status)",
            "lineNumber": 225
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t}()",
            "lineNumber": 226
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 227
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 228
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 3. 异步发送 Webhook",
            "lineNumber": 229
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif len(clients) &gt; 0 {",
            "lineNumber": 230
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tgo func() {",
            "lineNumber": 231
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tfor _, client := range clients {",
            "lineNumber": 232
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\t_ = client.SendStatus(ctx, status)",
            "lineNumber": 233
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 234
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t}()",
            "lineNumber": 235
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 236
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 237
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 238
          },
          {
            "text": "// CollectTokenUsage 收集TokenUsage",
            "lineNumber": 239
          },
          {
            "text": "func (sc *StatusCollector) CollectTokenUsage(nodeKey string, usage *Usage) {",
            "lineNumber": 240
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif usage == nil {",
            "lineNumber": 241
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn",
            "lineNumber": 242
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 243
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 244
          },
          {
            "text": "\tsc.mu.Lock()",
            "lineNumber": 245
          },
          {
            "text": "\tdefer sc.mu.Unlock()",
            "lineNumber": 246
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 247
          },
          {
            "text": "\tsc.tokenUsageMap[nodeKey] = usage",
            "lineNumber": 248
          },
          {

          },
          {

          },
          {

          {

      "codeBlock": {

        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "package webhook",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "// Usage 使用量统计",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "type Usage struct {",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "\tPromptTokens     int &#96;json:\"prompt_tokens\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": "\tCompletionTokens int &#96;json:\"completion_tokens\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "\tTotalTokens      int &#96;json:\"total_tokens\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "// ExecutionStatus 执行状态",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "type ExecutionStatus struct {",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 基础信息",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "\tType        string &#96;json:\"type\"&#96;         // \"node_start\" | \"node_end\" | \"data_flow\" | \"control_flow\" | \"error\" | \"complete\"",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "\tTimestamp   int64  &#96;json:\"timestamp\"&#96;    // Unix 时间戳（毫秒）",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "\tExecutionID string &#96;json:\"execution_id\"&#96; // 执行 ID（用于关联）",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 节点信息",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "\tNodeKey  string &#96;json:\"node_key,omitempty\"&#96;  // 节点标识",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "\tNodeType string &#96;json:\"node_type,omitempty\"&#96; // 节点类型",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "\tStatus   string &#96;json:\"status\"&#96;              // \"running\" | \"success\" | \"error\"",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "\tError    string &#96;json:\"error,omitempty\"&#96;     // 错误信息",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 数据流信息",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "\tDataFlow *DataFlowStatus &#96;json:\"data_flow,omitempty\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 控制流信息",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "\tControlFlow *ControlFlowStatus &#96;json:\"control_flow,omitempty\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 执行上下文",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "\tAppName   string &#96;json:\"app_name\"&#96;   // Agent 名称",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "\tRequestID string &#96;json:\"request_id\"&#96; // 请求 ID（可选）",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// Usage 信息（可选）",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "\tUsage *Usage &#96;json:\"usage,omitempty\"&#96; // Token 使用统计",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "// DataFlowStatus 数据流状态",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "type DataFlowStatus struct {",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "\tInputCount  int                      &#96;json:\"input_count\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "\tOutputCount int                      &#96;json:\"output_count\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "\tInputData   []map[string]interface{} &#96;json:\"input_data,omitempty\"&#96;  // 可选，可配置是否包含",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "\tOutputData  []map[string]interface{} &#96;json:\"output_data,omitempty\"&#96; // 可选",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "// ControlFlowStatus 控制流状态",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "type ControlFlowStatus struct {",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "\tBranchFrom string   &#96;json:\"branch_from,omitempty\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "\tBranchTo   string   &#96;json:\"branch_to,omitempty\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "\tCondition  string   &#96;json:\"condition,omitempty\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "\tPath       []string &#96;json:\"path\"&#96; // 执行路径",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 55
          }
        ]
      },

          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "// memoryStatusStore 内存实现",

          {
            "lineNumber": 45
          },

            "lineNumber": 52

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./webhook/context.go",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 20,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "package webhook",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "import (",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"context\"",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": ")",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "// statusCollectorKey 状态收集器在Context中的key",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "type statusCollectorKey struct{}",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "// WithStatusCollector 将状态收集器注入到Context中",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "func WithStatusCollector(ctx context.Context, collector *StatusCollector) context.Context {",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "\treturn context.WithValue(ctx, statusCollectorKey{}, collector)",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "// GetStatusCollector 从Context中获取状态收集器",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "func GetStatusCollector(ctx context.Context) *StatusCollector {",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif collector, ok := ctx.Value(statusCollectorKey{}).(*StatusCollector); ok {",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn collector",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "\treturn nil",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 21
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.24797946214675903
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/updates/2026-01-11-performance-optimization.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 25
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "# DigEino Performance Optimization Update - 2026-01-11",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "## Overview",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "This update focuses on improving the responsiveness of Eino-based applications by eliminating blocking operations in the status collection and webhook delivery layer.",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": "## Key Changes",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "### 1. Asynchronous Status Collection",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "The &#96;StatusCollector&#96; has been refactored to prevent slowing down the main execution graph during state persistence and webhook delivery.",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Async Execution**: &#96;StatusStore.AddStatus&#96; and &#96;WebhookClient.SendStatus&#96; now run in their own goroutines.",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Benefit**: Zero-latency impact on the Eino Graph from slow database writes or network-constrained webhook endpoints.",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Affected File**: &#96;webhook/status_collector.go&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "### 2. HTTP Connection Pooling for Webhooks",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;WebhookClient&#96; now utilizes a shared, high-performance HTTP Transport.",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Connection Reuse**: Configured &#96;MaxIdleConns&#96; and &#96;MaxIdleConnsPerHost&#96; to &#96;100&#96; to support high-frequency event delivery.",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Benefit**: Significantly reduces per-request overhead and prevents port exhaustion under load.",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Affected File**: &#96;webhook/webhook_client.go&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "### 3. Improved Token Usage Tracking",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Aggregation**: Enhanced the &#96;CollectTokenUsage&#96; logic to accurately sum tokens across complex parallel and nested nodes.",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Benefit**: Provides a reliable metric for cost and performance monitoring.",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "## Impact",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "These changes collectively allow &#96;DigFlow&#96; and other dependent agents to achieve significantly higher throughput and lower end-to-end latency, especially in multi-node graph architectures.",
            "lineNumber": 25
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.23196953535079956
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/usage.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 78
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 164
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "func someProcess() {",
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "text": "    // 获取默认存储实例（根据配置自动选择 memory 或 mysql）",
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "text": "    store := status.GetDefaultStore()",
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "text": "    ",
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "text": "    // 创建执行记录",
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "text": "    record := store.CreateExecution(\"exec_id_001\", \"my_app\", \"req_id_001\")",
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "text": "    ",
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "text": "    // 更新状态",
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "text": "    store.AddStatus(\"exec_id_001\", webhook.ExecutionStatus{",
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "text": "        Type: \"node_start\",",
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "text": "        NodeKey: \"node_1\",",
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "text": "        Status: \"running\",",
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "text": "    })",
            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 92
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 93
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "text": "### 3.2 Webhook 客户端",
            "lineNumber": 95
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {
            "text": "用于将状态更新通过 HTTP 回调发送给第三方系统。",
            "lineNumber": 97
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go",
            "lineNumber": 99
          },
          {
            "text": "import (",
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/webhook\"",
            "lineNumber": 101
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\"",
            "lineNumber": 102
          },
          {
            "text": ")",
            "lineNumber": 103
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104
          },
          {
            "text": "func notifyCallback() {",
            "lineNumber": 105
          },
          {
            "text": "    // 获取 Webhook 配置",
            "lineNumber": 106
          },
          {
            "text": "    webhookCfg := webhook.GetWebhookConfig(nil)",
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "text": "    if webhookCfg == nil {",
            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "text": "        return",
            "lineNumber": 109
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 110
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "text": "    client := webhook.NewWebhookClient(webhookCfg)",
            "lineNumber": 112
          },
          {
            "text": "    err := client.SendStatus(context.Background(), statusInfo)",
            "lineNumber": 113
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 114
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 115
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116
          },
          {
            "text": "## 4. AgentState 扩展字段",
            "lineNumber": 117
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;AgentState&#96; 结构体提供了 &#96;Extensions&#96; 字段，允许各个项目存储特定的扩展数据，而无需修改核心库。",
            "lineNumber": 119
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120
          },
          {
            "text": "### 4.1 基本使用",
            "lineNumber": 121
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go",
            "lineNumber": 123
          },
          {
            "text": "import \"github.com/originaleric/digeino\"",
            "lineNumber": 124
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "text": "// 创建 AgentState",
            "lineNumber": 126
          },
          {
            "text": "state := &amp;digeino.AgentState{",
            "lineNumber": 127
          },
          {
            "text": "    SessionID: \"session_001\",",
            "lineNumber": 128
          },
          {
            "text": "    Query:     \"用户查询\",",
            "lineNumber": 129
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 130
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131
          },
          {
            "text": "// 设置扩展字段（字符串类型）",
            "lineNumber": 132
          },
          {
            "text": "state.SetStringExtension(\"pdf_path\", \"/path/to/file.pdf\")",
            "lineNumber": 133
          },
          {
            "text": "state.SetStringExtension(\"custom_field\", \"custom_value\")",
            "lineNumber": 134
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135
          },
          {
            "text": "// 设置扩展字段（整数类型）",
            "lineNumber": 136
          },
          {
            "text": "state.SetIntExtension(\"page_count\", 10)",
            "lineNumber": 137
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138
          },
          {
            "text": "// 设置扩展字段（布尔类型）",
            "lineNumber": 139
          },
          {
            "text": "state.SetBoolExtension(\"is_processed\", true)",
            "lineNumber": 140
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141
          },
          {
            "text": "// 设置任意类型的扩展字段",
            "lineNumber": 142
          },
          {
            "text": "state.SetExtension(\"complex_data\", map[string]interface{}{",
            "lineNumber": 143
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"key1\": \"value1\",",
            "lineNumber": 144
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"key2\": 123,",
            "lineNumber": 145
          },
          {
            "text": "})",
            "lineNumber": 146
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 147
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148
          },
          {
            "text": "### 4.2 获取扩展字段",
            "lineNumber": 149
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 150
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go",
            "lineNumber": 151
          },
          {
            "text": "// 获取字符串类型",
            "lineNumber": 152
          },
          {
            "text": "pdfPath, ok := state.GetStringExtension(\"pdf_path\")",
            "lineNumber": 153
          },
          {
            "text": "if ok {",
            "lineNumber": 154
          },
          {
            "text": "    fmt.Printf(\"PDF Path: %s\\n\", pdfPath)",
            "lineNumber": 155
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 156
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 157
          },
          {
            "text": "// 获取整数类型",
            "lineNumber": 158
          },
          {
            "text": "pageCount, ok := state.GetIntExtension(\"page_count\")",
            "lineNumber": 159
          },
          {
            "text": "if ok {",
            "lineNumber": 160
          },
          {
            "text": "    fmt.Printf(\"Page Count: %d\\n\", pageCount)",
            "lineNumber": 161
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 162
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 163
          },
          {
            "text": "// 获取布尔类型",
            "lineNumber": 164
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.2300979048013687
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./status/status_store.go",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {

        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "func (s *mysqlStatusStore) GetExecution(executionID string) (*ExecutionRecord, bool) {",
            "lineNumber": 201
          },
          {
            "text": "\tvar model MySQLExecutionModel",
            "lineNumber": 202
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err := s.db.Table(s.execTable).Where(\"execution_id = ?\", executionID).First(&amp;model).Error; err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 203
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, false",
            "lineNumber": 204
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 205
          },
          {
            "text": "\treturn &amp;ExecutionRecord{",
            "lineNumber": 206
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tExecutionID: model.ExecutionID,",
            "lineNumber": 207
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tAppName:     model.AppName,",
            "lineNumber": 208
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tRequestID:   model.RequestID,",
            "lineNumber": 209
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tStartTime:   model.StartTime,",
            "lineNumber": 210
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tEndTime:     model.EndTime,",
            "lineNumber": 211
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tStatus:      model.Status,",
            "lineNumber": 212
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tError:       model.Error,",
            "lineNumber": 213
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}, true",
            "lineNumber": 214
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 215
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 216
          },
          {
            "text": "func (s *mysqlStatusStore) AddStatus(executionID string, status webhook.ExecutionStatus) bool {",
            "lineNumber": 217
          },
          {
            "text": "\tvar dataJson, controlJson string",
            "lineNumber": 218
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif status.DataFlow != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 219
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tb, _ := json.Marshal(status.DataFlow)",
            "lineNumber": 220
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tdataJson = string(b)",
            "lineNumber": 221
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 222
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif status.ControlFlow != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 223
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tb, _ := json.Marshal(status.ControlFlow)",
            "lineNumber": 224
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tcontrolJson = string(b)",
            "lineNumber": 225
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 226
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 227
          },
          {
            "text": "\tstatusModel := &amp;MySQLExecutionStatusModel{",
            "lineNumber": 228
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tExecutionID:  executionID,",
            "lineNumber": 229
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tType:         status.Type,",
            "lineNumber": 230
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tTimestampMs:  status.Timestamp,",
            "lineNumber": 231
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tNodeKey:      status.NodeKey,",
            "lineNumber": 232
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tNodeType:     status.NodeType,",
            "lineNumber": 233
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tStatus:       status.Status,",
            "lineNumber": 234
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tError:        status.Error,",
            "lineNumber": 235
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tAppName:      status.AppName,",
            "lineNumber": 236
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tRequestID:    status.RequestID,",
            "lineNumber": 237
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tDataFlowJSON: dataJson,",
            "lineNumber": 238
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tControlJSON:  controlJson,",
            "lineNumber": 239
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 240
          },
          {
            "text": "\ts.db.Table(s.statusTable).Create(statusModel)",
            "lineNumber": 241
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 242
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif status.Type == \"complete\" {",
            "lineNumber": 243
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tupdate := map[string]interface{}{",
            "lineNumber": 244
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\"status\":   \"completed\",",
            "lineNumber": 245
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\"end_time\": time.Now(),",
            "lineNumber": 246
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 247
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tif status.Status == \"error\" {",
            "lineNumber": 248
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tupdate[\"status\"] = \"failed\"",
            "lineNumber": 249
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tupdate[\"error\"] = status.Error",
            "lineNumber": 250
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 251
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\ts.db.Table(s.execTable).Where(\"execution_id = ?\", executionID).Updates(update)",
            "lineNumber": 252
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 253
          },
          {
            "text": "\treturn true",
            "lineNumber": 254
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 255
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 256
          },
          {
            "text": "func (s *mysqlStatusStore) SetResult(executionID string, result webhook.Message) bool {",
            "lineNumber": 257
          },
          {
            "text": "\tupdate := map[string]interface{}{",
            "lineNumber": 258
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\"result_role\":    result.Role,",
            "lineNumber": 259
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\"result_content\": result.Content,",
            "lineNumber": 260
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 261
          },
          {
            "text": "\ts.db.Table(s.execTable).Where(\"execution_id = ?\", executionID).Updates(update)",
            "lineNumber": 262
          },
          {
            "text": "\treturn true",
            "lineNumber": 263
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 264
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 265
          },
          {
            "text": "func (s *mysqlStatusStore) ListExecutions(page, pageSize int)",
            "lineNumber": 266
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.21778953075408936
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {

        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "package status",

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },

          },

          },
          {
            "text": "// StatusStoreAdapter 适配器，将 status.StatusStore 适配为 webhook.StatusStoreInterface",

          },

          },

          },
          {

          },

          },

            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {

          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {

          },
          {

          },
          {
            "text": "func (a *StatusStoreAdapter) CreateExecution(executionID, appName, requestID string) interface{} {",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },

            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "}",

          },
          {

          },
          {

          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./webhook/status_collector.go",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {

        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "func (sc *StatusCollector) OnNodeEnd(ctx context.Context, nodeKey, nodeType string, output interface{}, err error) {",
            "lineNumber": 127
          },
          {
            "text": "\tsc.mu.Lock()",
            "lineNumber": 128
          },
          {
            "text": "\tstartTime, ok := sc.nodeStartTime[nodeKey]",
            "lineNumber": 129
          },
          {
            "text": "\tlogger := sc.logger",
            "lineNumber": 130
          },
          {
            "text": "\tsc.mu.Unlock()",
            "lineNumber": 131
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132
          },
          {
            "text": "\tvar nodeUsage *Usage",
            "lineNumber": 133
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif nodeType == \"chat_model\" {",
            "lineNumber": 134
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tnodeUsage = extractUsageFromOutput(output)",
            "lineNumber": 135
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tif nodeUsage != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 136
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tsc.CollectTokenUsage(nodeKey, nodeUsage)",
            "lineNumber": 137
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 138
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 139
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140
          },
          {
            "text": "\tstatus := ExecutionStatus{",
            "lineNumber": 141
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tType:        \"node_end\",",
            "lineNumber": 142
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tTimestamp:   time.Now().UnixMilli(),",
            "lineNumber": 143
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tExecutionID: sc.executionID,",
            "lineNumber": 144
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tNodeKey:     nodeKey,",
            "lineNumber": 145
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tNodeType:    nodeType,",
            "lineNumber": 146
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tStatus:      \"success\",",
            "lineNumber": 147
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tAppName:     sc.appName,",
            "lineNumber": 148
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tRequestID:   sc.requestID,",
            "lineNumber": 149
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tDataFlow:    sc.marshalDataFlow(nil, output),",
            "lineNumber": 150
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tUsage:       nodeUsage,",
            "lineNumber": 151
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 152
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 153
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif ok {",
            "lineNumber": 154
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t_ = time.Since(startTime)",
            "lineNumber": 155
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 156
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 157
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 158
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tstatus.Status = \"error\"",
            "lineNumber": 159
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tstatus.Error = err.Error()",
            "lineNumber": 160
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 161
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif logger != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 163
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\toutputCount := 0",
            "lineNumber": 164
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tif status.DataFlow != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 165
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\toutputCount = status.DataFlow.OutputCount",
            "lineNumber": 166
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 167
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tlogger.OnNodeEndLog(nodeKey, nodeType, outputCount, err)",
            "lineNumber": 168
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 169
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 170
          },
          {
            "text": "\tsc.sendStatusAsync(ctx, status)",
            "lineNumber": 171
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 172
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 173
          },
          {
            "text": "// OnComplete 执行完成",
            "lineNumber": 174
          },
          {
            "text": "func (sc *StatusCollector) OnComplete(ctx context.Context, result *schema.Message, err error) {",
            "lineNumber": 175
          },
          {
            "text": "\tsc.mu.Lock()",
            "lineNumber": 176
          },
          {
            "text": "\tpath := make([]string, len(sc.path))",
            "lineNumber": 177
          },
          {
            "text": "\tcopy(path, sc.path)",
            "lineNumber": 178
          },
          {
            "text": "\ttotalUsage := sc.getTotalUsageLocked()",
            "lineNumber": 179
          },
          {
            "text": "\tlogger := sc.logger",
            "lineNumber": 180
          },
          {
            "text": "\tsc.mu.Unlock()",
            "lineNumber": 181
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 182
          },
          {
            "text": "\tstatus := ExecutionStatus{",
            "lineNumber": 183
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tType:        \"complete\",",
            "lineNumber": 184
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tTimestamp:   time.Now().UnixMilli(),",
            "lineNumber": 185
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tExecutionID: sc.executionID,",
            "lineNumber": 186
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tStatus:      \"success\",",
            "lineNumber": 187
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tAppName:     sc.appName,",
            "lineNumber": 188
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tRequestID:   sc.requestID,",
            "lineNumber": 189
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tControlFlow: &amp;ControlFlowStatus{",
            "lineNumber": 190
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tPath: path,",
            "lineNumber": 191
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t},",
            "lineNumber": 192
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tUsage: totalUsage,",
            "lineNumber": 193
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 194
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 195
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 196
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tstatus.Status = \"error\"",
            "lineNumber": 197
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tstatus.Error = err.Error()",
            "lineNumber": 198
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 199
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 200
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif logger != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 201
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tlogger.OnCompleteLog(sc.executionID, time.Since(sc.startTime), totalUsage)",
            "lineNumber": 202
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 203
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 204
          },
          {
            "text": "\tsc.sendStatusAsync(ctx, status)",
            "lineNumber": 205
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 206
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 207
          },
          {
            "text": "// sendStatusAsync 异步发送状态",
            "lineNumber": 208
          },
          {
            "text": "func (sc *StatusCollector) sendStatusAsync(ctx context.Context, status ExecutionStatus) {",
            "lineNumber": 209
          },
          {
            "text": "\tsc.mu.Lock()",
            "lineNumber": 210
          },
          {
            "text": "\tsc.statusHistory = append(sc.statusHistory, status)",
            "lineNumber": 211
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.19377629458904266
