    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/research/jina_reader.go",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 67,
            "column": 76
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "package research",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "import (",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"context\"",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"encoding/json\"",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"fmt\"",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"io\"",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"net/http\"",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"strings\"",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"time\"",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool\"",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool/utils\"",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": ")",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "// JinaReaderRequest 网页读取请求",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "type JinaReaderRequest struct {",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "\tURL string &#96;json:\"url\" jsonschema:\"required,description=要读取并转换为 Markdown 的网页 URL\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "// JinaReaderResponse 网页读取响应",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "type JinaReaderResponse struct {",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "\tMarkdown string &#96;json:\"markdown\" jsonschema:\"description=转换后的 Markdown 内容\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "// JinaReader 使用 r.jina.ai 将网页转换为 Markdown",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "// 这是一个极其强大的抓取方案，能够有效绕过微信公众号等平台的反爬验证",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "func JinaReader(ctx context.Context, req *JinaReaderRequest) (*JinaReaderResponse, error) {",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif req.URL == \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"URL 不能为空\")",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 构造 Jina Reader URL",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "\tjinaURL := fmt.Sprintf(\"https://r.jina.ai/%s\", req.URL)",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "\thttpReq, err := http.NewRequestWithContext(ctx, \"GET\", jinaURL, nil)",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"创建请求失败: %w\", err)",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 设置 Header 为 text/event-stream",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 实验证明 Jina Reader 的免费模式对 event-stream 的反爬支持更佳",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "\thttpReq.Header.Set(\"Accept\", \"text/event-stream\")",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "\tclient := &amp;http.Client{Timeout: 90 * time.Second}",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "\tresp, err := client.Do(httpReq)",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"请求 Jina Reader 失败: %w\", err)",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "\tdefer resp.Body.Close()",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif resp.StatusCode != http.StatusOK {",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tbody, _ := io.ReadAll(resp.Body)",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"Jina Reader 返回错误: %d, body: %s\", resp.StatusCode, string(body))",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "\tbody, err := io.ReadAll(resp.Body)",
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"读取响应失败: %w\", err)",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 简单的 EventStream 解析逻辑 (Jina Reader 的格式通常是 data: {...})",
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 我们尝试寻找 data: 开头的行并提取其中的 content",
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "text": "\tcontent := string(body)",
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 如果是 event-stream 格式，尝试提取数据部分",
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 为简单起见，如果包含 \"data: {\" 则尝试剥离前缀，",
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 但其实 Jina Reader 在 event-stream 模式下如果是完整返回，",
            "lineNumber": 68
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.19257940351963043
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {

        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "func (s *memoryStatusStore) AddStatus(executionID string, status webhook.ExecutionStatus) bool {",
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "text": "\ts.mu.RLock()",
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "text": "\trecord, exists := s.executions[executionID]",
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "text": "\ts.mu.RUnlock()",
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif !exists {",
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn false",
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "text": "\trecord.mu.Lock()",
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "text": "\tdefer record.mu.Unlock()",
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "text": "\trecord.StatusHistory = append(record.StatusHistory, status)",
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif status.Type == \"complete\" {",
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tif status.Status == \"error\" {",
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\trecord.Status = \"failed\"",
            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\trecord.Error = status.Error",
            "lineNumber": 92
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t} else {",
            "lineNumber": 93
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\trecord.Status = \"completed\"",
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 95
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tnow := time.Now()",
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\trecord.EndTime = &amp;now",
            "lineNumber": 97
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 98
          },
          {
            "text": "\treturn true",
            "lineNumber": 99
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101
          },
          {
            "text": "func (s *memoryStatusStore) SetResult(executionID string, result webhook.Message) bool {",
            "lineNumber": 102
          },
          {
            "text": "\ts.mu.RLock()",
            "lineNumber": 103
          },
          {
            "text": "\trecord, exists := s.executions[executionID]",
            "lineNumber": 104
          },
          {
            "text": "\ts.mu.RUnlock()",
            "lineNumber": 105
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif !exists {",
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn false",
            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 109
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110
          },
          {
            "text": "\trecord.mu.Lock()",
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "text": "\tdefer record.mu.Unlock()",
            "lineNumber": 112
          },
          {
            "text": "\trecord.Result = &amp;result",
            "lineNumber": 113
          },
          {
            "text": "\treturn true",
            "lineNumber": 114
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 115
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116
          },
          {
            "text": "func (s *memoryStatusStore) ListExecutions(page, pageSize int) ([]*ExecutionRecord, int) {",
            "lineNumber": 117
          },
          {
            "text": "\ts.mu.RLock()",
            "lineNumber": 118
          },
          {
            "text": "\tdefer s.mu.RUnlock()",
            "lineNumber": 119
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120
          },
          {
            "text": "\trecords := make([]*ExecutionRecord, 0, len(s.executions))",
            "lineNumber": 121
          },
          {
            "text": "\tfor _, r := range s.executions {",
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\trecords = append(records, r)",
            "lineNumber": 123
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 124
          },
          {
            "text": "\treturn records, len(records)",
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 126
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127
          },
          {
            "text": "// MySQL 模型",
            "lineNumber": 128
          },
          {
            "text": "type MySQLExecutionModel struct {",
            "lineNumber": 129
          },
          {
            "text": "\tID            uint32     &#96;gorm:\"primaryKey;column:id;autoIncrement\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 130
          },
          {
            "text": "\tExecutionID   string     &#96;gorm:\"column:execution_id;size:64;not null;uniqueIndex\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 131
          },
          {
            "text": "\tAppName       string     &#96;gorm:\"column:app_name;size:100;not null;index\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 132
          },
          {
            "text": "\tRequestID     string     &#96;gorm:\"column:request_id;size:100;not null;index\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 133
          },
          {
            "text": "\tStartTime     time.Time  &#96;gorm:\"column:start_time;not null\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 134
          },
          {
            "text": "\tEndTime       *time.Time &#96;gorm:\"column:end_time\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 135
          },
          {
            "text": "\tStatus        string     &#96;gorm:\"column:status;size:32;not null\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 136
          },
          {
            "text": "\tError         string     &#96;gorm:\"column:error;type:text\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 137
          },
          {
            "text": "\tResultRole    string     &#96;gorm:\"column:result_role;size:32\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 138
          },
          {
            "text": "\tResultContent string     &#96;gorm:\"column:result_content;type:text\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 139
          },
          {
            "text": "\tCreatedAt     time.Time  &#96;gorm:\"column:created_at;autoCreateTime\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 140
          },
          {
            "text": "\tUpdatedAt     time.Time  &#96;gorm:\"column:updated_at;autoUpdateTime\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 141
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 142
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143
          },
          {
            "text": "type MySQLExecutionStatusModel struct {",
            "lineNumber": 144
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.18980473279953003
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/updates/2026-03-06_StatusCollector增强与DataFlow配置.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 31
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "# 2026-03-06 StatusCollector 增强与 DataFlow 配置",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "## 概述",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "对 &#96;webhook.StatusCollector&#96; 进行四项增强：DataFlow 数据流追踪（支持通过 eino.yml 配置开关，默认关闭）、chat_model 节点自动提取 Token Usage、OnComplete 事件附带汇总 Usage、以及可配置的日志 Hook。现有项目无需修改配置文件即可兼容。",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "## 变更文件",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "### config/config.go",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "- **StatusConfig** 新增字段：&#96;DataFlow DataFlowConfig&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "- **DataFlowConfig** 新增类型：&#96;Enabled *bool&#96;（nil 或 false 表示关闭，默认关闭）",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Default()** 中为 &#96;Status.DataFlow.Enabled&#96; 赋默认值 &#96;false&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "### webhook/types.go",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "- **ExecutionStatus** 新增字段：&#96;Usage *Usage&#96;（&#96;json:\"usage,omitempty\"&#96;），用于在 node_end / complete 事件中携带 Token 统计",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "### webhook/status_collector.go",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "- **StatusLogger** 新增接口：&#96;OnNodeStartLog&#96;、&#96;OnNodeEndLog&#96;、&#96;OnCompleteLog&#96;，供调用方注入 zap/slog 等实现",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "- **StatusCollector** 新增字段：&#96;enableDataFlow bool&#96;（从 config 读取）、&#96;logger StatusLogger&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "- **NewStatusCollector**：创建时从 &#96;config.Get().Status.DataFlow.Enabled&#96; 读取 DataFlow 开关，未配置或为 false 时默认关闭",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "- **EnableDataFlow(enable bool)**：手动覆盖配置（优先级高于 eino.yml）",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "- **SetLogger(logger StatusLogger)**：设置日志 Hook",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "- **OnNodeStart**：写入 &#96;DataFlow&#96;（当 enableDataFlow 为 true 时），并调用 &#96;logger.OnNodeStartLog&#96;（若已设置）",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "- **OnNodeEnd**：写入 &#96;DataFlow&#96;；当节点类型为 &#96;chat_model&#96; 时自动从输出提取 Usage 并调用 &#96;CollectTokenUsage&#96;，同时在 status 中携带 &#96;Usage&#96;；调用 &#96;logger.OnNodeEndLog&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "- **OnComplete**：在 status 中携带汇总 &#96;Usage&#96;，并调用 &#96;logger.OnCompleteLog&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "- **marshalDataFlow**：通用序列化，支持 &#96;[]*schema.Message&#96;、&#96;*schema.Message&#96; 及任意类型的 JSON 序列化",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "- **extractUsageFromOutput** / **extractUsageFromMessage**：从 chat_model 输出的 &#96;ResponseMeta.Usage&#96; 提取 Token 统计",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "- **getTotalUsageLocked**：在持锁下返回汇总 Usage，供 OnComplete 使用",
            "lineNumber": 31
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.1873796582221985
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./status/status_store.go",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 141,
            "column": 1
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 200,
            "column": 59
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "type MySQLExecutionStatusModel struct {",
            "lineNumber": 144
          },
          {
            "text": "\tID           uint32 &#96;gorm:\"primaryKey;column:id;autoIncrement\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 145
          },
          {
            "text": "\tExecutionID  string &#96;gorm:\"column:execution_id;size:64;not null;index\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 146
          },
          {
            "text": "\tType         string &#96;gorm:\"column:type;size:32;not null\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 147
          },
          {
            "text": "\tTimestampMs  int64  &#96;gorm:\"column:timestamp_ms;not null\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 148
          },
          {
            "text": "\tNodeKey      string &#96;gorm:\"column:node_key;size:100\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 149
          },
          {
            "text": "\tNodeType     string &#96;gorm:\"column:node_type;size:50\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 150
          },
          {
            "text": "\tStatus       string &#96;gorm:\"column:status;size:32;not null\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 151
          },
          {
            "text": "\tError        string &#96;gorm:\"column:error;type:text\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 152
          },
          {
            "text": "\tAppName      string &#96;gorm:\"column:app_name;size:100;not null;index\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 153
          },
          {
            "text": "\tRequestID    string &#96;gorm:\"column:request_id;size:100;not null;index\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 154
          },
          {
            "text": "\tDataFlowJSON string &#96;gorm:\"column:data_flow;type:text\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 155
          },
          {
            "text": "\tControlJSON  string &#96;gorm:\"column:control_flow;type:text\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 156
          },
          {
            "text": "\tCreatedAt    time.Time",

            "text": "\t\t\t\t\"ApiKey\":  \"\",",
            "lineNumber": 311
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\"Model\":   \"qwen-max\",",
            "lineNumber": 312
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\"BaseUrl\": \"https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1\",",
            "lineNumber": 313
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t},",
            "lineNumber": 314
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t},",
            "lineNumber": 315
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tUIUX: UIUXConfig{",
            "lineNumber": 316
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tStorage: UIUXStorageConfig{",
            "lineNumber": 317
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\tBaseDir: \"storage/app/ui_ux\",",
            "lineNumber": 318
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t},",
            "lineNumber": 319
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t},",
            "lineNumber": 320
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tTools: ToolsConfig{",
            "lineNumber": 321
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tFirecrawl: FirecrawlConfig{",
            "lineNumber": 322
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\tApiKey: \"\",",
            "lineNumber": 323
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t},",
            "lineNumber": 324
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.27882230281829834
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/usage.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 80
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "# DigEino 使用指南",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;DigEino&#96; 是基于 &#96;Eino&#96; 的二次封装，旨在为 Go 项目提供统一的状态追踪、Webhook 回调及配置管理功能。",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "## 1. 安装",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "在您的 Go 项目中，通过以下命令导入：",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "go get github.com/originaleric/digeino",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "## 2. 配置管理",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;DigEino&#96; 提供了灵活的配置管理方式，推荐在项目启动时进行初始化。",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "### 2.1 依赖结构",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "配置主要包含两个部分：",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;HttpServer&#96;: 用于获取本地服务端口（构建默认 Webhook URL 时使用）。",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;Status&#96;: 包含 &#96;Webhook&#96; 和 &#96;Store&#96;（存储）的配置。",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "### 2.2 使用示例",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "#### 方式 A：从 YAML 文件加载（推荐）",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "首先，在您的项目中准备一个 &#96;config.yaml&#96; 文件（可以参考 &#96;DigEino/config/config.yaml&#96;）：",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "HttpServer:",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "  Api:",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "    Port: \":20201\"",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "Status:",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "  Webhook:",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "    Enabled: true",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "    URL: \"https://your-callback-url.com/webhook\"",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "    Events: [\"complete\", \"error\"]",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "  Store:",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "    Enabled: true",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "    Type: \"memory\" # 或 \"mysql\"",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "然后在代码中加载：",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "import \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\"",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "func main() {",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "    // 加载配置文件",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "    _, err := config.Load(\"path/to/your/config.yaml\")",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "    if err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "        panic(err)",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "#### 方式 B：在代码中手动设置",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "text": "import \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\"",
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "text": "func initConfig() {",
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "text": "    cfg := config.Default()",
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "    cfg.Status.Webhook.Config.URL = \"https://custom-url.com\"",
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "text": "    config.Set(cfg)",
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "text": "## 3. 核心功能使用",
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "text": "### 3.1 状态存储 (Status Store)",
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;DigEino&#96; 支持将执行状态存储在内存或 MySQL 中。",
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go",
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "text": "import \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/status\"",
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "text": "func someProcess() {",
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "text": "    // 获取默认存储实例（根据配置自动选择 memory 或 mysql）",
            "lineNumber": 80
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.24554890394210815
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/research/semantic_search.go",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 236,
            "column": 1
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 316,
            "column": 16
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "func CodeIndex(ctx context.Context, req *CodeIndexRequest) (*CodeIndexResponse, error) {",
            "lineNumber": 239
          },
          {
            "text": "\tcfg := config.Get().Tools",
            "lineNumber": 240
          },
          {
            "text": "\tsearchPath := req.Path",
            "lineNumber": 241
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif searchPath == \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 242
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tsearchPath = \".\"",
            "lineNumber": 243
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 244
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 245
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 1. Loader",
            "lineNumber": 246
          },
          {
            "text": "\tldr, err := file.NewFileLoader(ctx, &amp;file.FileLoaderConfig{})",
            "lineNumber": 247
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 248
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, err",
            "lineNumber": 249
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 250
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 251
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 2. Splitter",
            "lineNumber": 252
          },
          {
            "text": "\tspl, err := markdown.NewHeaderSplitter(ctx, &amp;markdown.HeaderConfig{",
            "lineNumber": 253
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tHeaders: map[string]string{\"#\": \"h1\", \"##\": \"h2\"},",
            "lineNumber": 254
          },
          {
            "text": "\t})",
            "lineNumber": 255
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 256
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, err",
            "lineNumber": 257
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 258
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 259
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 3. Indexer",
            "lineNumber": 260
          },
          {
            "text": "\tidxConn, err := createPineconeConn(cfg.Pinecone.ApiKey, cfg.Pinecone.Host)",
            "lineNumber": 261
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 262
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, err",
            "lineNumber": 263
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 264
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 265
          },
          {
            "text": "\tembedder, err := openai.NewEmbedder(ctx, &amp;openai.EmbeddingConfig{",
            "lineNumber": 266
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tAPIKey:     cfg.Embedding.ApiKey,",
            "lineNumber": 267
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tBaseURL:    cfg.Embedding.BaseUrl,",
            "lineNumber": 268
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tModel:      cfg.Embedding.Model,",
            "lineNumber": 269
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tDimensions: &amp;cfg.Embedding.Dimensions,",
            "lineNumber": 270
          },
          {
            "text": "\t})",
            "lineNumber": 271
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 272
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, err",
            "lineNumber": 273
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 274
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 275
          },
          {
            "text": "\tidx := &amp;PineconeIndexer{",
            "lineNumber": 276
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tindexConn: idxConn,",
            "lineNumber": 277
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tembedder:  embedder,",
            "lineNumber": 278
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tnamespace: cfg.Pinecone.Namespace,",
            "lineNumber": 279
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 280
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 281
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 4. Graph",
            "lineNumber": 282
          },
          {
            "text": "\tg := compose.NewGraph[document.Source, []string]()",
            "lineNumber": 283
          },
          {
            "text": "\t_ = g.AddLoaderNode(\"loader\", ldr)",
            "lineNumber": 284
          },
          {
            "text": "\t_ = g.AddDocumentTransformerNode(\"splitter\", spl)",
            "lineNumber": 285
          },
          {
            "text": "\t_ = g.AddIndexerNode(\"indexer\", idx)",
            "lineNumber": 286
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 287
          },
          {
            "text": "\t_ = g.AddEdge(compose.START, \"loader\")",
            "lineNumber": 288
          },
          {
            "text": "\t_ = g.AddEdge(\"loader\", \"splitter\")",
            "lineNumber": 289
          },
          {
            "text": "\t_ = g.AddEdge(\"splitter\", \"indexer\")",
            "lineNumber": 290
          },
          {
            "text": "\t_ = g.AddEdge(\"indexer\", compose.END)",
            "lineNumber": 291
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 292
          },
          {
            "text": "\trunnable, err := g.Compile(ctx)",
            "lineNumber": 293
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 294
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, err",
            "lineNumber": 295
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 296
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 297
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 5. Execution Logic (Dir vs File)",
            "lineNumber": 298
          },
          {
            "text": "\tvar totalDocs int",
            "lineNumber": 299
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 300
          },
          {
            "text": "\tinfo, err := os.Stat(searchPath)",
            "lineNumber": 301
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 302
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"无法访问路径: %w\", err)",
            "lineNumber": 303
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 304
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 305
          },
          {
            "text": "\tprocessFile := func(path string) error {",
            "lineNumber": 306
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t_, err := runnable.Invoke(ctx, document.Source{URI: path})",
            "lineNumber": 307
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 308
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t// 记录错误但继续处理",
            "lineNumber": 309
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tfmt.Printf(\"索引文件失败 %s: %v\\n\", path, err)",
            "lineNumber": 310
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\treturn nil",
            "lineNumber": 311
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 312
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\ttotalDocs++",
            "lineNumber": 313
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil",
            "lineNumber": 314
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 315
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 316
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif info.IsDir()",
            "lineNumber": 317
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.2159622311592102
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./config/config.go",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 43,
            "column": 1
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 87,
            "column": 4
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "// WebhookConfig 基础 Webhook 配置",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "type WebhookConfig struct {",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "\tURL        string            &#96;yaml:\"url\" json:\"url\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "\tMethod     string            &#96;yaml:\"method\" json:\"method,omitempty\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "\tHeaders    map[string]string &#96;yaml:\"headers\" json:\"headers,omitempty\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "\tSecret     string            &#96;yaml:\"secret\" json:\"secret,omitempty\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "\tTimeout    int               &#96;yaml:\"timeout\" json:\"timeout,omitempty\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "\tRetryCount int               &#96;yaml:\"retry_count\" json:\"retry_count,omitempty\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "\tRetryDelay int               &#96;yaml:\"retry_delay\" json:\"retry_delay,omitempty\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "\tEvents     []string          &#96;yaml:\"events\" json:\"events,omitempty\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "// StatusStoreConfig 状态存储配置",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "type StatusStoreConfig struct {",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "\tEnabled *bool       &#96;yaml:\"Enabled\" json:\"Enabled,omitempty\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "text": "\tType    string      &#96;yaml:\"Type\" json:\"Type,omitempty\"&#96; // memory, mysql",
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "text": "\tMySQL   MySQLConfig &#96;yaml:\"MySQL\" json:\"MySQL\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "// MySQLConfig MySQL 配置",
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "text": "type MySQLConfig struct {",
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "\tHost        string &#96;yaml:\"Host\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "text": "\tPort        int    &#96;yaml:\"Port\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "text": "\tUser        string &#96;yaml:\"User\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "text": "\tPassword    string &#96;yaml:\"Password\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "text": "\tDatabase    string &#96;yaml:\"Database\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "text": "\tExecTable   string &#96;yaml:\"ExecTable\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "text": "\tStatusTable string &#96;yaml:\"StatusTable\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "text": "// WeChatConfig 微信推送配置",
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "text": "type WeChatConfig struct {",
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "text": "\tEnabled       *bool    &#96;yaml:\"Enabled\" json:\"Enabled,omitempty\"&#96;             // 是否启用微信推送功能",
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "text": "\tAppID         string   &#96;yaml:\"AppID\" json:\"AppID,omitempty\"&#96;                 // 微信服务号 AppID",
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "text": "\tAppSecret     string   &#96;yaml:\"AppSecret\" json:\"AppSecret,omitempty\"&#96;         // 微信服务号 AppSecret",
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "text": "\tOpenIDs       []string &#96;yaml:\"OpenIDs\" json:\"OpenIDs,omitempty\"&#96;             // 默认接收消息的用户 openid 列表",
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "text": "\tTokenFilePath string   &#96;yaml:\"TokenFilePath\" json:\"TokenFilePath,omitempty\"&#96; // AccessToken 存储文件路径（相对于项目根目录）",
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 小程序相关配置（用于发送小程序卡片消息）",
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "text": "\tMiniProgram MiniProgramConfig &#96;yaml:\"MiniProgram\" json:\"MiniProgram,omitempty\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "text": "// MiniProgramConfig 小程序配置",
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "text": "type",
            "lineNumber": 88
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.21425260603427887
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./webhook/config.go",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 68,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "package webhook",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "import (",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"fmt\"",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"strings\"",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\"",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": ")",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "// GetWebhookConfig 从全局配置获取 WebhookConfig",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "func GetWebhookConfig(buildDefaultURL func() string) *config.WebhookConfig {",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "\tcfg := config.Get().Status.Webhook",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif cfg.Enabled != nil &amp;&amp; !*cfg.Enabled {",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 这里需要注意，Config 是 WebhookConfig 类型",

          {
            "lineNumber": 26

          },

          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 32
          },

          {

          {
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {

          {
            "text": "func (s *mysqlStatusStore) ListExecutions(page, pageSize int) ([]*ExecutionRecord, int) {",
            "lineNumber": 266
          },
          {
            "text": "\tvar models []MySQLExecutionModel",
            "lineNumber": 267
          },
          {
            "text": "\tvar total int64",
            "lineNumber": 268
          },
          {
            "text": "\ts.db.Table(s.execTable).Count(&amp;total)",
            "lineNumber": 269
          },
          {
            "text": "\ts.db.Table(s.execTable).Offset((page - 1) * pageSize).Limit(pageSize).Find(&amp;models)",
            "lineNumber": 270
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 271
          },
          {
            "text": "\trecords := make([]*ExecutionRecord, 0, len(models))",
            "lineNumber": 272
          },
          {
            "text": "\tfor _, m := range models {",
            "lineNumber": 273
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\trecords = append(records, &amp;ExecutionRecord{",
            "lineNumber": 274
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tExecutionID: m.ExecutionID,",
            "lineNumber": 275
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tAppName:     m.AppName,",
            "lineNumber": 276
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tRequestID:   m.RequestID,",
            "lineNumber": 277
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tStartTime:   m.StartTime,",
            "lineNumber": 278
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tEndTime:     m.EndTime,",
            "lineNumber": 279
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tStatus:      m.Status,",
            "lineNumber": 280
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t})",
            "lineNumber": 281
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 282
          },
          {
            "text": "\treturn records, int(total)",
            "lineNumber": 283
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 284
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 285
          },
          {
            "text": "func GetDefaultStore() StatusStore {",
            "lineNumber": 286
          },
          {
            "text": "\tcfg := config.Get().Status.Store",
            "lineNumber": 287
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif cfg.Type == \"memory\" {",
            "lineNumber": 288
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn NewMemoryStatusStore(1000)",
            "lineNumber": 289
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 290
          },
          {
            "text": "\tstore, err := NewMySQLStatusStore(cfg)",
            "lineNumber": 291
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 292
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn NewMemoryStatusStore(1000)",
            "lineNumber": 293
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 294
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif store == nil {",
            "lineNumber": 295
          },

            "lineNumber": 296
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 297
          },
          {
            "text": "\treturn store",
            "lineNumber": 298
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 299
          }
        ]
      },

          {

          {
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {

          },

            "lineNumber": 43

          },

          },
          {
            "text": "\twebSearchTool, err := websearch.NewWebSearchTool(ctx)",
            "lineNumber": 132
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err == nil {",
            "lineNumber": 133
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, webSearchTool)",
            "lineNumber": 134
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 135
          },
          {
            "text": "\tsemanticSearchTool, err := research.NewSemanticSearchTool(ctx)",
            "lineNumber": 136
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err == nil {",
            "lineNumber": 137
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, semanticSearchTool)",
            "lineNumber": 138
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 139
          },
          {
            "text": "\tcodeIndexTool, err := research.NewCodeIndexTool(ctx)",
            "lineNumber": 140
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err == nil {",
            "lineNumber": 141
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, codeIndexTool)",
            "lineNumber": 142
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 143
          },
          {
            "text": "\tjinaReaderTool, err := research.NewJinaReaderTool(ctx)",
            "lineNumber": 144
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err == nil {",
            "lineNumber": 145
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, jinaReaderTool)",
            "lineNumber": 146
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 147
          },
          {
            "text": "\twriteFileTool, err := research.NewWriteFileTool(ctx)",
            "lineNumber": 148
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err == nil {",
            "lineNumber": 149
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, writeFileTool)",
            "lineNumber": 150
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 151
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 152
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 5. 本地无头浏览器抓取工具（高级反爬场景，如微信公众号）",
            "lineNumber": 153
          },
          {
            "text": "\tlocalScraperTool, err := research.NewLocalScraperTool(ctx)",
            "lineNumber": 154
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err == nil {",
            "lineNumber": 155
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, localScraperTool)",
            "lineNumber": 156
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 157
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 5.1 本地浏览器通用抓取工具（read/screenshot + cookie 复用）",
            "lineNumber": 158
          },
          {
            "text": "\tbrowserBrowseTool, err := research.NewBrowserBrowseTool(ctx)",
            "lineNumber": 159
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err == nil {",
            "lineNumber": 160
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, browserBrowseTool)",
            "lineNumber": 161
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 162
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 163
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 这里未来可以放入通用的 Google 搜索、计算器等跨项目工具",
            "lineNumber": 164
          },
          {
            "text": "\treturn tools, nil",
            "lineNumber": 165
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 166
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.19261914491653442
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./status/status_store.go",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 141,
            "column": 1
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 200,
            "column": 59
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "type MySQLExecutionStatusModel struct {",
            "lineNumber": 144
          },
          {
            "text": "\tID           uint32 &#96;gorm:\"primaryKey;column:id;autoIncrement\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 145
          },
          {
            "text": "\tExecutionID  string &#96;gorm:\"column:execution_id;size:64;not null;index\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 146
          },
          {
            "text": "\tType         string &#96;gorm:\"column:type;size:32;not null\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 147
          },
          {
            "text": "\tTimestampMs  int64  &#96;gorm:\"column:timestamp_ms;not null\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 148
          },
          {
            "text": "\tNodeKey      string &#96;gorm:\"column:node_key;size:100\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 149
          },
          {
            "text": "\tNodeType     string &#96;gorm:\"column:node_type;size:50\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 150
          },
          {
            "text": "\tStatus       string &#96;gorm:\"column:status;size:32;not null\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 151
          },
          {
            "text": "\tError        string &#96;gorm:\"column:error;type:text\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 152
          },
          {
            "text": "\tAppName      string &#96;gorm:\"column:app_name;size:100;not null;index\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 153
          },
          {
            "text": "\tRequestID    string &#96;gorm:\"column:request_id;size:100;not null;index\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 154
          },
          {
            "text": "\tDataFlowJSON string &#96;gorm:\"column:data_flow;type:text\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 155
          },
          {
            "text": "\tControlJSON  string &#96;gorm:\"column:control_flow;type:text\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 156
          },
          {
            "text": "\tCreatedAt    time.Time",
            "lineNumber": 157
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 158
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 159
          },
          {
            "text": "type mysqlStatusStore struct {",
            "lineNumber": 160
          },
          {
            "text": "\tdb          *gorm.DB",
            "lineNumber": 161
          },
          {
            "text": "\texecTable   string",
            "lineNumber": 162
          },
          {
            "text": "\tstatusTable string",
            "lineNumber": 163
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 164
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 165
          },
          {
            "text": "func NewMySQLStatusStore(cfg config.StatusStoreConfig) (StatusStore, error) {",
            "lineNumber": 166
          },
          {
            "text": "\tdsn := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s:%s@tcp(%s:%d)/%s?charset=utf8mb4&amp;parseTime=True&amp;loc=Local\",",
            "lineNumber": 167
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tcfg.MySQL.User, cfg.MySQL.Password, cfg.MySQL.Host, cfg.MySQL.Port, cfg.MySQL.Database)",
            "lineNumber": 168
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 169
          },
          {
            "text": "\tdb, err := gorm.Open(mysql.Open(dsn), &amp;gorm.Config{})",
            "lineNumber": 170
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 171
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, err",
            "lineNumber": 172
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 173
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 174
          },
          {
            "text": "\treturn &amp;mysqlStatusStore{",
            "lineNumber": 175
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tdb:          db,",
            "lineNumber": 176
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\texecTable:   cfg.MySQL.ExecTable,",
            "lineNumber": 177
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tstatusTable: cfg.MySQL.StatusTable,",
            "lineNumber": 178
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}, nil",
            "lineNumber": 179
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 180
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 181
          },
          {
            "text": "func (s *mysqlStatusStore) CreateExecution(executionID, appName, requestID string) *ExecutionRecord {",
            "lineNumber": 182
          },
          {
            "text": "\tnow := time.Now()",
            "lineNumber": 183
          },
          {
            "text": "\tmodel := &amp;MySQLExecutionModel{",
            "lineNumber": 184
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tExecutionID: executionID,",
            "lineNumber": 185
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tAppName:     appName,",
            "lineNumber": 186
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tRequestID:   requestID,",
            "lineNumber": 187
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tStartTime:   now,",
            "lineNumber": 188
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tStatus:      \"running\",",
            "lineNumber": 189
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 190
          },
          {
            "text": "\ts.db.Table(s.execTable).Create(model)",
            "lineNumber": 191
          },
          {
            "text": "\treturn &amp;ExecutionRecord{",
            "lineNumber": 192
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tExecutionID: executionID,",
            "lineNumber": 193
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tAppName:     appName,",
            "lineNumber": 194
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tRequestID:   requestID,",
            "lineNumber": 195
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tStartTime:   now,",
            "lineNumber": 196
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tStatus:      \"running\",",
            "lineNumber": 197
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 198
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 199
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 200
          },
          {
            "text": "func (s *mysqlStatusStore) GetExecution(executionID string)",
            "lineNumber": 201
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.1907172054052353
    },

      "codeBlock": {

        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "Tools:",
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "  Firecrawl:",
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "text": "    ApiKey: \"\"",
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "text": "  WebSearch:",
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "text": "    Engine: \"bocha\" # bocha, serpapi, google, bing, duckduckgo, firecrawl, tavily",
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "text": "    Bocha:",
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "text": "      ApiKey: \"\"",
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "text": "      BaseUrl: \"https://api.bochaai.com\"",
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "text": "    SerpApi:",
            "lineNumber": 74
          },

            "text": "      ApiKey: \"\"",
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "text": "      BaseUrl: \"https://serpapi.com/search\"",
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "text": "    Google:",
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "text": "      ApiKey: \"\"",

          },
          {

          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "text": "    Bing:",
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "text": "      ApiKey: \"\"",
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "text": "      MaxResults: 10",
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "text": "      Region: \"en-US\"",

          },

            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {

          },
          {

          },

          },

          },

          },

            "lineNumber": 98
          },
          {
            "text": "    ApiKey: \"\"",
            "lineNumber": 99
          },
          {
            "text": "    Host: \"\"",
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "text": "    Namespace: \"default\"",
            "lineNumber": 101

            "text": "    IndexName: \"\"",
            "lineNumber": 102
          },

            "text": "  Embedding:",
            "lineNumber": 103
          },
          {
            "text": "    Type: \"qwen\" # qwen, openai",
            "lineNumber": 104
          },
          {
            "text": "    ApiKey: \"\"",
            "lineNumber": 105
          },
          {
            "text": "    BaseUrl: \"https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1\"",
            "lineNumber": 106
          },
          {
            "text": "    Model: \"text-embedding-v2\"",
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "text": "    Dimensions: 1024",
            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "text": "  LocalBrowser:",
            "lineNumber": 109
          },
          {
            "text": "    Enabled: false",
            "lineNumber": 110
          },
          {
            "text": "    MaxConcurrency: 3",
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "text": "    TotalTimeoutSec: 60",

          },

          },

          },

            "lineNumber": 116
          },
          {
            "text": "    Headless: true",
            "lineNumber": 117
          },
          {
            "text": "    CookieStoreDir: \"storage/app/browser_cookies\"",
            "lineNumber": 118

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/tools.go",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 44,
            "column": 58
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 112,
            "column": 2
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "func BaseTools(ctx context.Context) ([]tool.BaseTool, error) {",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "\tvar tools []tool.BaseTool",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 1. UI/UX 设计智能工具",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "\tuiTool, err := ui_ux.NewUIUXSearchTool(ctx)",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err == nil {",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, uiTool)",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 1.1. UI/UX 设计系统生成工具",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": "\tdesignSystemTool, err := ui_ux.NewGenerateDesignSystemTool(ctx)",
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err == nil {",
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\ttools = append(tools, designSystemTool)",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 1.2. UI/UX 设计系统持久化工具",
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "// StatusStore 状态存储接口",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "type StatusStore interface {",
            "lineNumber": 17

          },

          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 25
          },

          },

          },
          {

          },
          {

          },

          },

            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "// memoryStatusStore 内存实现",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "type memoryStatusStore struct {",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "func NewMemoryStatusStore(maxRecords int) StatusStore {",

          },

          },

          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {

          },

            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {

          },
          {

          },
          {

          },

          },

      "codeBlock": {

          "startPosition": {

        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "// UnstructuredConfig Unstructured.io 文档解析配置",
            "lineNumber": 210
          },
          {
            "text": "type UnstructuredConfig struct {",
            "lineNumber": 211
          },
          {
            "text": "\tApiKey  string &#96;yaml:\"ApiKey\" json:\"ApiKey\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 212
          },
          {
            "text": "\tBaseUrl string &#96;yaml:\"BaseUrl\" json:\"BaseUrl\"&#96; // 默认为 https://api.unstructured.io/general/v0/general",
            "lineNumber": 213
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 214
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 215
          },
          {
            "text": "// PineconeConfig Pinecone 向量数据库配置",
            "lineNumber": 216
          },
          {
            "text": "type PineconeConfig struct {",
            "lineNumber": 217
          },
          {
            "text": "\tApiKey    string &#96;yaml:\"ApiKey\" json:\"ApiKey\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 218
          },
          {
            "text": "\tHost      string &#96;yaml:\"Host\" json:\"Host\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 219
          },
          {
            "text": "\tNamespace string &#96;yaml:\"Namespace\" json:\"Namespace\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 220
          },
          {
            "text": "\tIndexName string &#96;yaml:\"IndexName\" json:\"IndexName\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 221
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 222
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 223
          },
          {
            "text": "// EmbeddingConfig 向量化模型配置",
            "lineNumber": 224
          },
          {
            "text": "type EmbeddingConfig struct {",
            "lineNumber": 225
          },
          {
            "text": "\tType       string &#96;yaml:\"Type\" json:\"Type\"&#96; // openai, qwen",
            "lineNumber": 226
          },
          {
            "text": "\tApiKey     string &#96;yaml:\"ApiKey\" json:\"ApiKey\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 227
          },
          {
            "text": "\tBaseUrl    string &#96;yaml:\"BaseUrl\" json:\"BaseUrl\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 228
          },
          {
            "text": "\tModel      string &#96;yaml:\"Model\" json:\"Model\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 229
          },
          {
            "text": "\tDimensions int    &#96;yaml:\"Dimensions\" json:\"Dimensions\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 230
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 231
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 232
          },
          {
            "text": "var (",
            "lineNumber": 233
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// DefaultConfig 全局默认配置",
            "lineNumber": 234
          },
          {
            "text": "\tcurrentConfig *Config",
            "lineNumber": 235
          },
          {
            "text": ")",
            "lineNumber": 236
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 237
          },
          {
            "text": "// Load 从文件加载配置",
            "lineNumber": 238
          },
          {
            "text": "func Load(path string) (*Config, error) {",
            "lineNumber": 239
          },
          {
            "text": "\tdata, err := os.ReadFile(path)",
            "lineNumber": 240
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 241
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, err",
            "lineNumber": 242
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 243
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 244
          },
          {
            "text": "\tvar cfg Config",
            "lineNumber": 245
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err := yaml.Unmarshal(data, &amp;cfg); err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 246
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, err",
            "lineNumber": 247
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 248
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 249
          },
          {
            "text": "\tcurrentConfig = &amp;cfg",
            "lineNumber": 250
          },
          {
            "text": "\treturn &amp;cfg, nil",
            "lineNumber": 251
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 252
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 253
          },
          {
            "text": "// Get 获取当前配置",
            "lineNumber": 254
          },
          {
            "text": "func Get() *Config {",
            "lineNumber": 255
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif currentConfig == nil {",
            "lineNumber": 256
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tcurrentConfig = Default()",
            "lineNumber": 257
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 258
          },
          {
            "text": "\treturn currentConfig",
            "lineNumber": 259
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 260
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 261
          },
          {
            "text": "// Set 设置当前配置",
            "lineNumber": 262
          },
          {
            "text": "func Set(cfg *Config) {",
            "lineNumber": 263
          },
          {
            "text": "\tcurrentConfig = cfg",
            "lineNumber": 264
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 265
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 266
          },
          {
            "text": "// Default 返回默认配置",
            "lineNumber": 267
          },
          {
            "text": "func Default() *Config {",
            "lineNumber": 268
          },
          {
            "text": "\tenabled := true",
            "lineNumber": 269
          },
          {
            "text": "\tdisabled := false",
            "lineNumber": 270
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.1700514554977417

          },

          },

          },

          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 112
          },

          },

            "lineNumber": 114
          },

            "text": "    ",

          },

          },

          },

          },

          },

          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 127
          },
          {

          },
