          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 139
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 140
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141
          },
          {
            "text": "#### 步骤 2：在 bootstrap 中导入工具包",
            "lineNumber": 142
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143
          },
          {
            "text": "在 &#96;bootstrap/your_app/init.go&#96; 中导入工具包：",
            "lineNumber": 144
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go",
            "lineNumber": 146
          },
          {
            "text": "package yourappbootstrap",
            "lineNumber": 147
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148
          },
          {
            "text": "import (",
            "lineNumber": 149
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"DigFlow/bootstrap/common\"",
            "lineNumber": 150
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.1600339412689209
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/research/websearch/web_search.go",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 53,
            "column": 31
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "package websearch",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "import (",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"context\"",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"fmt\"",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"os\"",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool\"",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool/utils\"",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\"",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": ")",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "// WebSearch 执行网页搜索",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "func WebSearch(ctx context.Context, req *SearchRequest) (*SearchResponse, error) {",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "\tcfg := config.Get()",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "\ttoolCfg := cfg.Tools.WebSearch",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "\tengine := toolCfg.Engine",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif engine == \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tengine = \"duckduckgo\" // 默认为 duckduckgo 占位",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "\tfmt.Printf(\"执行搜索, engine: %s, query: %s, max_results: %d\\n\", engine, req.Query, req.MaxResults)",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "\tvar provider SearchProvider",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "\tvar err error",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 转换为 map[string]interface{} 以兼容各 Provider 接参",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "\tconfigMap := make(map[string]interface{})",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "\tswitch engine {",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "\tcase \"bocha\":",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tconfigMap[\"BochaApiKey\"] = toolCfg.Bocha.ApiKey",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tconfigMap[\"BochaBaseUrl\"] = toolCfg.Bocha.BaseUrl",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tprovider, err = NewBochaProvider(configMap)",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "\tcase \"serpapi\":",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tconfigMap[\"SerpAPIKey\"] = toolCfg.SerpApi.ApiKey",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tconfigMap[\"SerpAPIEngine\"] = \"google\"",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tif toolCfg.SerpApi.BaseUrl != \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t// 如果有自定义URL需求，此处可以扩展，目前原生没这个参数",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tprovider, err = NewSerpAPIProvider(configMap)",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "\tcase \"google\":",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tconfigMap[\"GoogleApiKey\"] = toolCfg.Google.ApiKey",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tconfigMap[\"GoogleSearchEngineId\"] = toolCfg.Google.Cx",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tprovider, err = NewGoogleProvider(configMap)",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "\tcase \"bing\":",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tconfigMap[\"BingApiKey\"] = toolCfg.Bing.ApiKey",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t// configMap[\"BingSafeSearch\"] = toolCfg.Bing.SafeSearch",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tprovider, err = NewBingProvider(configMap)",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "\tcase \"firecrawl\":",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t// Firecrawl Search 复用全局 Firecrawl ApiKey（与 firecrawl_scrape 相同）",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tfirecrawlCfg := cfg.Tools.Firecrawl",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tapiKey := firecrawlCfg.ApiKey",
            "lineNumber": 54
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.15081609785556793
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/research/general_researcher.go",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 84,

          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 161,

          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "func ReadFile(ctx context.Context, req *ReadFileRequest) (*ReadFileResponse, error) {",
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "text": "\tcontent, err := os.ReadFile(req.Path)",
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"读取文件失败: %w\", err)",
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {
            "text": "\treturn &amp;ReadFileResponse{Content: string(content)}, nil",
            "lineNumber": 92
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 93
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "text": "// --- Doc to Markdown Tool (Placeholder) ---",
            "lineNumber": 95
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {
            "text": "type DocToMarkdownRequest struct {",
            "lineNumber": 97
          },
          {
            "text": "\tPath string &#96;json:\"path\" jsonschema:\"required,description=PDF或文档路径\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 98
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 99
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "text": "type DocToMarkdownResponse struct {",
            "lineNumber": 101
          },
          {
            "text": "\tMarkdown string &#96;json:\"markdown\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 102
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 103
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104
          },
          {
            "text": "func DocToMarkdown(ctx context.Context, req *DocToMarkdownRequest) (*DocToMarkdownResponse, error) {",
            "lineNumber": 105
          },
          {
            "text": "\tcfg := config.Get()",
            "lineNumber": 106
          },
          {
            "text": "\ttoolCfg := cfg.Tools.Unstructured",
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "text": "\tapiKey := toolCfg.ApiKey",
            "lineNumber": 109
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif apiKey == \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 110
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tapiKey = os.Getenv(\"UNSTRUCTURED_API_KEY\")",
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 112
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif apiKey == \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 114
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"Unstructured API Key 未配置\")",
            "lineNumber": 115
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 116
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117
          },
          {
            "text": "\tbaseUrl := toolCfg.BaseUrl",
            "lineNumber": 118
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif baseUrl == \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 119
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tbaseUrl = \"https://api.unstructured.io/general/v0/general\"",
            "lineNumber": 120
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 121
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 1. 打开文件",
            "lineNumber": 123
          },
          {
            "text": "\tfile, err := os.Open(req.Path)",
            "lineNumber": 124
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"无法打开文档: %w\", err)",
            "lineNumber": 126
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 127
          },
          {
            "text": "\tdefer file.Close()",
            "lineNumber": 128
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 2. 准备 multipart 请求",
            "lineNumber": 130
          },
          {
            "text": "\tbody := &amp;bytes.Buffer{}",
            "lineNumber": 131
          },
          {
            "text": "\twriter := multipart.NewWriter(body)",
            "lineNumber": 132
          },
          {
            "text": "\tpart, err := writer.CreateFormFile(\"files\", filepath.Base(req.Path))",
            "lineNumber": 133
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 134
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, err",
            "lineNumber": 135
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 136
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif _, err := io.Copy(part, file); err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 137
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, err",
            "lineNumber": 138
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 139
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 添加额外参数：策略设置为 'fast' 或 'hi_res'，输出格式为 'text/markdown'",
            "lineNumber": 141
          },
          {
            "text": "\t_ = writer.WriteField(\"output_format\", \"text/markdown\")",
            "lineNumber": 142
          },
          {
            "text": "\t_ = writer.WriteField(\"strategy\", \"fast\")",
            "lineNumber": 143
          },
          {
            "text": "\twriter.Close()",
            "lineNumber": 144
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 3. 执行请求",
            "lineNumber": 146
          },
          {
            "text": "\thttpReq, err := http.NewRequestWithContext(ctx, \"POST\", baseUrl, body)",
            "lineNumber": 147
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 148
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, err",
            "lineNumber": 149
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 150
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 151
          },
          {
            "text": "\thttpReq.Header.Set(\"Content-Type\", writer.FormDataContentType())",
            "lineNumber": 152
          },
          {
            "text": "\thttpReq.Header.Set(\"unstructured-api-key\", apiKey)",
            "lineNumber": 153
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 154
          },
          {
            "text": "\tclient := &amp;http.Client{Timeout: 60 * time.Second}",
            "lineNumber": 155
          },
          {
            "text": "\tresp, err := client.Do(httpReq)",
            "lineNumber": 156
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 157
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, err",
            "lineNumber": 158
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 159
          },
          {
            "text": "\tdefer resp.Body.Close()",
            "lineNumber": 160
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 161
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif resp.StatusCode != http.StatusOK",
            "lineNumber": 162
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.15061616897583008
    },

          },

            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "type browserSession struct {",

          },

          },
          {

          },

          },

            "lineNumber": 35

          {

          },

          {
            "lineNumber": 90

          },

          {
            "text": "\t\tpage, err = stealth.Page(browser)",
            "lineNumber": 99
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t&lt;-m.slots",
            "lineNumber": 101
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"创建 stealth 页面失败: %w\", err)",
            "lineNumber": 102
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 103
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 104
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105
          },
          {
            "text": "\tid := atomic.AddUint64(&amp;m.nextID, 1)",
            "lineNumber": 106
          },
          {
            "text": "\ts := &amp;browserSession{",
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tid:        id,",
            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tpage:      page,",
            "lineNumber": 109
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tstartedAt: time.Now(),",
            "lineNumber": 110
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112
          },
          {
            "text": "\tm.mu.Lock()",
            "lineNumber": 113
          },
          {
            "text": "\tm.sessions[id] = s",
            "lineNumber": 114
          },
          {
            "text": "\tm.mu.Unlock()",
            "lineNumber": 115
          },
          {
            "text": "\treturn s, nil",
            "lineNumber": 116
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 117
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118
          },
          {
            "text": "func (m *browserManager) release(s *browserSession) {",
            "lineNumber": 119
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif s == nil || !s.released.CompareAndSwap(false, true) {",
            "lineNumber": 120
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn",
            "lineNumber": 121
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif s.page != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 124
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t_ = s.page.Close()",
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 126
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127
          },
          {
            "text": "\tm.mu.Lock()",
            "lineNumber": 128
          },
          {
            "text": "\tdelete(m.sessions, s.id)",
            "lineNumber": 129
          },
          {
            "text": "\tm.mu.Unlock()",
            "lineNumber": 130
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131
          },
          {
            "text": "\tselect {",
            "lineNumber": 132
          },
          {
            "text": "\tcase &lt;-m.slots:",
            "lineNumber": 133
          },
          {
            "text": "\tdefault:",
            "lineNumber": 134
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 135
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 136
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137
          },
          {
            "text": "func (m *browserManager) ensureBrowser(ctx context.Context) (*rod.Browser, error) {",
            "lineNumber": 138
          },
          {
            "text": "\tm.mu.Lock()",
            "lineNumber": 139
          },
          {
            "text": "\tdefer m.mu.Unlock()",
            "lineNumber": 140
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif m.browser != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 142
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tif _, err := m.browser.Version(); err == nil {",
            "lineNumber": 143
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\treturn m.browser, nil",
            "lineNumber": 144
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 145
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t_ = m.browser.Close()",
            "lineNumber": 146
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tm.browser = nil",
            "lineNumber": 147
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 148
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 149
          },
          {
            "text": "\tl := launcher.New().",
            "lineNumber": 150
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tContext(ctx).",
            "lineNumber": 151
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tNoSandbox(true).",
            "lineNumber": 152
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tHeadless(*m.cfg.Headless).",
            "lineNumber": 153
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tSet(flags.Flag(\"disable-gpu\"))",
            "lineNumber": 154
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif m.cfg.ChromePath != \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 155
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tl = l.Bin(m.cfg.ChromePath)",
            "lineNumber": 156
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 157
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 158
          },
          {
            "text": "\tcontrolURL, err := l.Launch()",
            "lineNumber": 159
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 160
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"启动 Chromium 失败: %w\", err)",
            "lineNumber": 161
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 162
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 163
          },
          {
            "text": "\tbrowser := rod.New().",
            "lineNumber": 164
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 165
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tControlURL(controlURL).",
            "lineNumber": 166
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tTimeout(time.Duration(m.cfg.TotalTimeoutSec) * time.Second)",
            "lineNumber": 167
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err := browser.Connect(); err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 168
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"连接 Chromium 失败: %w\", err)",
            "lineNumber": 169
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 170
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 171
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 172
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 173
          },
          {
            "text": "}",

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 175
          },
          {
            "text": "func (m *browserManager) resetBrowser() error",
            "lineNumber": 176
          }

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/research/jina_reader.go",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 67,
            "column": 76
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "package research",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "import (",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"context\"",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"encoding/json\"",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"fmt\"",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"io\"",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"net/http\"",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"strings\"",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"time\"",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool\"",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool/utils\"",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": ")",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "// JinaReaderRequest 网页读取请求",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "type JinaReaderRequest struct {",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "\tURL string &#96;json:\"url\" jsonschema:\"required,description=要读取并转换为 Markdown 的网页 URL\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "// JinaReaderResponse 网页读取响应",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "type JinaReaderResponse struct {",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "\tMarkdown string &#96;json:\"markdown\" jsonschema:\"description=转换后的 Markdown 内容\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "// JinaReader 使用 r.jina.ai 将网页转换为 Markdown",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "// 这是一个极其强大的抓取方案，能够有效绕过微信公众号等平台的反爬验证",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "func JinaReader(ctx context.Context, req *JinaReaderRequest) (*JinaReaderResponse, error) {",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif req.URL == \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"URL 不能为空\")",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 构造 Jina Reader URL",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "\tjinaURL := fmt.Sprintf(\"https://r.jina.ai/%s\", req.URL)",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "\thttpReq, err := http.NewRequestWithContext(ctx, \"GET\", jinaURL, nil)",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"创建请求失败: %w\", err)",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 设置 Header 为 text/event-stream",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 实验证明 Jina Reader 的免费模式对 event-stream 的反爬支持更佳",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "\thttpReq.Header.Set(\"Accept\", \"text/event-stream\")",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "\tclient := &amp;http.Client{Timeout: 90 * time.Second}",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "\tresp, err := client.Do(httpReq)",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"请求 Jina Reader 失败: %w\", err)",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "\tdefer resp.Body.Close()",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif resp.StatusCode != http.StatusOK {",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tbody, _ := io.ReadAll(resp.Body)",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"Jina Reader 返回错误: %d, body: %s\", resp.StatusCode, string(body))",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "\tbody, err := io.ReadAll(resp.Body)",
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"读取响应失败: %w\", err)",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 简单的 EventStream 解析逻辑 (Jina Reader 的格式通常是 data: {...})",
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 我们尝试寻找 data: 开头的行并提取其中的 content",
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "text": "\tcontent := string(body)",
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 如果是 event-stream 格式，尝试提取数据部分",
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 为简单起见，如果包含 \"data: {\" 则尝试剥离前缀，",
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 但其实 Jina Reader 在 event-stream 模式下如果是完整返回，",
            "lineNumber": 68
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.1475733071565628
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/ui_ux/agent.go",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 64,
            "column": 63
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 128,
            "column": 82
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "\tagentLambda := func(ctx context.Context, input []*schema.Message) (*schema.Message, error) {",
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t// 构建消息列表（包含系统提示词）",
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tmessages := []*schema.Message{",
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tschema.SystemMessage(getSystemPrompt()),",
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tmessages = append(messages, input...)",
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t// 调用模型生成",
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\toutput, err := chatModel.Generate(ctx, messages)",
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"model generate failed: %w\", err)",
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t// 如果有工具调用，执行工具",
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tif len(output.ToolCalls) &gt; 0 {",
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t// 执行工具（工具节点接受单个消息，返回消息数组）",
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\ttoolResults, err := toolNode.Invoke(ctx, output)",
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"tool execution failed: %w\", err)",
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t// 将工具结果添加到消息列表，再次调用模型",
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tmessages = append(messages, output)",
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tmessages = append(messages, toolResults...)",
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t// 再次调用模型处理工具结果（可能需要多轮工具调用）",
            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tfor {",
            "lineNumber": 92
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\tfinalOutput, err := chatModel.Generate(ctx, messages)",
            "lineNumber": 93
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"model generate after tools failed: %w\", err)",
            "lineNumber": 95
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\t// 如果还有工具调用，继续执行",
            "lineNumber": 98
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\tif len(finalOutput.ToolCalls) &gt; 0 {",
            "lineNumber": 99
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\ttoolResults, err := toolNode.Invoke(ctx, finalOutput)",
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 101
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"tool execution failed: %w\", err)",
            "lineNumber": 102
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 103
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\tmessages = append(messages, finalOutput)",
            "lineNumber": 104
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\tmessages = append(messages, toolResults...)",
            "lineNumber": 105
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\tcontinue",
            "lineNumber": 106
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\treturn finalOutput, nil",
            "lineNumber": 109
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 110
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn output, nil",
            "lineNumber": 113
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 114
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 创建 Graph 工作流",
            "lineNumber": 116
          },
          {
            "text": "\tgraph := compose.NewGraph[[]*schema.Message, *schema.Message]()",
            "lineNumber": 117
          },
          {
            "text": "\t_ = graph.AddLambdaNode(\"ui_design_system_agent\", compose.InvokableLambda(agentLambda))",
            "lineNumber": 118
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 编译 Graph 为 Runnable",
            "lineNumber": 120
          },
          {
            "text": "\tcompiledGraph, err := graph.Compile(ctx)",
            "lineNumber": 121
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to compile graph: %w\", err)",
            "lineNumber": 123
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 124
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "text": "\treturn &amp;UIDesignSystemAgent{agent: compiledGraph}, nil",
            "lineNumber": 126
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 127
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128
          },
          {
            "text": "// NewUIDesignSystemAgentFromConfig 从配置创建 UI/UX 设计系统生成 Agent",
            "lineNumber": 129
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.14668920636177063
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/browser_browse_guide.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 64
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "# browser_browse 使用与配置指南",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "本文说明如何在 DigEino 中启用和使用本地浏览器工具 &#96;browser_browse&#96;。",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "## 1. 工具定位",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;browser_browse&#96; 是基于 &#96;go-rod + stealth&#96; 的本地无头浏览器工具，适用于：",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "- 动态渲染页面（纯 HTTP 抓取不完整）",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "- 强反爬页面（例如微信公众号、Cloudflare 保护页面）",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "- 需要截图留档的场景",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "- 需要复用 Cookie 维持登录态的场景",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "它与 &#96;research_local_scraper&#96; 的区别：",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;research_local_scraper&#96;：更偏微信公众号正文抓取，能力较聚焦。",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;browser_browse&#96;：更通用，支持 &#96;read/screenshot&#96;、&#96;wait_selector&#96;、Cookie 域复用与并发控制。",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "## 2. 配置方式（config/config.yaml）",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "在 &#96;Tools&#96; 下新增/配置 &#96;LocalBrowser&#96;：",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "Tools:",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "  LocalBrowser:",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "    Enabled: true",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "    MaxConcurrency: 3",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "    TotalTimeoutSec: 60",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "    NavigateTimeoutSec: 30",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "    WaitSelectorTimeoutSec: 20",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "    AllowedDomains:",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "      - \"mp.weixin.qq.com\"",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "      - \"zhihu.com\"",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "      - \"juejin.cn\"",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "    ChromePath: \"\" # 可选，留空表示由 rod 自动寻找或下载 Chromium",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "    Headless: true",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "    CookieStoreDir: \"storage/app/browser_cookies\"",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "### 配置项说明",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;Enabled&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "  - 是否启用工具注入；&#96;false&#96; 时 &#96;browser_browse&#96; 不会注册到全局工具集。",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;MaxConcurrency&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "  - 浏览器任务并发上限。建议 3~5（结合机器内存）。",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;TotalTimeoutSec&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "  - 单次调用总超时。",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;NavigateTimeoutSec&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "  - 页面导航超时（&#96;Navigate&#96; 阶段）。",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;WaitSelectorTimeoutSec&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "  - 等待 &#96;wait_selector&#96; 或正文候选元素的超时。",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;AllowedDomains&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "  - 允许访问的域名白名单。为空表示不限制；生产环境建议显式配置。",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;ChromePath&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "  - 可选，自定义 Chromium 可执行文件路径。",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;Headless&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "  - 是否无头运行。开发调试可设为 &#96;false&#96;。",
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;CookieStoreDir&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Cookie 持久化目录，按域名存储为 &#96;&lt;domain&gt;.json&#96;。",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "text": "## 3. Agent 接入",
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62
          },

            "lineNumber": 63
          }

}

| Title | URL | Chunk |
|-------|-----|-------|
| Web search results for query: 企业微信客服回调接收消息 API 文档 |  | Links:<br/>1. [接收消息和事件-读取消息 - 企业微信 API](https://qiyeweixin.apifox.cn/api-10061327)<br/>2. [接收消息 - 文档 - 企业微信开发者中心](https://developer.work.weixin.qq.com/document/path/100719)<br/>3. [回调配置 - 文档 - 企业微信开发者中心](https://developer.work.weixin.qq.com/document/path/96238)<br/>4. [客服消息事件 \| 微信开放文档](https://developers.weixin.qq.com/doc/store/shop/notify/kf_callback/kf_msg_event)<br/>5. [接收消息和事件 \| 微信开放文档](https://developers.weixin.qq.com/minigame/dev/guide/open-ability/customer-message/receive.html)<br/><br/># 企业微信客服回调接收消息 API 文档<br/><br/>## 核心流程<br/><br/>企业微信客服消息接收采用两步流程：[1]<br/>1. 企业微信后台将事件回调数据包发送到企业指定URL<br/>2. 企业收到请求后，通过读取消息接口主动获取具体消息内容<br/><br/>## 回调事件格式<br/><br/>当有新消息时，企业微信发送的回调包含以下信息：[1]<br/><br/>\| 参数 \| 说明 \|<br/>\|------\|------\|<br/>\| ToUserName \| 企业微信CorpID \|<br/>\| CreateTime \| 消息创建时间（unix时间戳） \|<br/>\| MsgType \| 固定为：event \|<br/>\| Event \| 固定为：kf_msg_or_event \|<br/>\| Token \| 调用拉取消息接口时需传此token，用于校验请求合法性 \|<br/>\| OpenKfId \| 有新消息的客服账号 \|<br/><br/>## 读取消息接口<br/><br/>**端点：** `/cgi-bin/kf/sync_msg` (POST方法)[1]<br/><br/>可获取**最近3天内**的消息内容和事件，支持的消息类型包括：文本、图片、语音、视频、文件、位置、链接、名片、小程序、菜单、事件。[1]<br/><br/>## 支持的消息类型<br/><br/>返回格式示例：[1]<br/><br/>- **文本消息**：`msgtype: text`，包含content和menu_id<br/>- **图片消息**：`msgtype: image`，包含media_id<br/>- **语音消息**：`msgtype: voice`，包含media_id<br/>- **视频消息**：`msgtype: video`，包含media_id<br/>- **文件消息**：`msgtype: file`，包含media_id<br/><br/>**注意：** 不支持读取通过发送消息接口发送的消息。[1] |

</details>
</tool-use>
