            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "func getWeComAPIHost() string {",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "\tcfg := config.Get()",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif cfg.WeCom.QYAPIHost != \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn cfg.WeCom.QYAPIHost",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "\treturn \"https://qyapi.weixin.qq.com\"",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "// sendWeComMessageAPI 直接调用企业微信 API 发送消息（用于第三方传入 token）",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "func sendWeComMessageAPI(ctx context.Context, accessToken string, agentID int64, userID string, body map[string]interface{}) error {",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "\turl := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s/cgi-bin/message/send?access_token=%s\",",
            "lineNumber": 42
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.30855411291122437
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/wx/wecom_message.go",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 149,
            "column": 130
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 202,
            "column": 26
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "func getWeComCustomerAccessToken(ctx context.Context) (string, error) {",
            "lineNumber": 151
          },
          {
            "text": "\tcfg := config.Get()",
            "lineNumber": 152
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif cfg.WeCom.CorpID == \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 153
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn \"\", fmt.Errorf(\"WeCom CorpID not configured\")",
            "lineNumber": 154
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 155
          },
          {
            "text": "\tvar corpSecret string",
            "lineNumber": 156
          },
          {
            "text": "\tfor _, app := range cfg.WeCom.Applications {",
            "lineNumber": 157
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tif app.ManageAllKFSession {",
            "lineNumber": 158
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tcorpSecret = app.AgentSecret",
            "lineNumber": 159
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tbreak",
            "lineNumber": 160
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 161
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 162
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif corpSecret == \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 163
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn \"\", fmt.Errorf(\"no WeCom application with ManageAllKFSession=true found in config\")",
            "lineNumber": 164
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 165
          },
          {
            "text": "\tbaseURL := getWeComAPIHost()",
            "lineNumber": 166
          },
          {
            "text": "\turl := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s/cgi-bin/gettoken?corpid=%s&amp;corpsecret=%s\", baseURL, cfg.WeCom.CorpID, corpSecret)",
            "lineNumber": 167
          },
          {
            "text": "\thttpReq, err := http.NewRequestWithContext(ctx, \"GET\", url, nil)",
            "lineNumber": 168
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 169
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn \"\", fmt.Errorf(\"create gettoken request: %w\", err)",
            "lineNumber": 170
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 171
          },
          {
            "text": "\tclient := &amp;http.Client{Timeout: 10 * time.Second}",
            "lineNumber": 172
          },
          {
            "text": "\tresp, err := client.Do(httpReq)",
            "lineNumber": 173
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 174
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn \"\", fmt.Errorf(\"call gettoken: %w\", err)",
            "lineNumber": 175
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 176
          },
          {
            "text": "\tdefer resp.Body.Close()",
            "lineNumber": 177
          },
          {
            "text": "\trespBody, err := io.ReadAll(resp.Body)",
            "lineNumber": 178
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 179
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn \"\", fmt.Errorf(\"read gettoken response: %w\", err)",
            "lineNumber": 180
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 181
          },
          {
            "text": "\tvar apiResp struct {",
            "lineNumber": 182
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tErrCode     int    &#96;json:\"errcode\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 183
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tErrMsg      string &#96;json:\"errmsg\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 184
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tAccessToken string &#96;json:\"access_token\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 185
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tExpiresIn   int64  &#96;json:\"expires_in\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 186
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 187
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err := json.Unmarshal(respBody, &amp;apiResp); err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 188
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn \"\", fmt.Errorf(\"parse gettoken response: %w\", err)",
            "lineNumber": 189
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 190
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif apiResp.ErrCode != 0 {",
            "lineNumber": 191
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn \"\", fmt.Errorf(\"WeCom gettoken errcode=%d errmsg=%s\", apiResp.ErrCode, apiResp.ErrMsg)",
            "lineNumber": 192
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 193
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif apiResp.AccessToken == \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 194
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn \"\", fmt.Errorf(\"WeCom gettoken returned empty access_token\")",
            "lineNumber": 195
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 196
          },
          {
            "text": "\treturn apiResp.AccessToken, nil",
            "lineNumber": 197
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 198
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 199
          },
          {
            "text": "// getWeComApp 获取企业微信应用客户端",
            "lineNumber": 200
          },
          {
            "text": "func getWeComApp(agentID int64) (*workwx.WorkwxApp, error) {",
            "lineNumber": 201
          },
          {
            "text": "\tcfg := config.Get()",
            "lineNumber": 202
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif cfg.WeCom.CorpID == \"\"",
            "lineNumber": 203
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.3082747459411621
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/ideas/企业微信员工发客户消息方案.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 49
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "# 企业微信员工发给客户消息 - 实现方案",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "## 一、chatgpt-wechat-main 调研结论",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "**chatgpt-wechat-main 未实现该功能。** 其仅包含：",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "- **客服消息**：&#96;SendCustomerChatMessage(openKfID, customerID, msg)&#96;，使用 &#96;cgi-bin/kf/send_msg&#96;，面向「用户添加企业为客服」的场景",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "- **应用消息**：&#96;SendToWeComUser(agentID, userID, msg)&#96;，面向企业成员",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "- **GetCustomerList**：获取客服账号列表 (&#96;kf/account/list&#96;)，不是外部联系人列表",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "无任何 &#96;externalcontact&#96;、&#96;external_contact&#96;、客户联系相关服务端实现。",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "## 二、企业微信两种「发给个人微信」场景对比",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "flowchart TB",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "    subgraph 客服场景",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "        KF[用户扫码添加企业为客服]",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "        KFAPI[\"cgi-bin/kf/send_msg\"]",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "        KFID[open_kf_id + customer_id]",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "        KF --&gt; KFAPI",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "        KFAPI --&gt; KFID",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "    end",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "    subgraph 员工场景",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "        EC[用户扫码添加员工为好友]",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "        ECAPI[\"cgi-bin/externalcontact/add_msg_template\"]",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "        ECID[sender + external_userid]",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "        EC --&gt; ECAPI",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "        ECAPI --&gt; ECID",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "    end",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "| 维度     | 客服消息（已实现）      | 员工发客户（待实现）                          |",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "| -------- | ----------------------- | --------------------------------------------- |",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "| 添加方式 | 用户添加企业为客服      | 用户添加员工为好友                            |",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "| API      | &#96;cgi-bin/kf/send_msg&#96;   | &#96;cgi-bin/externalcontact/add_msg_template&#96; 等 |",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "| 凭证     | 应用 ManageAllKFSession | **客户联系 secret**                           |",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "| 参数     | open_kf_id, customer_id | sender (员工 userid), external_userid         |",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "| **多轮对话** | 支持 | 不支持 |",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "| **限制** | 用户发消息后 48 小时内最多回复 5 条，用户续发可再回复 | 每位客户每天最多 1 条，单向群发 |",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "### 2.1 多轮对话与限制说明",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "**客服消息**（&#96;kf/send_msg&#96;）支持多轮对话：用户主动发消息后 48 小时内，企业可回复最多 5 条；用户继续发消息可再次回复。适合对话式客服场景。",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "**员工发客户**（&#96;add_msg_template&#96;）不支持多轮：无论单独发 1 个还是群发多个，都走群发流程，受「每位客户每天 1 条」限制，是单向群发，非对话模式。企业微信目前没有服务端「员工-客户单聊即时发送」API。",
            "lineNumber": 49
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.29673150181770325
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./config/config.go",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 43,
            "column": 1
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 87,
            "column": 4
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "// WebhookConfig 基础 Webhook 配置",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "type WebhookConfig struct {",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "\tURL        string            &#96;yaml:\"url\" json:\"url\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "\tMethod     string            &#96;yaml:\"method\" json:\"method,omitempty\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "\tHeaders    map[string]string &#96;yaml:\"headers\" json:\"headers,omitempty\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "\tSecret     string            &#96;yaml:\"secret\" json:\"secret,omitempty\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "\tTimeout    int               &#96;yaml:\"timeout\" json:\"timeout,omitempty\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "\tRetryCount int               &#96;yaml:\"retry_count\" json:\"retry_count,omitempty\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "\tRetryDelay int               &#96;yaml:\"retry_delay\" json:\"retry_delay,omitempty\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "\tEvents     []string          &#96;yaml:\"events\" json:\"events,omitempty\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "// StatusStoreConfig 状态存储配置",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "type StatusStoreConfig struct {",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "\tEnabled *bool       &#96;yaml:\"Enabled\" json:\"Enabled,omitempty\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "text": "\tType    string      &#96;yaml:\"Type\" json:\"Type,omitempty\"&#96; // memory, mysql",
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "text": "\tMySQL   MySQLConfig &#96;yaml:\"MySQL\" json:\"MySQL\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "// MySQLConfig MySQL 配置",
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "text": "type MySQLConfig struct {",
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "\tHost        string &#96;yaml:\"Host\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "text": "\tPort        int    &#96;yaml:\"Port\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "text": "\tUser        string &#96;yaml:\"User\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "text": "\tPassword    string &#96;yaml:\"Password\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "text": "\tDatabase    string &#96;yaml:\"Database\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "text": "\tExecTable   string &#96;yaml:\"ExecTable\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "text": "\tStatusTable string &#96;yaml:\"StatusTable\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "text": "// WeChatConfig 微信推送配置",
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "text": "type WeChatConfig struct {",
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "text": "\tEnabled       *bool    &#96;yaml:\"Enabled\" json:\"Enabled,omitempty\"&#96;             // 是否启用微信推送功能",
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "text": "\tAppID         string   &#96;yaml:\"AppID\" json:\"AppID,omitempty\"&#96;                 // 微信服务号 AppID",
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "text": "\tAppSecret     string   &#96;yaml:\"AppSecret\" json:\"AppSecret,omitempty\"&#96;         // 微信服务号 AppSecret",
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "text": "\tOpenIDs       []string &#96;yaml:\"OpenIDs\" json:\"OpenIDs,omitempty\"&#96;             // 默认接收消息的用户 openid 列表",
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "text": "\tTokenFilePath string   &#96;yaml:\"TokenFilePath\" json:\"TokenFilePath,omitempty\"&#96; // AccessToken 存储文件路径（相对于项目根目录）",
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 小程序相关配置（用于发送小程序卡片消息）",
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "text": "\tMiniProgram MiniProgramConfig &#96;yaml:\"MiniProgram\" json:\"MiniProgram,omitempty\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "text": "// MiniProgramConfig 小程序配置",
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "text": "type",
            "lineNumber": 88
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.29376399517059326
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/updates/2026-02-10_access_token_third_party.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 57
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 76
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "{",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "  \"user_id\": \"ZhangSan\",",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "  \"content\": \"任务已完成\",",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "text": "  \"access_token\": \"xxx\"",
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "## 技术说明",
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "### 企业微信外部 token 路径",
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "text": "当 &#96;access_token&#96; 由第三方传入时，企业微信不再通过 go-workwx 的 &#96;WithApp&#96; 获取 token，而是直接请求企业微信 API：",
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "text": "- 接口：&#96;POST {QYAPIHost}/cgi-bin/message/send?access_token={token}&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "text": "- 仍需提供 &#96;agent_id&#96;（可从请求或配置中获取），用于指定发送应用",
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "text": "### 向后兼容",
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "text": "未传入 &#96;access_token&#96; 时，行为与之前一致，内部自动获取并管理 token，不影响现有用法。",
            "lineNumber": 76
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.28744590282440186
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./config/config.go",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 83,
            "column": 80
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 122,
            "column": 47
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "text": "// MiniProgramConfig 小程序配置",
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "text": "type MiniProgramConfig struct {",
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "text": "\tAppID        string &#96;yaml:\"AppID\" json:\"AppID,omitempty\"&#96;               // 小程序 AppID",
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "text": "\tDefaultPath  string &#96;yaml:\"DefaultPath\" json:\"DefaultPath,omitempty\"&#96;   // 默认页面路径，例如 \"pages/index/index\"",
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "text": "\tThumbMediaID string &#96;yaml:\"ThumbMediaID\" json:\"ThumbMediaID,omitempty\"&#96; // 小程序卡片封面图片的 media_id",
            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 92
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93
          },
          {
            "text": "// WeComConfig 企业微信配置",
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "text": "type WeComConfig struct {",
            "lineNumber": 95
          },
          {
            "text": "\tEnabled       *bool              &#96;yaml:\"Enabled\" json:\"Enabled,omitempty\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {
            "text": "\tCorpID        string             &#96;yaml:\"CorpID\" json:\"CorpID,omitempty\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 97
          },
          {
            "text": "\tQYAPIHost     string             &#96;yaml:\"QYAPIHost\" json:\"QYAPIHost,omitempty\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 98
          },
          {
            "text": "\tTokenFilePath string             &#96;yaml:\"TokenFilePath\" json:\"TokenFilePath,omitempty\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 99
          },
          {
            "text": "\tApplications  []WeComApplication &#96;yaml:\"Applications\" json:\"Applications,omitempty\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 101
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102
          },
          {
            "text": "// WeComApplication 企业微信应用配置",
            "lineNumber": 103
          },
          {
            "text": "type WeComApplication struct {",
            "lineNumber": 104
          },
          {
            "text": "\tAgentID            int64  &#96;yaml:\"AgentID\" json:\"AgentID\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 105
          },
          {
            "text": "\tAgentSecret        string &#96;yaml:\"AgentSecret\" json:\"AgentSecret,omitempty\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 106
          },
          {
            "text": "\tManageAllKFSession bool   &#96;yaml:\"ManageAllKFSession\" json:\"ManageAllKFSession,omitempty\"&#96; // 是否管理所有客服会话，用于发送客服消息给个人微信用户",
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109
          },
          {
            "text": "// ChatModelConfig ChatModel 配置（参考 DigFlow 的配置方式）",
            "lineNumber": 110
          },
          {
            "text": "type ChatModelConfig struct {",
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "text": "\tType   string                 &#96;yaml:\"Type\" json:\"Type\"&#96;     // qwen, openai",
            "lineNumber": 112
          },
          {
            "text": "\tConfig map[string]interface{} &#96;yaml:\"Config\" json:\"Config\"&#96; // 模型配置（ApiKey, Model, BaseUrl 等）",
            "lineNumber": 113
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 114
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115
          },
          {
            "text": "// UIUXConfig UI/UX 工具配置",
            "lineNumber": 116
          },
          {
            "text": "type UIUXConfig struct {",
            "lineNumber": 117
          },
          {
            "text": "\tStorage UIUXStorageConfig &#96;yaml:\"Storage\" json:\"Storage\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 118
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 119
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120
          },
          {
            "text": "// UIUXStorageConfig UI/UX 存储配置",
            "lineNumber": 121
          },
          {
            "text": "type UIUXStorageConfig struct {",
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "text": "\tBaseDir string &#96;yaml:\"BaseDir\" json:\"BaseDir\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 123
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.28709539771080017
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/updates/2026-02-10_wecom_push_tool.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 45
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "# 更新：企业微信推送工具",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "**日期**: 2026-02-10",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "**类别**: 功能 / 工具",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": "## 概述",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "新增企业微信（WeCom）推送工具，使 DigEino 作为 DigFlow Agent 插件时，能够将 Agent 运行结果通过企业微信应用消息发送给用户。企业微信通过中转到个人微信，相比公众号具有无封号风险、无需 48 小时内互动等优势。",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "本更新新增三个 Eino 工具：文字消息、图片消息、文本卡片消息。Token 由 &#96;go-workwx&#96; 库内部管理，无需额外配置。",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "## 新功能",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "### 1. 文字消息 (&#96;send_wecom_message&#96;)",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "- 发送纯文本消息给企业成员",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "- 超过 850 字自动分条发送（企业微信单条建议上限）",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "- 支持指定 &#96;agent_id&#96; 或使用配置中第一个应用",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "### 2. 图片消息 (&#96;send_wecom_image&#96;)",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "- 使用临时素材的 &#96;media_id&#96; 发送图片",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "- 需先通过企业微信临时素材上传接口获取 &#96;media_id&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "### 3. 文本卡片消息 (&#96;send_wecom_text_card&#96;)",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "- 发送标题 + 描述 + 链接的卡片，适合通知类场景",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "- 用户点击可跳转指定 URL",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "### 4. 客服消息 (&#96;send_wecom_customer_message&#96;) — 发给个人微信用户",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "- 使用企业微信「客户联系」的客服能力，将消息发给**个人微信**用户",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "- 需提供 &#96;open_kf_id&#96;（客服账号 ID）和 &#96;customer_id&#96;（外部联系人 ID）",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "- 用户需先通过扫码/链接添加企业为客服后才能收到消息",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "- 支持第三方传入 &#96;access_token&#96;（需来自具备「管理所有客服会话」权限的应用）",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "- 或配置 &#96;ManageAllKFSession: true&#96; 的应用，由 DigEino 内部获取 token",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "## 修改的组件",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "### 新增文件",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;tools/wx/wecom_message.go&#96;：企业微信消息发送逻辑（文字、图片、文本卡片）",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;tools/wx/wecom_tool.go&#96;：三个 Eino 工具的工厂函数",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "### 更新的文件",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;config/config.go&#96;：新增 &#96;WeComConfig&#96;、&#96;WeComApplication&#96; 结构体",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;config/config.yaml&#96;：新增 &#96;WeCom&#96; 配置块",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;tools/wx/wx_types.go&#96;：新增企业微信相关请求/响应类型",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;tools/tools.go&#96;：在 &#96;BaseTools&#96; 中注册三个企业微信工具",
            "lineNumber": 44
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.286094069480896
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/wx/wecom_message.go",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 117,
            "column": 137
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 152,
            "column": 26
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "func getWeComCustomerApp() (*workwx.WorkwxApp, error) {",
            "lineNumber": 119
          },
          {
            "text": "\tcfg := config.Get()",
            "lineNumber": 120
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif cfg.WeCom.CorpID == \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 121
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"WeCom CorpID not configured\")",
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 123
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif len(cfg.WeCom.Applications) == 0 {",
            "lineNumber": 124
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"WeCom Applications not configured\")",
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 126
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127
          },
          {
            "text": "\tvar corpSecret string",
            "lineNumber": 128
          },
          {
            "text": "\tvar targetAgentID int64",
            "lineNumber": 129
          },
          {
            "text": "\tfor _, app := range cfg.WeCom.Applications {",
            "lineNumber": 130
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tif app.ManageAllKFSession {",
            "lineNumber": 131
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tcorpSecret = app.AgentSecret",
            "lineNumber": 132
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\ttargetAgentID = app.AgentID",
            "lineNumber": 133
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tbreak",
            "lineNumber": 134
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 135
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 136
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif corpSecret == \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 137
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"no WeCom application with ManageAllKFSession=true found in config\")",
            "lineNumber": 138
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 139
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140
          },
          {
            "text": "\tvar wx *workwx.Workwx",
            "lineNumber": 141
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif cfg.WeCom.QYAPIHost != \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 142
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\twx = workwx.New(cfg.WeCom.CorpID, workwx.WithQYAPIHost(cfg.WeCom.QYAPIHost))",
            "lineNumber": 143
          },
          {
            "text": "\t} else {",
            "lineNumber": 144
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\twx = workwx.New(cfg.WeCom.CorpID)",
            "lineNumber": 145
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 146
          },
          {
            "text": "\treturn wx.WithApp(corpSecret, targetAgentID), nil",
            "lineNumber": 147
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 148
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 149
          },
          {
            "text": "// getWeComCustomerAccessToken 获取具备「管理所有客服会话」权限的应用的 access_token，用于客服 API 调用",
            "lineNumber": 150
          },
          {
            "text": "func getWeComCustomerAccessToken(ctx context.Context) (string, error) {",
            "lineNumber": 151
          },
          {
            "text": "\tcfg := config.Get()",
            "lineNumber": 152
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif cfg.WeCom.CorpID == \"\"",
            "lineNumber": 153
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.28536391258239746
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/updates/2026-02-10_access_token_third_party.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 60
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "# 更新：access_token 支持第三方传入",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "**日期**: 2026-02-10",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "**类别**: 功能增强 / 工具",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": "## 概述",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "公众号（OA）和企业微信（WeCom）的发送工具现已支持通过请求参数传入 &#96;access_token&#96;。当调用方已有自己的 token 管理（如 chatgpt-wechat、DigFlow 等）时，可直接传入 token，无需 DigEino 内部获取，便于统一 token 策略、避免多端重复获取。",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "## 新功能",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "### 请求参数新增 &#96;access_token&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "所有发送接口的请求体中均新增可选字段 &#96;access_token&#96;：",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "- **公众号**：&#96;SendWeChatTextMessageRequest&#96;、&#96;SendWeChatImageMessageRequest&#96;、&#96;SendWeChatMiniProgramPageRequest&#96;、&#96;SendWeChatLinkMessageRequest&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "- **企业微信**：&#96;SendWeComMessageRequest&#96;、&#96;SendWeComImageMessageRequest&#96;、&#96;SendWeComTextCardRequest&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "**优先级**：若请求中提供了 &#96;access_token&#96;，则优先使用；否则仍由 DigEino 内部自动获取（公众号从缓存/API，企业微信由 go-workwx 管理）。",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "## 修改的组件",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "### 更新的文件",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;tools/wx/wx_types.go&#96;：各 Request 类型新增 &#96;AccessToken string&#96; 字段",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;tools/wx/wx_message.go&#96;：公众号发送逻辑中，优先使用 &#96;req.AccessToken&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;tools/wx/wecom_message.go&#96;：企业微信发送逻辑中，若传入 token 则直接调 API，否则使用 go-workwx",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "### 新增类型",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;WeComMessageAPIResponse&#96;：企业微信发送消息 API 的响应结构",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "## 使用示例",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "### 公众号",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "req := wx.SendWeChatTextMessageRequest{",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "    OpenID:      \"user_openid\",",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "    Content:     \"消息内容\",",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "    AccessToken: \"第三方获取的 token\",  // 可选",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "resp, err := wx.SendWeChatTextMessage(ctx, req)",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "### 企业微信",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "req := wx.SendWeComMessageRequest{",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "    UserID:      \"ZhangSan\",",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "    Content:     \"消息内容\",",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "    AccessToken: \"第三方获取的 token\",  // 可选",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "resp, err := wx.SendWeComMessage(ctx, req)",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "### Agent 工具调用（JSON）",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;json",
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "{",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "  \"user_id\": \"ZhangSan\",",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "  \"content\": \"任务已完成\",",
            "lineNumber": 60
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.2838234305381775
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/updates/2026-02-10_wecom_push_tool.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 42
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 89
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "- &#96;tools/wx/wx_types.go&#96;：新增企业微信相关请求/响应类型",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;tools/tools.go&#96;：在 &#96;BaseTools&#96; 中注册三个企业微信工具",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "### 依赖",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;github.com/whyiyhw/go-workwx&#96;：企业微信 Go SDK",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "## 配置",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "在 &#96;config/config.yaml&#96; 中新增 WeCom 配置：",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "WeCom:",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "  Enabled: true                          # 是否启用企业微信推送",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": "  CorpID: \"wwxxxxxxxx\"                   # 企业 ID（我的企业 &gt; 企业信息）",
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "  QYAPIHost: \"https://qyapi.weixin.qq.com\"  # 可选，支持自定义域名",
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "  TokenFilePath: \"storage/app/wecom/access_token.json\"",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "  Applications:",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "    - AgentID: 1000002                   # 应用 ID（应用管理 &gt; 自建应用）",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "text": "      AgentSecret: \"xxx\"                 # 应用 Secret",
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "text": "    - AgentID: 1000003                   # 客服消息专用应用（需开通客户联系）",
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "text": "      AgentSecret: \"yyy\"",
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "text": "      ManageAllKFSession: true           # 管理所有客服会话，用于 send_wecom_customer_message",
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "## 工具参数说明",
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "text": "| 工具名 | 参数 | 说明 |",
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "text": "|--------|------|------|",
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "text": "| &#96;send_wecom_message&#96; | &#96;user_id&#96; (必填) | 企业成员 userID |",
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "text": "| | &#96;content&#96; (必填) | 文字内容 |",
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "text": "| | &#96;agent_id&#96; (可选) | 应用 ID，不传则用配置中第一个 |",
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "text": "| &#96;send_wecom_image&#96; | &#96;user_id&#96; (必填) | 企业成员 userID |",
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "text": "| | &#96;media_id&#96; (必填) | 图片 media_id（临时素材） |",
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "text": "| | &#96;agent_id&#96; (可选) | 应用 ID |",
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "text": "| &#96;send_wecom_text_card&#96; | &#96;user_id&#96; (必填) | 企业成员 userID |",
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "text": "| | &#96;title&#96; (必填) | 卡片标题 |",
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "text": "| | &#96;description&#96; (必填) | 卡片描述 |",
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "text": "| | &#96;url&#96; (必填) | 点击跳转链接 |",
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "text": "| | &#96;agent_id&#96; (可选) | 应用 ID |",
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "text": "| &#96;send_wecom_customer_message&#96; | &#96;open_kf_id&#96; (必填) | 客服账号 ID |",
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "text": "| | &#96;customer_id&#96; (必填) | 外部联系人 ID（external_userid） |",
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "text": "| | &#96;content&#96; (必填) | 文字内容 |",
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "text": "| | &#96;access_token&#96; (可选) | 第三方传入的 access_token |",
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "text": "**user_id 来源**：由 DigFlow Agent 在调用时从会话上下文（如企业微信消息的 FromUserID）解析并传入。",
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "text": "**客服消息前置**：用户需先通过企业微信客服链接/扫码添加企业为客服，系统会为每个用户分配 &#96;external_userid&#96;（即 &#96;customer_id&#96;）。&#96;open_kf_id&#96; 在企业微信管理后台创建客服账号后获得。",
            "lineNumber": 89
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.2788071632385254
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/research/jina_reader.go",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 67,
            "column": 76
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "package research",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "import (",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"context\"",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"encoding/json\"",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"fmt\"",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"io\"",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"net/http\"",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"strings\"",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"time\"",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool\"",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool/utils\"",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": ")",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "// JinaReaderRequest 网页读取请求",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "type JinaReaderRequest struct {",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "\tURL string &#96;json:\"url\" jsonschema:\"required,description=要读取并转换为 Markdown 的网页 URL\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "// JinaReaderResponse 网页读取响应",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "type JinaReaderResponse struct {",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "\tMarkdown string &#96;json:\"markdown\" jsonschema:\"description=转换后的 Markdown 内容\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "// JinaReader 使用 r.jina.ai 将网页转换为 Markdown",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "// 这是一个极其强大的抓取方案，能够有效绕过微信公众号等平台的反爬验证",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "func JinaReader(ctx context.Context, req *JinaReaderRequest) (*JinaReaderResponse, error) {",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif req.URL == \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"URL 不能为空\")",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 构造 Jina Reader URL",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "\tjinaURL := fmt.Sprintf(\"https://r.jina.ai/%s\", req.URL)",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "\thttpReq, err := http.NewRequestWithContext(ctx, \"GET\", jinaURL, nil)",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"创建请求失败: %w\", err)",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 设置 Header 为 text/event-stream",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 实验证明 Jina Reader 的免费模式对 event-stream 的反爬支持更佳",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "\thttpReq.Header.Set(\"Accept\", \"text/event-stream\")",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "\tclient := &amp;http.Client{Timeout: 90 * time.Second}",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "\tresp, err := client.Do(httpReq)",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"请求 Jina Reader 失败: %w\", err)",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "\tdefer resp.Body.Close()",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif resp.StatusCode != http.StatusOK {",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tbody, _ := io.ReadAll(resp.Body)",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"Jina Reader 返回错误: %d, body: %s\", resp.StatusCode, string(body))",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "\tbody, err := io.ReadAll(resp.Body)",
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"读取响应失败: %w\", err)",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 简单的 EventStream 解析逻辑 (Jina Reader 的格式通常是 data: {...})",
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 我们尝试寻找 data: 开头的行并提取其中的 content",
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "text": "\tcontent := string(body)",
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 如果是 event-stream 格式，尝试提取数据部分",
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 为简单起见，如果包含 \"data: {\" 则尝试剥离前缀，",
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 但其实 Jina Reader 在 event-stream 模式下如果是完整返回，",
            "lineNumber": 68
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.27683520317077637
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/wx/wx_types.go",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 131,
            "column": 79
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 173,
            "column": 154
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "type SendWeComTextCardRequest struct {",
            "lineNumber": 133
          },
          {
            "text": "\tUserID      string &#96;json:\"user_id\" jsonschema:\"required,description=必填：企业成员 userID\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 134
          },
          {
            "text": "\tTitle       string &#96;json:\"title\" jsonschema:\"required,description=必填：卡片标题\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 135
          },
          {
            "text": "\tDescription string &#96;json:\"description\" jsonschema:\"required,description=必填：卡片描述\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 136
          },
          {
            "text": "\tURL         string &#96;json:\"url\" jsonschema:\"required,description=必填：点击卡片的跳转链接\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 137
          },
          {
            "text": "\tAgentID     int64  &#96;json:\"agent_id\" jsonschema:\"description=可选：应用 ID\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 138
          },
          {
            "text": "\tAccessToken string &#96;json:\"access_token\" jsonschema:\"description=可选：第三方传入的 access_token，若提供则优先使用\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 139
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 140
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141
          },
          {
            "text": "// SendWeComTextCardResponse 发送企业微信文本卡片消息的响应",
            "lineNumber": 142
          },
          {
            "text": "type SendWeComTextCardResponse struct {",
            "lineNumber": 143
          },
          {
            "text": "\tSuccess bool   &#96;json:\"success\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 144
          },
          {
            "text": "\tMessage string &#96;json:\"message\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 145
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 146
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147
          },
          {
            "text": "// WeComTokenData 企业微信 AccessToken 存储结构（按 agentID 区分）",
            "lineNumber": 148
          },
          {
            "text": "type WeComTokenData struct {",
            "lineNumber": 149
          },
          {
            "text": "\tAgentID     int64  &#96;json:\"agent_id\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 150
          },
          {
            "text": "\tAccessToken string &#96;json:\"access_token\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 151
          },
          {
            "text": "\tExpiresIn   int64  &#96;json:\"expires_in\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 152
          },
          {
            "text": "\tCreatedAt   int64  &#96;json:\"created_at\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 153
          },
          {
            "text": "\tExpiresAt   int64  &#96;json:\"expires_at\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 154
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 155
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 156
          },
          {
            "text": "// WeComTokenAPIResponse 企业微信获取 token 的 API 响应",
            "lineNumber": 157
          },
          {
            "text": "type WeComTokenAPIResponse struct {",
            "lineNumber": 158
          },
          {
            "text": "\tAccessToken string &#96;json:\"access_token\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 159
          },
          {
            "text": "\tExpiresIn   int64  &#96;json:\"expires_in\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 160
          },
          {
            "text": "\tErrCode     int    &#96;json:\"errcode\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 161
          },
          {
            "text": "\tErrMsg      string &#96;json:\"errmsg\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 162
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 163
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 164
          },
          {
            "text": "// WeComMessageAPIResponse 企业微信发送消息 API 响应",
            "lineNumber": 165
          },
          {
            "text": "type WeComMessageAPIResponse struct {",
            "lineNumber": 166
          },
          {
            "text": "\tErrCode int    &#96;json:\"errcode\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 167
          },
          {
            "text": "\tErrMsg  string &#96;json:\"errmsg\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 168
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 169
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 170
          },
          {
            "text": "// SendWeComCustomerMessageRequest 发送企业微信客服消息的请求参数（发给个人微信用户）",
            "lineNumber": 171
          },
          {
            "text": "// 使用企业微信「客户联系」的客服能力，用户需先通过扫码/链接添加企业为客服后才可收到消息",
            "lineNumber": 172
          },
          {
            "text": "type SendWeComCustomerMessageRequest struct {",
            "lineNumber": 173
          },
          {
            "text": "\tOpenKfID    string &#96;json:\"open_kf_id\" jsonschema:\"required,description=必填：客服账号 ID，在企业微信管理后台创建客服账号后获得\"",
            "lineNumber": 174
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.27303504943847656
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {

        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "func fetchAccessTokenFromWeChat(ctx context.Context, appID, appSecret string) (*AccessTokenData, error) {",
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 微信获取 AccessToken 的 API",
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "text": "\turl := fmt.Sprintf(\"https://api.weixin.qq.com/cgi-bin/token?grant_type=client_credential&amp;appid=%s&amp;secret=%s\",",
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tappID, appSecret)",
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "text": "\thttpReq, err := http.NewRequestWithContext(ctx, \"GET\", url, nil)",
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "text": "\tclient := &amp;http.Client{",
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tTimeout: 30 * time.Second,",
            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 92
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93
          },
          {
            "text": "\tresp, err := client.Do(httpReq)",
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 95
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to call WeChat API: %w\", err)",
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 97
          },
          {
            "text": "\tdefer resp.Body.Close()",
            "lineNumber": 98
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif resp.StatusCode != http.StatusOK {",
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tbody, _ := io.ReadAll(resp.Body)",
            "lineNumber": 101
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"WeChat API returned status %d: %s\", resp.StatusCode, string(body))",
            "lineNumber": 102
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 103
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104
          },
          {
            "text": "\tbody, err := io.ReadAll(resp.Body)",
            "lineNumber": 105
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 106
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to read response body: %w\", err)",
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109
          },
          {
            "text": "\tvar apiResp WeChatTokenResponse",
            "lineNumber": 110
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err := json.Unmarshal(body, &amp;apiResp); err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to parse response: %w\", err)",
            "lineNumber": 112
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 113
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 检查是否有错误",
            "lineNumber": 115
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif apiResp.ErrCode != 0 {",
            "lineNumber": 116
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"WeChat API error: errcode=%d, errmsg=%s\", apiResp.ErrCode, apiResp.ErrMsg)",
            "lineNumber": 117
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 118
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif apiResp.AccessToken == \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 120
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"empty access_token in response\")",
            "lineNumber": 121
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 构建 Token 数据",
            "lineNumber": 124
          },
          {
            "text": "\tnow := time.Now().Unix()",
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "text": "\ttokenData := &amp;AccessTokenData{",

          },

          },
          {

          },

          },

          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132
          },
          {
            "text": "\treturn tokenData, nil",
            "lineNumber": 133
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 134
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135
          },
          {
            "text": "// GetAccessToken 获取 AccessToken（带缓存和自动刷新）",
            "lineNumber": 136
          },
          {
            "text": "func GetAccessToken(ctx context.Context) (string, error) {",
            "lineNumber": 137
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 138
          },
          {

          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/wx/wecom_message.go",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 255,
            "column": 50
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 301,
            "column": 55
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "func SendWeComMessage(ctx context.Context, req SendWeComMessageRequest) (SendWeComMessageResponse, error) {",
            "lineNumber": 257
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif req.UserID == \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 258
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn SendWeComMessageResponse{}, fmt.Errorf(\"user_id is required\")",
            "lineNumber": 259
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 260
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif req.Content == \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 261
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn SendWeComMessageResponse{}, fmt.Errorf(\"content is required\")",
            "lineNumber": 262
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 263
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 264
          },
          {
            "text": "\tagentID, err := getWeComAgentID(req.AgentID)",
            "lineNumber": 265
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 266
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn SendWeComMessageResponse{}, err",
            "lineNumber": 267
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 268
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 269
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 第三方传入 token 时直接调 API",
            "lineNumber": 270
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif req.AccessToken != \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 271
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tif utf8.RuneCountInString(req.Content) &gt; maxTextLength {",
            "lineNumber": 272
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tparts := splitMsg(req.Content, maxTextLength)",
            "lineNumber": 273
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tfor _, part := range parts {",
            "lineNumber": 274
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\tbody := map[string]interface{}{",
            "lineNumber": 275
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\t\"msgtype\": \"text\",",
            "lineNumber": 276
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\t\"text\":    map[string]string{\"content\": part},",
            "lineNumber": 277
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 278
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\tif err := sendWeComMessageAPI(ctx, req.AccessToken, agentID, req.UserID, body); err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 279
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\t\treturn SendWeComMessageResponse{Success: false, Message: fmt.Sprintf(\"发送失败: %v\", err)}, err",
            "lineNumber": 280
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 281
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 282
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\treturn SendWeComMessageResponse{Success: true, Message: fmt.Sprintf(\"成功发送 %d 条消息\", len(parts))}, nil",
            "lineNumber": 283
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 284
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tbody := map[string]interface{}{",
            "lineNumber": 285
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\"msgtype\": \"text\",",
            "lineNumber": 286
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\t\"text\":    map[string]string{\"content\": req.Content},",
            "lineNumber": 287
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 288
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tif err := sendWeComMessageAPI(ctx, req.AccessToken, agentID, req.UserID, body); err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 289
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\treturn SendWeComMessageResponse{Success: false, Message: fmt.Sprintf(\"发送失败: %v\", err)}, err",
            "lineNumber": 290
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 291
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn SendWeComMessageResponse{Success: true, Message: \"消息发送成功\"}, nil",
            "lineNumber": 292
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 293
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 294
          },
          {
            "text": "\t// 内部 token：使用 go-workwx",
            "lineNumber": 295
          },
          {
            "text": "\tapp, err := getWeComApp(req.AgentID)",
            "lineNumber": 296
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 297
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn SendWeComMessageResponse{}, err",
            "lineNumber": 298
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 299
          },
          {
            "text": "\trecipient := &amp;workwx.Recipient{UserIDs: []string{req.UserID}}",
            "lineNumber": 300
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 301
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif utf8.RuneCountInString(req.Content) &gt; maxTextLength",
            "lineNumber": 302
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.2679167091846466
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/ideas/企业微信员工发客户消息方案.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 43
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 84
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "### 2.1 多轮对话与限制说明",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "**客服消息**（&#96;kf/send_msg&#96;）支持多轮对话：用户主动发消息后 48 小时内，企业可回复最多 5 条；用户继续发消息可再次回复。适合对话式客服场景。",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "**员工发客户**（&#96;add_msg_template&#96;）不支持多轮：无论单独发 1 个还是群发多个，都走群发流程，受「每位客户每天 1 条」限制，是单向群发，非对话模式。企业微信目前没有服务端「员工-客户单聊即时发送」API。",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "**多轮对话的实现**：真正的多轮需员工在企微客户端与客户聊天，或通过「聊天工具栏」等客户端接口，无服务端 API。",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "### 2.2 chatgpt-wechat-main 对客服消息限制的处理",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "chatgpt-wechat-main 实现了客服消息，其处理方式如下：",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "- **48 小时**：无显式校验。回复均由用户消息触发（&#96;DealUserLastMessageByToken&#96; → &#96;CustomerCallLogic&#96;），用户发新消息即刷新 48 小时窗口，天然满足。",
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "- **5 条**：有意识规避，但无条数统计。做法包括：",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "  - 注释「我们已经收到了您的请求正在处理中...」「语音识别成功」等中间提示，减少冗余消息",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "  - 客服消息不开启 debug 模式（代码注释：&#96;客服消息不开启 debug 模式，因为响应条数 5条的限制&#96;）",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "text": "  - 流式回复仍会拆分长文本为多条发送，超 5 条时可能被企微拒绝，无显式计数或截断",
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "## 三、企业微信官方能力",
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "### 1. 服务端 API（推荐）",
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "text": "**创建企业群发**（path 92698）：",
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "text": "- 接口：&#96;POST /cgi-bin/externalcontact/add_msg_template&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "text": "- 用途：创建群发任务，指定成员向其客户发送消息",
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "text": "- 权限：需「客户联系」功能及对应 secret",
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "text": "流程：",
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "text": "1. 调用 &#96;add_msg_template&#96; 创建群发任务（含 sender、external_userid、消息内容）",
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "text": "2. 调用 &#96;get_groupmsg_list_v2&#96; 获取任务状态",
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "text": "3. 可选：&#96;send_groupmsg&#96; 提醒成员发送",
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "text": "### 2. 客户联系 Secret 获取",
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "text": "- 路径：企业微信管理后台 → 客户联系 → 客户 → API",
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "text": "- 字段：客户联系 Secret（与自建应用 Secret 不同）",
            "lineNumber": 84
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.2656799554824829
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/updates/2026-03-07_企业微信客服消息多类型支持.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 32
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "# 2026-03-07 企业微信客服消息多类型支持",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "## 概述",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "在「企业微信 → 个人微信」客服通道上，除原有文字消息外，新增**图片、语音、视频、文件、图文链接、小程序卡片**六种消息类型的发送能力。通过 6 个独立工具（&#96;send_wecom_customer_image&#96; 等）暴露，与现有「发给企业成员」的 &#96;send_wecom_message&#96; / &#96;send_wecom_image&#96; / &#96;send_wecom_text_card&#96; 设计一致，便于按场景选用。",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "## 新增工具",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "| 工具名 | msgtype | 主要参数 |",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "|--------|---------|----------|",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "| send_wecom_customer_image | image | open_kf_id, customer_id, media_id |",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "| send_wecom_customer_voice | voice | open_kf_id, customer_id, media_id |",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "| send_wecom_customer_video | video | open_kf_id, customer_id, media_id [, title, description] |",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "| send_wecom_customer_file | file | open_kf_id, customer_id, media_id |",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "| send_wecom_customer_link | link | open_kf_id, customer_id, title, desc, url, thumb_media_id |",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "| send_wecom_customer_miniprogram | miniprogram | open_kf_id, customer_id, title, appid, thumb_media_id [, pagepath] |",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "- 图片/语音/视频/文件：需先通过企业微信「上传临时素材」接口获取 &#96;media_id&#96;。",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "- 图文链接：&#96;thumb_media_id&#96; 为封面图，同样需上传临时素材获得。",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "- 小程序：&#96;thumb_media_id&#96; 为卡片封面图；可选 &#96;pagepath&#96; 指定点击后跳转的小程序页面。",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "- 所有工具均支持可选 &#96;access_token&#96;；未传时由 DigEino 使用配置中 &#96;ManageAllKFSession: true&#96; 的应用自动获取 token 并调用客服 API。",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "## 变更文件",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "### tools/wx/wx_types.go",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "- 新增 6 组请求/响应类型：&#96;SendWeComCustomerImageRequest/Response&#96;、&#96;SendWeComCustomerVoiceRequest/Response&#96;、&#96;SendWeComCustomerVideoRequest/Response&#96;、&#96;SendWeComCustomerFileRequest/Response&#96;、&#96;SendWeComCustomerLinkRequest/Response&#96;、&#96;SendWeComCustomerMiniprogramRequest/Response&#96;。",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "### tools/wx/wecom_message.go",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "- 新增 &#96;getWeComCustomerAccessToken(ctx)&#96;：使用 ManageAllKFSession 应用的 secret 调用企业微信 gettoken 接口，供无 access_token 时使用。",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "- 新增 6 个发送函数：&#96;SendWeComCustomerImage&#96;、&#96;SendWeComCustomerVoice&#96;、&#96;SendWeComCustomerVideo&#96;、&#96;SendWeComCustomerFile&#96;、&#96;SendWeComCustomerLink&#96;、&#96;SendWeComCustomerMiniprogram&#96;。内部统一构造 &#96;msgtype&#96; 对应 body 后调用既有 &#96;sendWeComCustomerMessageAPI&#96;。",
            "lineNumber": 32
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.26561105251312256
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/wx/wecom_message.go",

          "startPosition": {

        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "func sendWeComMessageAPI(ctx context.Context, accessToken string, agentID int64, userID string, body map[string]interface{}) error {",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "\turl := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s/cgi-bin/message/send?access_token=%s\", getWeComAPIHost(), accessToken)",
