      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/ideas/digflow_ui_ux_integration.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 659
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 732
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "5. **模型名称一致性**：",
            "lineNumber": 660
          },
          {
            "text": "   - 使用 Agent 工具时，&#96;agent.yml&#96; 中的模型名称必须与 &#96;tool_register.go&#96; 中的名称一致",
            "lineNumber": 661
          },
          {
            "text": "   - 推荐使用 &#96;ui_model&#96; 作为模型名称",
            "lineNumber": 662
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 663
          },
          {
            "text": "## 故障排查",
            "lineNumber": 664
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 665
          },
          {
            "text": "### 问题 1：工具未找到",
            "lineNumber": 666
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 667
          },
          {
            "text": "**错误信息**：&#96;工具 xxx 未注册&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 668
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 669
          },
          {
            "text": "**解决方案**：",
            "lineNumber": 670
          },
          {
            "text": "1. 检查工具是否在 &#96;tool_register.go&#96; 中正确注册",
            "lineNumber": 671
          },
          {
            "text": "2. 检查 &#96;bootstrap/init.go&#96; 是否导入了工具包",
            "lineNumber": 672
          },
          {
            "text": "3. 查看日志确认工具注册是否成功",
            "lineNumber": 673
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 674
          },
          {
            "text": "### 问题 2：模型未找到（Agent 工具）",
            "lineNumber": 675
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 676
          },
          {
            "text": "**错误**：&#96;模型 ui_model 不存在&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 677
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 678
          },
          {
            "text": "**解决**：",
            "lineNumber": 679
          },
          {
            "text": "1. 检查 &#96;agent.yml&#96; 中是否配置了名为 &#96;ui_model&#96; 的模型",
            "lineNumber": 680
          },
          {
            "text": "2. 确保模型名称与 &#96;tool_register.go&#96; 中的名称一致",
            "lineNumber": 681
          },
          {
            "text": "3. 检查模型是否已正确注册到 ModelRegistry",
            "lineNumber": 682
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 683
          },
          {
            "text": "### 问题 3：Agent 工具创建失败",
            "lineNumber": 684
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 685
          },
          {
            "text": "**错误**：&#96;failed to create UI design system agent&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 686
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 687
          },
          {
            "text": "**解决**：",
            "lineNumber": 688
          },
          {
            "text": "1. 检查 ChatModel 是否正确获取",
            "lineNumber": 689
          },
          {
            "text": "2. 检查 DigEino 依赖是否正确安装",
            "lineNumber": 690
          },
          {
            "text": "3. 查看日志获取详细错误信息",
            "lineNumber": 691
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 692
          },
          {
            "text": "### 问题 4：工具调用失败",
            "lineNumber": 693
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 694
          },
          {
            "text": "**错误**：&#96;agent execution failed&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 695
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 696
          },
          {
            "text": "**解决**：",
            "lineNumber": 697
          },
          {
            "text": "1. 检查模型 API Key 是否正确配置",
            "lineNumber": 698
          },
          {
            "text": "2. 检查网络连接",
            "lineNumber": 699
          },
          {
            "text": "3. 查看 Agent 内部日志",
            "lineNumber": 700
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 701
          },
          {
            "text": "### 问题 5：配置加载失败",
            "lineNumber": 702
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 703
          },
          {
            "text": "**错误信息**：&#96;加载 DigEino 配置失败&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 704
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 705
          },
          {
            "text": "**解决方案**：",
            "lineNumber": 706
          },
          {
            "text": "1. 检查配置文件路径是否正确",
            "lineNumber": 707
          },
          {
            "text": "2. 如果不需要配置驱动功能，可以不加载 DigEino 配置",
            "lineNumber": 708
          },
          {
            "text": "3. 使用 DigFlow 的模型注册表代替",
            "lineNumber": 709
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 710
          },
          {
            "text": "### 问题 6：存储路径问题",
            "lineNumber": 711
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 712
          },
          {
            "text": "**错误信息**：&#96;failed to create directories&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 713
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 714
          },
          {
            "text": "**解决方案**：",
            "lineNumber": 715
          },
          {
            "text": "1. 检查存储目录的写入权限",
            "lineNumber": 716
          },
          {
            "text": "2. 确认 &#96;BaseDir&#96; 配置是否正确",
            "lineNumber": 717
          },
          {
            "text": "3. 使用绝对路径避免路径问题",
            "lineNumber": 718
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 719
          },
          {
            "text": "## 完整示例：在 UI Pro 应用中使用",
            "lineNumber": 720
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 721
          },
          {
            "text": "参考 &#96;DigFlow/app/ui_pro/config/agent.yml&#96;，你可以看到 UI Pro 应用已经配置了 UI/UX 工具：",
            "lineNumber": 722
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 723
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml",
            "lineNumber": 724
          },
          {
            "text": "Tools:",
            "lineNumber": 725
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Name: \"ui_ux_search\"",
            "lineNumber": 726
          },
          {
            "text": "    Description: \"检索 UI/UX 设计知识库\"",
            "lineNumber": 727
          },
          {
            "text": "    UseGlobal: true  # 如果工具在全局注册，使用 UseGlobal: true",
            "lineNumber": 728
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 729
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 730
          },
          {
            "text": "如果你的工具在应用级别注册，使用 &#96;UseGlobal: false&#96;。",
            "lineNumber": 731
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.20230719447135925
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/research_tools_guide.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 63
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 112
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "- **参数**：",
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "  - &#96;url&#96;: 目标网页地址（必填）。",
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "text": "  - &#96;action&#96;: &#96;read&#96; / &#96;screenshot&#96;，默认 &#96;read&#96;。",
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "  - &#96;wait_selector&#96;: (可选) 指定 CSS 选择器并等待其出现。",
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "text": "  - &#96;use_cookie_domain&#96;: (可选) 从 &#96;Tools.LocalBrowser.CookieStoreDir&#96; 加载指定域名 Cookie 并在结束后回写。",
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "text": "- **返回**：",
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "text": "  - &#96;read&#96;: 返回 &#96;title&#96;、&#96;text&#96;、&#96;markdown&#96;。",
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "text": "  - &#96;screenshot&#96;: 返回 &#96;title&#96;、&#96;screenshot_base64&#96;。",
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "text": "- **配置**：通过 &#96;Tools.LocalBrowser&#96; 控制启用、并发、超时、域名白名单与 Cookie 目录。",
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "text": "- **最佳实践**：适合动态渲染页面、复杂反爬页面和需要截图证据的场景。生产环境建议配置 &#96;AllowedDomains&#96; 以限制可访问域。",
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "text": "## 如何在 Agent 编排中使用",
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "text": "由于 &#96;DigFlow&#96; 的底层加载机制会自动调用 &#96;DigEino&#96; 的 &#96;BaseTools&#96;，您只需在您的 &#96;agent.yml&#96; 的 &#96;Tools&#96; 部分直接引用名称即可：",
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml",
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "text": "Tools:",
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Name: \"research_grep\"",
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "text": "    UseGlobal: true",
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Name: \"research_read\"",
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "text": "    UseGlobal: true",
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Name: \"research_doc_to_md\"",
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "text": "    UseGlobal: true",
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Name: \"firecrawl_scrape\"",
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "text": "    UseGlobal: true",
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Name: \"research_jina_reader\"",
            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {
            "text": "    UseGlobal: true",
            "lineNumber": 92
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Name: \"research_local_scraper\"",
            "lineNumber": 93
          },
          {
            "text": "    UseGlobal: true",
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Name: \"browser_browse\"",
            "lineNumber": 95
          },
          {
            "text": "    UseGlobal: true",
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Name: \"web_search\"",
            "lineNumber": 97
          },
          {
            "text": "    UseGlobal: true",
            "lineNumber": 98
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 99
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "text": "## 阶梯式抓取策略建议",
            "lineNumber": 101
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102
          },
          {
            "text": "在 Agent 的 SystemPrompt 中，建议遵循以下抓取优先级：",
            "lineNumber": 103
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104
          },
          {
            "text": "1. **L1 (轻量级)**：优先使用 &#96;firecrawl_scrape&#96;（速度快、资源占用低）。",
            "lineNumber": 105
          },
          {
            "text": "2. **L2 (高级抓取)**：若 L1 返回\"环境异常\"、\"验证码\"或内容明显不正确，尝试 &#96;research_jina_reader&#96;。",
            "lineNumber": 106
          },
          {
            "text": "3. **L3 (本地浏览器专用抓取)**：若 L2 仍失败，可尝试 &#96;research_local_scraper&#96;（适合微信公众号等强反爬场景，但延迟较高）。",
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "text": "4. **L3.5 (本地浏览器通用访问)**：需要等待特定元素、复用登录 Cookie 或截图时，使用 &#96;browser_browse&#96;。",
            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "text": "5. **L4 (搜索兜底)**：若所有抓取均失败，使用 &#96;web_search&#96; 搜索目标 URL，获取快照摘要。",
            "lineNumber": 109
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110
          },
          {
            "text": "## 注意事项",
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "text": "1. **Token 消耗**：由于这些工具往往返回大量文本，建议配合具备长上下文处理能力的模型（如 DeepSeek, Qwen）。",
            "lineNumber": 112
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.20171430706977844
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/ideas/digflow_ui_ux_integration.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 527
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 597
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "func init() {",
            "lineNumber": 528
          },
          {
            "text": "    // 加载 DigEino 配置",
            "lineNumber": 529
          },
          {
            "text": "    _, err := config.Load(\"config/digeino.yaml\")",
            "lineNumber": 530
          },
          {
            "text": "    if err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 531
          },
          {
            "text": "        logger.Warn(\"加载 DigEino 配置失败，使用默认配置\", zap.Error(err))",
            "lineNumber": 532
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 533
          },
          {
            "text": "    ",
            "lineNumber": 534
          },
          {
            "text": "    // ... 注册工具",
            "lineNumber": 535
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 536
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 537
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 538
          },
          {
            "text": "## 使用示例",
            "lineNumber": 539
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 540
          },
          {
            "text": "### 示例 1：使用 UI/UX Agent 工具（推荐）⭐",
            "lineNumber": 541
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 542
          },
          {
            "text": "这是最简单的方式，Agent 会自动完成整个工作流：",
            "lineNumber": 543
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 544
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml",
            "lineNumber": 545
          },
          {
            "text": "Nodes:",
            "lineNumber": 546
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Key: \"designer\"",
            "lineNumber": 547
          },
          {
            "text": "    Type: \"chat_model\"",
            "lineNumber": 548
          },
          {
            "text": "    Model: \"ui_model\"",
            "lineNumber": 549
          },
          {
            "text": "    SystemPrompt: |",
            "lineNumber": 550
          },
          {
            "text": "      你是一位专业的 UI/UX 设计师。",
            "lineNumber": 551
          },
          {
            "text": "      当用户需要生成设计系统时，使用 generate_ui_design_system 工具。",
            "lineNumber": 552
          },
          {
            "text": "      这个工具会自动完成需求分析、生成设计系统、补充搜索和持久化。",
            "lineNumber": 553
          },
          {
            "text": "    BindTools:",
            "lineNumber": 554
          },
          {
            "text": "      - \"generate_ui_design_system\"",
            "lineNumber": 555
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 556
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 557
          },
          {
            "text": "**用户请求示例**：",
            "lineNumber": 558
          },
          {
            "text": "- \"生成一个美容spa的设计系统，项目名称：Serenity Spa\"",
            "lineNumber": 559
          },
          {
            "text": "- \"为我的电商平台生成设计系统，技术栈：react\"",
            "lineNumber": 560
          },
          {
            "text": "- \"生成设计系统并持久化，项目名称：MyApp，页面：homepage\"",
            "lineNumber": 561
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 562
          },
          {
            "text": "**Agent 会自动**：",
            "lineNumber": 563
          },
          {
            "text": "1. 分析需求：识别产品类型（Beauty/Spa）、样式关键词、行业、技术栈",
            "lineNumber": 564
          },
          {
            "text": "2. 生成设计系统：调用 &#96;generate_design_system&#96; 生成完整设计系统",
            "lineNumber": 565
          },
          {
            "text": "3. 补充搜索：根据需要调用 &#96;ui_ux_search&#96; 获取 React 技术栈指南",
            "lineNumber": 566
          },
          {
            "text": "4. 返回结果：返回完整的设计系统，包括 Pattern、Style、Colors、Typography、Effects",
            "lineNumber": 567
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 568
          },
          {
            "text": "### 示例 2：使用场景",
            "lineNumber": 569
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 570
          },
          {
            "text": "#### 场景 1：快速生成设计系统",
            "lineNumber": 571
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 572
          },
          {
            "text": "**用户请求**：",
            "lineNumber": 573
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 574
          },
          {
            "text": "生成一个电商平台的设计系统",
            "lineNumber": 575
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 576
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 577
          },
          {
            "text": "**Agent 响应**：",
            "lineNumber": 578
          },
          {
            "text": "- 自动识别产品类型：E-commerce",
            "lineNumber": 579
          },
          {
            "text": "- 生成完整设计系统（配色、字体、样式、布局模式）",
            "lineNumber": 580
          },
          {
            "text": "- 返回格式化的设计系统文档",
            "lineNumber": 581
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 582
          },
          {
            "text": "#### 场景 2：生成并持久化设计系统",
            "lineNumber": 583
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 584
          },
          {
            "text": "**用户请求**：",
            "lineNumber": 585
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 586
          },
          {
            "text": "生成一个 SaaS 产品的设计系统，项目名称：MySaaS，技术栈：react，并持久化",
            "lineNumber": 587
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 588
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 589
          },
          {
            "text": "**Agent 响应**：",
            "lineNumber": 590
          },
          {
            "text": "- 生成设计系统",
            "lineNumber": 591
          },
          {
            "text": "- 获取 React 技术栈指南",
            "lineNumber": 592
          },
          {
            "text": "- 持久化到 &#96;storage/app/ui_ux/design-system/mysaas/MASTER.md&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 593
          },
          {
            "text": "- 返回持久化路径",
            "lineNumber": 594
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 595
          },
          {
            "text": "#### 场景 3：生成页面特定设计系统",
            "lineNumber": 596
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.19690686464309692
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/ideas/digflow_ui_ux_integration.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 441
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 529
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "- **stack**（可选）：技术栈，Agent 会自动获取该技术栈的指南",
            "lineNumber": 442
          },
          {
            "text": "- **persist**（可选）：是否持久化设计系统到文件",
            "lineNumber": 443
          },
          {
            "text": "- **page_name**（可选）：页面名称，用于生成页面特定的覆盖文件",
            "lineNumber": 444
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 445
          },
          {
            "text": "### Agent 工作流",
            "lineNumber": 446
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 447
          },
          {
            "text": "Agent 内部自动执行以下工作流：",
            "lineNumber": 448
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 449
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 450
          },
          {
            "text": "1. 分析需求",
            "lineNumber": 451
          },
          {
            "text": "   ↓",
            "lineNumber": 452
          },
          {
            "text": "2. 生成设计系统（generate_design_system）",
            "lineNumber": 453
          },
          {
            "text": "   ↓",
            "lineNumber": 454
          },
          {
            "text": "3. 补充搜索（ui_ux_search，如果需要）",
            "lineNumber": 455
          },
          {
            "text": "   - 样式选项",
            "lineNumber": 456
          },
          {
            "text": "   - 图表推荐",
            "lineNumber": 457
          },
          {
            "text": "   - UX 最佳实践",
            "lineNumber": 458
          },
          {
            "text": "   - 字体选项",
            "lineNumber": 459
          },
          {
            "text": "   ↓",
            "lineNumber": 460
          },
          {
            "text": "4. 技术栈指南（ui_ux_search with stack，如果指定了技术栈）",
            "lineNumber": 461
          },
          {
            "text": "   ↓",
            "lineNumber": 462
          },
          {
            "text": "5. 持久化（persist_design_system，如果用户请求）",
            "lineNumber": 463
          },
          {
            "text": "   ↓",
            "lineNumber": 464
          },
          {
            "text": "6. 返回完整结果",
            "lineNumber": 465
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 466
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 467
          },
          {
            "text": "### 与单独工具的区别",
            "lineNumber": 468
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 469
          },
          {
            "text": "#### 使用单独工具（方式一、二）",
            "lineNumber": 470
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 471
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml",
            "lineNumber": 472
          },
          {
            "text": "# 需要手动编排工作流",
            "lineNumber": 473
          },
          {
            "text": "BindTools:",
            "lineNumber": 474
          },
          {
            "text": "  - \"ui_ux_search\"",
            "lineNumber": 475
          },
          {
            "text": "  - \"generate_design_system\"",
            "lineNumber": 476
          },
          {
            "text": "  - \"persist_design_system\"",
            "lineNumber": 477
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 478
          },
          {
            "text": "# 需要在 SystemPrompt 中详细说明调用顺序",
            "lineNumber": 479
          },
          {
            "text": "SystemPrompt: |",
            "lineNumber": 480
          },
          {
            "text": "  1. 先调用 generate_design_system",
            "lineNumber": 481
          },
          {
            "text": "  2. 然后调用 ui_ux_search 补充信息",
            "lineNumber": 482
          },
          {
            "text": "  3. 最后调用 persist_design_system",
            "lineNumber": 483
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 484
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 485
          },
          {
            "text": "#### 使用 Agent 工具（方式三）⭐",
            "lineNumber": 486
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 487
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml",
            "lineNumber": 488
          },
          {
            "text": "# 只需一个工具",
            "lineNumber": 489
          },
          {
            "text": "BindTools:",
            "lineNumber": 490
          },
          {
            "text": "  - \"generate_ui_design_system\"",
            "lineNumber": 491
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 492
          },
          {
            "text": "# SystemPrompt 简单明了",
            "lineNumber": 493
          },
          {
            "text": "SystemPrompt: |",
            "lineNumber": 494
          },
          {
            "text": "  使用 generate_ui_design_system 生成设计系统",
            "lineNumber": 495
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 496
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 497
          },
          {
            "text": "## 配置说明",
            "lineNumber": 498
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 499
          },
          {
            "text": "### 配置存储路径（可选）",
            "lineNumber": 500
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 501
          },
          {
            "text": "如果你想要自定义设计系统的存储路径，可以在 DigFlow 的配置中添加 DigEino 的配置：",
            "lineNumber": 502
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 503
          },
          {
            "text": "#### 创建 DigEino 配置文件",
            "lineNumber": 504
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 505
          },
          {
            "text": "在 DigFlow 项目中创建 &#96;config/digeino.yaml&#96;：",
            "lineNumber": 506
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 507
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml",
            "lineNumber": 508
          },
          {
            "text": "ChatModel:",
            "lineNumber": 509
          },
          {
            "text": "  Type: \"qwen\"",
            "lineNumber": 510
          },
          {
            "text": "  Config:",
            "lineNumber": 511
          },
          {
            "text": "    ApiKey: \"${QWEN_API_KEY}\"",
            "lineNumber": 512
          },
          {
            "text": "    Model: \"qwen-max\"",
            "lineNumber": 513
          },
          {
            "text": "    BaseUrl: \"https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1\"",
            "lineNumber": 514
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 515
          },
          {
            "text": "UIUX:",
            "lineNumber": 516
          },
          {
            "text": "  Storage:",
            "lineNumber": 517
          },
          {
            "text": "    BaseDir: \"storage/app/ui_ux\"  # 设计系统存储路径",
            "lineNumber": 518
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 519
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 520
          },
          {
            "text": "#### 在工具注册时加载配置",
            "lineNumber": 521
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 522
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go",
            "lineNumber": 523
          },
          {
            "text": "import (",
            "lineNumber": 524
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\"",
            "lineNumber": 525
          },
          {
            "text": ")",
            "lineNumber": 526
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 527
          },
          {
            "text": "func init() {",
            "lineNumber": 528
          },
          {
            "text": "    // 加载 DigEino 配置",
            "lineNumber": 529
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.19039399921894073
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/tools_info.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 32
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "# DigEino 工具集概览 (Tools Information)",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "本文档旨在汇总 &#96;DigEino&#96; 中集成的所有 Eino 工具，详细说明其功能、参数及使用场景。",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "## 1. 调研与搜索 (Researcher &amp; Search)",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "这类工具旨在帮助 Agent 理解项目代码、阅读外部文档以及搜索互联网信息。",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "### 1.1 基础调研 (Basic Research)",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "| 工具名称 | 功能描述 | 主要参数 |",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "| :--- | :--- | :--- |",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "| &#96;research_grep&#96; | 在源码或指定目录中进行关键词检索（模拟 ripgrep）。 | &#96;query&#96;: 关键词; &#96;path&#96;: 搜索路径 |",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "| &#96;research_read&#96; | 精确读取指定文件的完整内容。 | &#96;path&#96;: 文件路径 |",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "| &#96;research_doc_to_md&#96; | 集成 **Unstructured.io**，将 PDF/Word/Docx 高质量转为 Markdown。 | &#96;path&#96;: 文档路径 |",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "### 1.2 高级检索 (Advanced Retrieval)",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "| 工具名称 | 功能描述 | 主要参数 |",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "| :--- | :--- | :--- |",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "| &#96;research_semantic_search&#96; | **向量语义搜索**。基于 Pinecone，通过相似度定位偏逻辑意图的内容。 | &#96;query&#96;: 搜索意图; &#96;max_results&#96;: 结果数 |",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "| &#96;research_code_index&#96; | **项目索引工具**。扫描指定目录并将代码/文档向量化存入 Pinecone。 | &#96;path&#96;: 目标目录 |",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "| &#96;web_search&#96; | **统一网页搜索**。支持 Bocha, SerpApi, Google, Bing, DuckDuckGo, Firecrawl 和 Tavily 引擎。 | &#96;query&#96;: 搜索词; &#96;max_results&#96;: 结果数; &#96;region&#96;: 地区 |",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "| &#96;firecrawl_scrape&#96; | **深度网页爬取**。调用 Firecrawl API 将 URL 转换为清洗后的 Markdown。 | &#96;url&#96;: 目标网页地址 |",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "| &#96;research_jina_reader&#96; | **高级网页抓取**。使用 Jina Reader (r.jina.ai) 深度读取网页并转换为 Markdown，对微信公众号、知乎等强反爬平台有较好兼容性。 | &#96;url&#96;: 目标网页地址 |",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "| &#96;research_local_scraper&#96; | **本地无头浏览器抓取**。使用 go-rod + stealth 绕过复杂反爬（如微信公众号），抓取正文并输出 Text 与 Markdown。 | &#96;url&#96;: 目标网页地址 |",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "**web_search 引擎选择**：",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "| 引擎 | 特点 | 配置 |",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "|------|------|------|",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "| Bocha | 国内服务，中文友好 | &#96;Tools.WebSearch.Bocha.ApiKey&#96; |",
            "lineNumber": 32
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.18841220438480377
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/updates/2026-02-21_调研工具文件写入功能.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 63
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 127
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "   - 写入错误",
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "text": "### 代码示例",
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;go",
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "text": "// 覆盖模式写入",
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "text": "{",
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "text": "  \"path\": \"docs/research/方案.md\",",
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "text": "  \"content\": \"# 调研方案\\n\\n...\",",
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "text": "  \"mode\": \"overwrite\"",
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "text": "// 追加模式写入",
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "text": "{",
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "text": "  \"path\": \"docs/research/日志.md\",",
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "text": "  \"content\": \"\\n## 2026-02-21\\n\\n...\",",
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "text": "  \"mode\": \"append\"",
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "text": "## 使用场景",
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "text": "1. **保存调研报告**：将 Agent 生成的调研方案保存为 markdown 文件",
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "text": "2. **记录调研日志**：追加模式记录调研过程中的发现",
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "text": "3. **生成文档**：将代码分析结果保存为文档",
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "text": "4. **导出结果**：将 Agent 的执行结果导出到文件",
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "text": "## 配置",
            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92
          },
          {
            "text": "无需额外配置，工具会自动通过 &#96;BaseTools&#96; 函数加载。",
            "lineNumber": 93
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "text": "## 依赖",
            "lineNumber": 95
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;os&#96; - 文件系统操作",
            "lineNumber": 97
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;path/filepath&#96; - 路径处理",
            "lineNumber": 98
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool&#96; - Eino 工具框架",
            "lineNumber": 99
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool/utils&#96; - 工具工具函数",
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101
          },
          {
            "text": "## 注意事项",
            "lineNumber": 102
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103
          },
          {
            "text": "1. **文件权限**：写入的文件权限为 0644，目录权限为 0755",
            "lineNumber": 104
          },
          {
            "text": "2. **路径安全**：建议使用相对路径，避免写入系统关键目录",
            "lineNumber": 105
          },
          {
            "text": "3. **内容大小**：大文件写入可能影响性能，建议控制单次写入内容大小",
            "lineNumber": 106
          },
          {
            "text": "4. **并发安全**：追加模式下，多线程并发写入同一文件可能导致内容交错",
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "text": "## 测试建议",
            "lineNumber": 109
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110
          },
          {
            "text": "1. 测试覆盖模式写入新文件",
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "text": "2. 测试覆盖模式覆盖已存在文件",
            "lineNumber": 112
          },
          {
            "text": "3. 测试追加模式追加到已存在文件",
            "lineNumber": 113
          },
          {
            "text": "4. 测试自动创建目录功能",
            "lineNumber": 114
          },
          {
            "text": "5. 测试相对路径和绝对路径",
            "lineNumber": 115
          },
          {
            "text": "6. 测试错误处理（无效路径、权限不足等）",
            "lineNumber": 116
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117
          },
          {
            "text": "## 相关文件",
            "lineNumber": 118
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;tools/research/write_file.go&#96; - 工具实现",
            "lineNumber": 120
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;tools/tools.go&#96; - 工具注册",
            "lineNumber": 121
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;tools/research/general_researcher.go&#96; - 参考实现模式",
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123
          },
          {
            "text": "## 参考",
            "lineNumber": 124
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "text": "- DigFlow 更新文档：&#96;DigFlow/updates/2026-02-21_Researcher应用能力增强.md&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 126
          },
          {
            "text": "- 能力对比分析：&#96;.cursor/plans/researcher应用能力对比分析_7633bfea.plan.md&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 127
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.18413689732551575
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./tools/research/general_researcher.go",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 86,
            "column": 56
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "package research",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "import (",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"bytes\"",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"context\"",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"fmt\"",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"io\"",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"mime/multipart\"",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"net/http\"",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"os\"",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"path/filepath\"",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"strings\"",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"time\"",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool\"",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"github.com/cloudwego/eino/components/tool/utils\"",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\"github.com/originaleric/digeino/config\"",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": ")",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "// --- Grep Search Tool ---",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "type GrepRequest struct {",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "\tQuery string &#96;json:\"query\" jsonschema:\"required,description=搜索关键词\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "\tPath  string &#96;json:\"path\" jsonschema:\"description=搜索路径，默认为项目根目录\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "type GrepResponse struct {",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "\tMatches []string &#96;json:\"matches\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "\tCount   int      &#96;json:\"count\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "// GrepSearch 模拟代码搜索逻辑 (考虑到云端环境，这里使用简单的文件系统遍历，未来可接入 ripgrep)",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "func GrepSearch(ctx context.Context, req *GrepRequest) (*GrepResponse, error) {",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "\tsearchPath := req.Path",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif searchPath == \"\" {",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t// 默认搜索当前目录",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tsearchPath = \".\"",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "\tvar matches []string",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "\terr := filepath.Walk(searchPath, func(path string, info os.FileInfo, err error) error {",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\treturn nil // 忽略错误文件夹",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tif info.IsDir() || strings.HasPrefix(info.Name(), \".\") {",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\treturn nil",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t// 简单起见，只检查文本类的文件后缀",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\text := strings.ToLower(filepath.Ext(path))",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tif ext != \".go\" &amp;&amp; ext != \".md\" &amp;&amp; ext != \".yml\" &amp;&amp; ext != \".json\" &amp;&amp; ext != \".txt\" {",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\treturn nil",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tcontent, err := os.ReadFile(path)",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\treturn nil",
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tif strings.Contains(string(content), req.Query) {",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\tmatches = append(matches, path)",
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\tif len(matches) &gt; 20 {",
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t\treturn filepath.SkipAll // 限制前20个匹配，防止 Token 爆炸",
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\t}",
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil",
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "text": "\t})",
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "text": "\tif err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "text": "\t\treturn nil, err",
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "text": "\t}",
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "text": "\treturn &amp;GrepResponse{Matches: matches, Count: len(matches)}, nil",
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "text": "// --- Read File Tool ---",
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "text": "type ReadFileRequest struct {",
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "text": "\tPath string &#96;json:\"path\" jsonschema:\"required,description=要阅读的文件路径\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "text": "type ReadFileResponse struct {",
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "text": "\tContent string &#96;json:\"content\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "text": "func ReadFile(ctx context.Context, req *ReadFileRequest)",
            "lineNumber": 87
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.17474409937858582
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/ideas/digflow_ui_ux_integration.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 380
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 443
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "func init() {",
            "lineNumber": 381
          },
          {
            "text": "    ctx := context.Background()",
            "lineNumber": 382
          },
          {
            "text": "    ",
            "lineNumber": 383
          },
          {
            "text": "    // 加载 DigEino 配置",
            "lineNumber": 384
          },
          {
            "text": "    // 注意：需要创建 DigEino 的配置文件 config/digeino.yaml",
            "lineNumber": 385
          },
          {
            "text": "    _, err := config.Load(\"config/digeino.yaml\")",
            "lineNumber": 386
          },
          {
            "text": "    if err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 387
          },
          {
            "text": "        logger.Error(\"加载 DigEino 配置失败\", zap.Error(err))",
            "lineNumber": 388
          },
          {
            "text": "        return",
            "lineNumber": 389
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 390
          },
          {
            "text": "    ",
            "lineNumber": 391
          },
          {
            "text": "    // 从配置创建 Agent 工具（自动读取 DigEino 配置中的 ChatModel）",
            "lineNumber": 392
          },
          {
            "text": "    agentTool, err := ui_ux.NewUIDesignSystemAgentToolFromConfig(ctx)",
            "lineNumber": 393
          },
          {
            "text": "    if err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 394
          },
          {
            "text": "        logger.Error(\"创建 UI/UX Agent 工具失败\", zap.Error(err))",
            "lineNumber": 395
          },
          {
            "text": "        return",
            "lineNumber": 396
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 397
          },
          {
            "text": "    ",
            "lineNumber": 398
          },
          {
            "text": "    // 注册工具",
            "lineNumber": 399
          },
          {
            "text": "    if err := variable.ToolRegistry.Register(\"generate_ui_design_system\", agentTool); err != nil {",
            "lineNumber": 400
          },
          {
            "text": "        logger.Warn(\"UI/UX Agent 工具已存在\", zap.String(\"name\", \"generate_ui_design_system\"))",
            "lineNumber": 401
          },
          {
            "text": "    } else {",
            "lineNumber": 402
          },
          {
            "text": "        logger.Info(\"UI/UX Agent 工具注册成功\", zap.String(\"name\", \"generate_ui_design_system\"))",
            "lineNumber": 403
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 404
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 405
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 406
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 407
          },
          {
            "text": "**DigEino 配置文件** (&#96;config/digeino.yaml&#96;):",
            "lineNumber": 408
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 409
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml",
            "lineNumber": 410
          },
          {
            "text": "ChatModel:",
            "lineNumber": 411
          },
          {
            "text": "  Type: \"qwen\"",
            "lineNumber": 412
          },
          {
            "text": "  Config:",
            "lineNumber": 413
          },
          {
            "text": "    ApiKey: \"${QWEN_API_KEY}\"",
            "lineNumber": 414
          },
          {
            "text": "    Model: \"qwen-max\"",
            "lineNumber": 415
          },
          {
            "text": "    BaseUrl: \"https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1\"",
            "lineNumber": 416
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 417
          },
          {
            "text": "UIUX:",
            "lineNumber": 418
          },
          {
            "text": "  Storage:",
            "lineNumber": 419
          },
          {
            "text": "    BaseDir: \"storage/app/ui_ux\"",
            "lineNumber": 420
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 421
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 422
          },
          {
            "text": "## Agent 工具详解",
            "lineNumber": 423
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 424
          },
          {
            "text": "### Agent 工具参数",
            "lineNumber": 425
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 426
          },
          {
            "text": "Agent 工具接受以下参数：",
            "lineNumber": 427
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 428
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;json",
            "lineNumber": 429
          },
          {
            "text": "{",
            "lineNumber": 430
          },
          {
            "text": "  \"query\": \"beauty spa wellness service\",      // 必需：用户需求描述",
            "lineNumber": 431
          },
          {
            "text": "  \"project_name\": \"Serenity Spa\",              // 可选：项目名称",
            "lineNumber": 432
          },
          {
            "text": "  \"stack\": \"react\",                            // 可选：技术栈（react, vue, tailwind 等）",
            "lineNumber": 433
          },
          {
            "text": "  \"persist\": true,                             // 可选：是否持久化设计系统",
            "lineNumber": 434
          },
          {
            "text": "  \"page_name\": \"homepage\"                      // 可选：页面名称（用于生成页面覆盖）",
            "lineNumber": 435
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 436
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 437
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 438
          },
          {
            "text": "**参数说明**：",
            "lineNumber": 439
          },
          {
            "text": "- **query**（必需）：用户需求描述，例如 \"beauty spa wellness service\"",
            "lineNumber": 440
          },
          {
            "text": "- **project_name**（可选）：项目名称，用于生成设计系统和文件命名",
            "lineNumber": 441
          },
          {
            "text": "- **stack**（可选）：技术栈，Agent 会自动获取该技术栈的指南",
            "lineNumber": 442
          },
          {
            "text": "- **persist**（可选）：是否持久化设计系统到文件",
            "lineNumber": 443
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.1670859009027481
    },

          {
            "text": "\tgithub.com/slongfield/pyfmt v0.0.0-20220222012616-ea85ff4c361f // indirect",
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "\tgithub.com/stretchr/testify v1.11.1 // indirect",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "\tgithub.com/twitchyliquid64/golang-asm v0.15.1 // indirect",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "\tgithub.com/wk8/go-ordered-map/v2 v2.1.8 // indirect",

          },

            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "text": "\tgithub.com/ysmood/fetchup v0.2.3 // indirect",
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "text": "\tgithub.com/ysmood/goob v0.4.0 // indirect",
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "text": "\tgithub.com/ysmood/got v0.34.1 // indirect",
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "\tgithub.com/ysmood/gson v0.7.3 // indirect",
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "text": "\tgithub.com/ysmood/leakless v0.8.0 // indirect",
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "\tgolang.org/x/arch v0.15.0 // indirect",
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "text": "\tgolang.org/x/exp v0.0.0-20250305212735-054e65f0b394 // indirect",
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "text": "\tgolang.org/x/net v0.47.0 // indirect",
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "text": "\tgolang.org/x/sys v0.38.0 // indirect",
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "text": "\tgolang.org/x/text v0.31.0 // indirect",
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "text": "\tgoogle.golang.org/genproto/googleapis/api v0.0.0-20240814211410-ddb44dafa142 // indirect",
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "text": "\tgoogle.golang.org/genproto/googleapis/rpc v0.0.0-20241021214115-324edc3d5d38 // indirect",
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "text": "\tgoogle.golang.org/grpc v1.67.1 // indirect",
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "text": ")",

          },
          {

          },
